subject: Humbly asking you to contribute to my twin brother Eugene’s campaign for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado

Hi there — It’s Alexander Vindman.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Eugene Vindman's campaign in Virginia from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544332/478221033/1557491702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI5MzUzOS1mMzI1LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCmdz6ZLclsKk6AeYTQcSXAZzRJHYR9lZTrOatbyoww=&emci=54e5f77a-bb25-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=48293539-f325-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544333/478221040/1582186816?refcode=em20240608pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=48293539-f325-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI5MzUzOS1mMzI1LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCmdz6ZLclsKk6AeYTQcSXAZzRJHYR9lZTrOatbyoww=)
Hi there — It’s Alexander Vindman.
I hope you can give me just a quick minute to explain why I’m reaching out today, and why I’m humbly asking you to [**make a contribution to my twin brother Eugene’s campaign for Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544334/478221045/1582186816?refcode=em20240608pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=48293539-f325-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI5MzUzOS1mMzI1LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCmdz6ZLclsKk6AeYTQcSXAZzRJHYR9lZTrOatbyoww=)
More than four years ago now, my brother Eugene and I made the fateful decision to do our patriotic duty and stand up to Donald Trump at the risk of our decades-long military careers.
We reported Trump’s corrupt phone call with Ukraine — our actions eventually led to his impeachment, and Trump retaliated by firing us from our posts.
Now Eugene is running for Congress in Virginia where he will continue the fight to defend our democracy and the Constitution both of us swore to protect.
And more than that, he will fight for the fundamental rights that the GOP have worked so hard to take away: the right to reproductive freedom, the right to vote, the right for us and our kids to live safe from gun violence.
But he can't win those fights alone.
Eugene’s primary will be over before we know it — early voting has already begun in Virginia.
That means we have little time left to raise the resources we need to win and prove that this campaign is ready to win this crucial Virginia swing district.
So please,
**[Can you make a contribution today to help Eugene win this race? It’s going to take a big team for us to take on Donald Trump and the GOP once again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544335/478221046/1582186816?refcode=em20240608pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=48293539-f325-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI5MzUzOS1mMzI1LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCmdz6ZLclsKk6AeYTQcSXAZzRJHYR9lZTrOatbyoww=)**

name: Debbie
subject: a dozen doughnuts 🍩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
a small act can create major change
| | |

Friend, I wanted to reach out this evening because we have an important deadline coming up. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $500,000 weekly fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
**[(If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott this fall, you can chip in here to help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544990/478228773/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZhOWRjNTAtZjUyNS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wYSTVjWUKoyHD9hvC894mtLZR7x4SvzGGWAQqIhOCFw=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544991/478228774/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZhOWRjNTAtZjUyNS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wYSTVjWUKoyHD9hvC894mtLZR7x4SvzGGWAQqIhOCFw=)
When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and _still_ struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
**So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop.** It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality.
We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. **I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.**
**Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. ****I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change._And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign in November._**
[**That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 — about the cost of a dozen doughnuts — to send me to the Senate. Can you chip in before midnight to help me meet my weekly fundraising goal and defeat Rick Scott? This campaign is powered by small-dollar donations, and every single gift makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86544992/478228775/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZhOWRjNTAtZjUyNS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wYSTVjWUKoyHD9hvC894mtLZR7x4SvzGGWAQqIhOCFw=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. clean_body: a small act can create major change | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out this evening because we have an important deadline coming up. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $500,000 weekly fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority. = = When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate. Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change.And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign in November. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

We MUST win this House district to FIRE Speaker Mike Johnson and take back the chamber from MAGA Republicans. As the union-endorsed, grassroots-backed progressive in this race, we’re depending on thousands of Americans like you to finish funding our get out the vote budget. ****If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Now, she's running to continue the fight in Congress. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Kamala Harris scared straight after being ambushed by a crazed mob
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 09, 2024

Kamala Harris scared
straight after being ambushed by a crazed mob

The vice president is certainly an unpopular politician
who many Americans dislike. But one group of radical protestors
are dead set on making an actual enemy out of her.

And Kamala Harris was scared
beyond belief after being ambushed by a crazed mob.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Mitch McConnell
blindsided Senate Democrats with an unexpected announcement

McConnell has said he
will retire in 2027. But now he's shaking things up with a major
surprise.
➞ Continue Reading

Prosecutors slam
Trump with devastating news that could ruin his campaign

The former president
is working night and day to get reelected this year. But he's
about to hit a major roadblock.
➞ Continue Reading

Former House Speaker
reveals shocking details about Biden behind closed doors

Americans have been
wondering what the president is like when he's out of the public
eye. Now we finally have an answer.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Believe me. This is easier said than done…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zisgdduo2k1vgl4f9tv6k7oent3034f0kdboktfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6aob4c3h2bs "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2uacm4ov07v5b4iugatihhf19rn3aus0anndo5g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6aob4c3h2bs "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zchijfiui25iliahofdvsbcre4eeaq79otdqqpm0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6aob4c3h2bs "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

**[OFFICIAL 2024 GOP VOTER VERIFICATION INITIATIVE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmj7d7otf2h87v5p11fdljj1jgirftv6tti52kuo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh66pj6c9h2bs)**
ATTN: Friend,

Please don't ignore this message. _This is truly ALARMING!_

_First, a deeply troubling statistic regarding GOP membership emerged:_
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS"REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd31grfgn5n82rvato3r3dq007b03jijo0888ni8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh66pj6c9h2bs)**

_But now, we have to level with you, Friend, we 've never been more worried..._
_**[NEW polling just indicated that _10% of Republicans_ are now _WALKING AWAY!_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4dha35r7qtnoajc24k7lmqn8n2g4pbhv01c854o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh66pj6c9h2bs)**_
If ultimately true, this would spell DISASTER for our Party.

_That 's why our **[Voter Verification Initiative](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdqd3208v9jonhegvo60poih710ts2fnt98da468_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh66pj6c9h2bs)** has never been more critical. We need to _PROVE_ just how many patriots still stand behind this movement to save our country._

**So, we have only one question for you:_[Are YOU still with us?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlsamelt5rcatqjgr9dso0a0l55602m91sh6od4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh66pj6c9h2bs)_**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: a single cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4fj10g5hao3phjj6aucj81tcqn7qn1fkppk0e18_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)

Friend,

I can't tell you how much it means to me that you opened this. Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these messages from me?

I do have to ask a quick favor of you - I'm simply asking you to read this all the way through. If you finish reading this and you still think a $1 donation doesn't matter, then I want to just say **[thank you for hearing me out.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0vna441pn4la8ltjbl9ks5sn6dqeb0c6s1cca9o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)**

While only about 25% of our friends are opening messages from me and my team, **[only about 1%](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvejm4g7ll83ml8lv1h5c58qapp1pu47fs5g1mhg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)** will go the extra mile by donating! I'm not exaggerating when I say this, Friend, conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires that I can call on to hit these goals. **[I rely on the couple of bucks that hard-working Americans receiving these messages can afford to give me from time to time.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrtjl58mpo4cvhfjebal3hupqc2kg6iutkj7gtq8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)**

If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit - even just $1 - we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' _MASSIVE_ campaign coffers.

**[I'll be honest...](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmpisn4cu7klje1telcq6e0vjh91qpvu8bt2tfa0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs) **

The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit of support we can get if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. If we're going to stay on pace to reach all of our goals, I truly need your help.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm9f0no2idkptm2b5hcnoett272bt1vrbqpn5gmg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)

**[I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a single cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a jelly doughnut. The Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my next crucial Goal.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ms65rjedlmkubgt3g6rv3m3hk83jild2mircog_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)**

**[☕CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A CUP OF COFFEE☕](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6apsa12r6h111l1vgv3269fs8q9htcki77vqpr8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)**

_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether. _

We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to work for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I **[need](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z93gjed89ppdvel4dsfrsb87298fkdg558f8oirg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)** patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

**[But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can afford before midnight.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8b68p1a1dmo3ph0af3743c4agddbok3ur4e47lg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)**

**[DONATE TODAY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsiucqebpmeh6dai47o4jm605bdcjogkqefre2lg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj1chh2bs)**

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z85c5an51sraaqer5qh7g6g48msvnc0sn92tt620_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj3cth2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0hd9n3cq6lq9sbsc14k95eukqc8dcdlhh76p3a8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj3cth2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0u3elo2pkam487o2o04bmcft51rie9nm5gn26j0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj3cth2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0drtqflbrbrdol2undq96jk2i1j6eskd30dl7m8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh6eoj3cth2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zovfp8p3unk15aq7acc9tcp3ob1rsuj9uk5tm9f0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqnclbsn1msc0eqef3hc8t2rmt3cbe3aqnhpjti8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za4ff5g0vfr3grsqvesqqvchnd5uosvn9tsst1a8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs) [No](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf6kotpstcgmqlgillu478gtehtkfrcqhbg3ch80_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0dpiv9n4kibtja6qq2spgbr1hsqf9gt439640fg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg3so95v5qvfend40qosajrabpkgt0t390ekuq18_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs) For our children, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8biqgsc4ebbl4np5dm336aeb4ulra4m1i4a7ero_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9ge9pr1chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt9h5mv2c4ikgo3k6ms35ffcg5p67r8eokbj1u78_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh61p32c3h2bs)_

subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdtatak7ncs8n72du19b6ksufpj2orchhvrd0r7g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh69p74c9h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zasatqqj08ra7jhvj9aepu9gas66bn89pbmqi2ao_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh69p74c9h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrfmmjapoojvu8o3141rm5tuljh0tu0q3ul7njt8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh69p74c9h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z37mnjg1al1vk10j0iiiu8q9n4a9liqrhvtu7ct0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh69p74c9h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp6h1pnam85kuurb7m86alsfsl2p0dn2f1dpsjqg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjh69p74c9h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Believe me. This is easier said than done…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zidr9spiuhj8fp49flqhb9j9eqqg2imjbdq24qho_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2e0ru6cd633hl2e13fioiblulpcdhqah39o7se8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoljbikhiqqcc79156vle01a2ofa3rds59gqgthg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6lhbantavi0965fihiqf6ku2qeb7t847oajqg0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. ")**_

The Radical Left Democrats have an army of Liberal megadonors on their side... But if EVERY America First Conservative pitches in JUST a few bucks - we'll surge ahead and shock the world.

PLEASE:

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1c41l46rifv0sp9sifmc1a0fqu34tll4euifv18_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")
---

**Even a small amount can help build our movement!**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgei36ik274cckh0dfrjn6l75to9tvpj89sfjba0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help.

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

_**[I hope you'd agree America - as we know it - wouldn't survive something like that. Please join me now while there's still time to prevent that dark reality.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsi7gailj5lul5lo4a9gi7udatuhn8oe45ap0d48_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "I hope you’d agree America – as we know it – wouldn’t survive something like that. Please join me now while there’s still time to prevent that dark reality.")**_

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25b1jq5erlobjggvbt3chvj3cmqvm43er7b0oio_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

---

It's Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z91funusu0d8964v6u5tej4qnc1q0ckfoadonepo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o70clh2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd6d21d2njfbj6jhtpbl3td8082hoi7vfhsgekqg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o74c9h2bs) Fellow American, [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3kae206886j7q9p0kl4e0i5hshursg8359bjui0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o74c9h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z36afh8p6moclu4k9v0kf1h37v87qs327jfc02lo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o74c9h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9u5huan2hrf2unp55bvom7vuimmht14tin3pvj8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o74c9h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdavdjvueg6dj1mbqi06c7os8qgfs1pc6n82ccg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj60o74c9h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Marco Rubio
subject: a single cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7rj5pvrdn0imqcuc5ipo863i4auedp78ksh0300_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)

Friend,

I can't tell you how much it means to me that you opened this. Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these messages from me?

I do have to ask a quick favor of you - I'm simply asking you to read this all the way through. If you finish reading this and you still think a $1 donation doesn't matter, then I want to just say **[thank you for hearing me out.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znghpklsd257lpc9j2qi4p4fok2492q0lo98qbao_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)**

While only about 25% of our friends are opening messages from me and my team, **[only about 1%](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zonmdb3ajuop1ve4s78ndtso36691i0tggavi06g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)** will go the extra mile by donating! I'm not exaggerating when I say this, Friend, conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires that I can call on to hit these goals. **[I rely on the couple of bucks that hard-working Americans receiving these messages can afford to give me from time to time.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcqv276v0fudkvq52221tbd1nohhjdvr6rq9hp1g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)**

If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit - even just $1 - we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' _MASSIVE_ campaign coffers.

**[I'll be honest...](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7gp2phg6bnf67mi1l0l665ir8nd051fd5fehnb0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs) **

The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit of support we can get if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. If we're going to stay on pace to reach all of our goals, I truly need your help.

[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsonv8no1lijm0m5pgtdlc9iotkff9qdu73r22ig_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)

**[I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a single cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a jelly doughnut. The Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my next crucial Goal.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4scft79jtqg2l7j4149jg7k8ufbl8v03d179hro_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)**

**[☕CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A CUP OF COFFEE☕](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrer1qck6i2kkmsm6emofmqat5vp9lo7ueev2028_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)**

_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether. _

We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to work for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I **[need](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zl0dtql06ihf6umr9qskqu57mskukdpe00bdb1lg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)** patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

**[But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can afford before midnight.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zeipvfgp8qcu7lfkhjp52d08hqm9amvgbp7ahka0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)**

**[DONATE TODAY](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsfg5vgjfb6hd0tgteufq6c8328m41p2b5vmqo68_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)**

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znkvtpd4bkkkt8flh5c0sn40rl3cta8atiu5h2h0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj68pr2cjh2bs)
---

Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zllggp846v9bq1fall9rtt8rafi23k0lgjst3seg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj64or6c5h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zciaptkt41rlpu577ta3kguuvg7vibfhho2u6s2o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj64or6c5h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zetldrgk16tqc24tp7nusj7fr3fbepplq2m77tjo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj62ob4cph2bs "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za178safmj773nq5hp3d53hoa70qntp7tebhaql0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj62ob4cph2bs "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbo4r1tdbfbmmmfj4agbm350uhd565gd7p71f0g0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj62ob4cph2bs "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpdkhhef92i1fm51os4moehtj447bur932keqtr0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj62ob4cph2bs "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. ")**_

The Radical Left Democrats have an army of Liberal megadonors on their side... But if EVERY America First Conservative pitches in JUST a few bucks - we'll surge ahead and shock the world.

PLEASE:

---

**Even a small amount can help build our movement!**

---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help.

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

_**[I hope you'd agree America - as we know it - wouldn't survive something like that. Please join me now while there's still time to prevent that dark reality.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zivm029tlq9psqgmugo99bkmimt7h5ssa6pimqf0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj62ob4cph2bs "I hope you’d agree America – as we know it – wouldn’t survive something like that. Please join me now while there’s still time to prevent that dark reality.")**_

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

It's Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Joe Biden was rocked to his core after losing the support of this crucial ally
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 09, 2024

Joe Biden was rocked
to his core after losing the support of this crucial ally

Biden's reelection goals are starting to look more like a
dream than reality. But now that dream is about to turn into a
nightmare.

As Joe Biden was rocked to his
core after losing the support of this crucial ally.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Kamala Harris scared
straight after being ambushed by a crazed mob

The vice president is
certainly an unpopular politician who many Americans dislike.
Both one group of radical protestors are dead set on making an
actual enemy out of her.
➞ Continue Reading

Mitch McConnell
blindsided Senate Democrats with an unexpected announcement

McConnell has said he
will retire in 2027. But now he's shaking things up with a major
surprise.
➞ Continue Reading

Prosecutors slam
Trump with devastating news that could ruin his campaign

The former president
is working night and day to get reelected this year. But he's
about to hit a major roadblock.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: CLOSING NOTICE
subject: RE: Final Attempt to Verify
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now more than ever, we need to hear from YOU.

**[OFFICIAL 2024 GOP VOTER VERIFICATION INITIATIVE](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr7hht713g1ijek8nd7he3h1371csr20s6nvg21o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)**
ATTN: Friend,

Please don't ignore this message. _This is truly ALARMING!_

_First, a deeply troubling statistic regarding GOP membership emerged:_
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS"REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj71rl73ipe13shvepvi5kq33c57le7sga54ldl8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)**
_And Democrats weaponized these headlines to go on an all-out**[BLITZ](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zakvftqun5gh1ntj066gcc0tqcotrtj5ihvv5948_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)** of attacks against our America First candidates._

_But now, we have to level with you, Friend, we 've never been more worried..._
_**[NEW polling just indicated that _10% of Republicans_ are now _WALKING AWAY!_](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp5lp311csuu8a4hd41gn26bn49g1mhtb9d69r6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)**_
If ultimately true, this would spell DISASTER for our Party.

_That 's why our **[Voter Verification Initiative](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmh1ue8e5gjcvhslf8a2ugr2td083ad48rckgjmg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)** has never been more critical. We need to _PROVE_ just how many patriots still stand behind this movement to save our country._

But with just HOURS to go until we have to close the books on the project, we saw that _YOUR 2024 Voter Verification Questionnaire was still**[INCOMPLETE!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0pa0g3t2abq5qn31oh2peh9gjhbka511o9noi5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)**_

**So, we have only one question for you:_[Are YOU still with us?](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi4den31abdgn0ps95279mpdafnbu0c90lv08c2o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)_**
******************************************************[YES!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb6gkh71g0gvo8l73u9ei78dhkp9csvoor4fi4p8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)******************************************************
******************************************************[NO](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcogo3v50sjp2e99jgotnjli1uj6t7vpoj8m2r6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)******************************************************

**[Please follow your *personalized* link below to submit your responses before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to complete the 2024 GOP Voter Verification Questionnaire:](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt62nhkbcl8luqje7ktr50ik3rsc89f0lrg44skg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj66oj2chh2bs)**

name: bloated ankles
subject: What IS lymphedema?!
body:
Your lymphatic system acts as a one-way detox channel for your body...
It filters and carries cellular waste and harmful bacteria into your bloodstream for your liver & kidneys to process and flush out...
It also plays an important part in delivering essential nutrients all the way from your brain to the bottoms of your feet.
Over time, these lymphatic channels can break down, age, and congest - rendering them USELESS... _often resulting in swollen tissue around your legs, ankles, and feet._
If you've noticed **your ankles are a little puffier... your shoes feel tighter... or your socks are leaving a red ring around your ankles...**
You may find relief when you feed your body UNIQUE FATTY ACIDS recently found to support healthy lymphatic function... help to remove clogs... and increase lymphatic flow.
[⇒ eat THIS fat once a day to relieve swelling & pain](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z10654sl3j6j6isaodnnmk8olv0nkjod2daqrth8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cjj61ob7cth2bs)
As always—to being & staying on The Path together.
-Dr. Chad Walding

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HkDzaFuinsDGPhoK7jrwfQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSBLEP0S-~~) Fellow American, [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HkDzaFuinsDGPhoK7jrwfQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSBLEP0S-~~) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HkDzaFuinsDGPhoK7jrwfQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSBLEP0S-~~) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HkDzaFuinsDGPhoK7jrwfQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSBLEP0S-~~) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HkDzaFuinsDGPhoK7jrwfQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSBLEP0S-~~) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

_And Democrats weaponized these headlines to go on an all-out**[BLITZ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cebf50d3e5d484fbcaa6c1ba623a44a&_e=5p3Uc6ZnDbgUg1cWx1tKWwPBzmHjwZ3_zke6uBzrCgSPew-2_PGObhIpIl0aqLDymg7pMDTU_3spRYyDNAe8iEgW2eIciioWP7AaotMNCLXluw7CygWbT9crPJIhmH0jndN8OIoWNsfTLP6dH2Kro8ps0LQCQwxANG7PoI-HJWY0aOrHQBTNzxkZ7Ekv79_4ZUh498wMdDOqbfQdQQiSieM9WC5nkQDamksUvjkzajI8KYAGiQJK_hvzW3vRyIKdkxfP-TcASHW2QVx3Xx3t8pSi0wYbSASEJkEvbRNqJhk5rZhfw5MDG748hAdxphb9Y37TQf83xBqI4hifA78tF14UxsVVA4Wb2jybAoNGcGbo5gtLQNXi4r96VxF7QjuAKpTpS-IBkqQvEX99UGOpYmkPzrIiLGYCVVgAdnnx-aZA_Qz_9ouGPc9ioQKFY3fsLlZ65Jn2oYRbHgiQOM66y80lIhEZ1HPukQuyD1Dhp4hz72OT-2W_cV9ynmft2cLHTFeIqdIkz4tpyDe4424Se15V_GEvqfgUXYsfK54m6to%3D)** of attacks against our America First candidates._

_But now, we have to level with you, Friend, we 've never been more worried..._
_**[NEW polling just indicated that _10% of Republicans_ are now _WALKING AWAY!_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cebf50d3e5d484fbcaa6c1ba623a44a&_e=5p3Uc6ZnDbgUg1cWx1tKWwPBzmHjwZ3_zke6uBzrCgSPew-2_PGObhIpIl0aqLDymg7pMDTU_3spRYyDNAe8iEgW2eIciioWP7AaotMNCLXluw7CygWbT9crPJIhmH0jndN8OIoWNsfTLP6dH2Kro8ps0LQCQwxANG7PoI-HJWY0aOrHQBTNzxkZ7Ekv79_4ZUh498wMdDOqbfQdQQiSieM9WC5nkQDamksUvjkzajI8KYAGiQJK_hvzW3vRyIKdkxfP-TcASHW2QVx3Xx3t8pSi0wYbSASEJkEvbRNqJhk5rZhfw5MDG748hAdxphb9Y37TQf83xBqI4hifA78tF14UxsVVA4Wb2jybAoNGcGbo5gtLQNXi4r96VxF7QjuAKpTpS-IBkqQvEX99UGOpYv54CkfGMhtCZsei-5qKKl4MuO6bwHPm8Hr4ItMlEGg2RH1Cbpcqt9aMcp3X9TXYQCP2wHjAs-m7Yq8qotfQIPeI9ouAlO-FCRWbaZoCY5D5-BqBGEs7nq9EMbzbmTeU0DAB00WzbbvVHBBTN573LqA%3D)**_

_That 's why our **[Voter Verification Initiative](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cebf50d3e5d484fbcaa6c1ba623a44a&_e=5p3Uc6ZnDbgUg1cWx1tKWwPBzmHjwZ3_zke6uBzrCgSPew-2_PGObhIpIl0aqLDymg7pMDTU_3spRYyDNAe8iEgW2eIciioWP7AaotMNCLXluw7CygWbT9crPJIhmH0jndN8OIoWNsfTLP6dH2Kro8ps0LQCQwxANG7PoI-HJWY0aOrHQBTNzxkZ7Ekv79_4ZUh498wMdDOqbfQdQQiSieM9WC5nkQDamksUvjkzajI8KYAGiQJK_hvzW3vRyIKdkxfP-TcASHW2QVx3Xx3t8pSi0wYbSASEJkEvbRNqJhk5rZhfw5MDG748hAdxphb9Y37TQf83xBqI4hifA78tF14UxsVVA4Wb2jybAoNGcGbo5gtLQNXi4r96VxF7QjuAKpTpS-IBkqQvEX99UGOpYmffEtjA9t2KSez4sax0awVyo4sy0q_FzCCVPcvhzgmHXtL56T3iqcfcpSl72ONQnhnCEe-z8LsBg4NWH1eAxLZbay0kyX9i_pkgimhvoMtOAv60fLmIlcwaz72oJ4Oq9Ylxp4Wo81wyVnMEWpzjTxY%3D)** has never been more critical. We need to _PROVE_ just how many patriots still stand behind this movement to save our country._

| | | | | Did you see this Fox News report, Peter?! [We can't let Cruz stop us now – not when we’re TIED with him in the polls. We're SO close to finally firing him and delivering real leadership for Texans! That's why we set a $65,000 rapid-response goal to make sure Colin has the resources to go toe to toe with Cruz and his extremist mega donors: Will you chip in a split donation of $10 or more between Colin and Blue Amp Action to reach this critical goal?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bc18f4f-22b4-4692-8d55-68cf40a23fc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Colin Allred is ready to be the leader Texans need and deserve in the Senate, and experts agree he's got a real chance against Ted Cruz. Polls show this race is neck and neck, and CNN is calling Cruz not only the most vulnerable GOP Senator in the entire country, but the ONLY vulnerable GOP Senator. The one thing that could hold us back from winning this race is a lack of resources. We need to reach voters in every corner of the Lone Star State if we're going to win this thing. But that means driving thousands of miles from Laredo to El Paso to Amarillo. Making tens of thousands of phone calls. And airing ads in some of the country's most expensive media markets. Remember, Peter: Democrats came within just 2.6% of defeating Ted Cruz in 2018. This is our chance to get it done, but we must keep up with Cruz's powerful campaign war chest. [So please, before our midnight deadline, will you chip in a split donation between Colin and Blue Amp Action of $10 or more to help Colin Allred FIRE Ted Cruz this November? We're building a true grassroots movement, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8a3eec9-c8ca-4ad1-b7ea-773e20695afc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td78a1f61-fe2d-4b6f-be2e-5ef65e5c5905/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dea8c618dc3431a85dd264613ddf14c&_e=SB5KO8QIqQa4GQak66Nj9FhaKr2mjR6t9CZzrNYOdvw48PeikLFuZOKNebDwDQCBheeOADXzeRkS-wru-dtLQ6BPp8fMpvOikVXyZrVKv3sAY-HZDTeRAjYj_hdJFSbG5tfdmLgqm6B1mPduzJII3PoZJjyxK57ONThtio1c8j7MgF6H_F71LE0MVXiob1gLLz9KjqQ3BZXSgyeZ5Vd9jRJiUS4okJVxvcznmL15iwRhKW2i-tNwVuod8aaTb8ZWgBKy_PbNZxdsYGe7dkutEqfSOag5wRnW7CknoucvR5BRrwFfr-HrYtfC4dP14f6hD7DIh4TMZmHHQOOVG83LOV6HJj5dkv74cbV2eHHHp5mt43vB1Ii1D9fUe8qc1oSlG55YH3oHurvmZPg_7BQ27eqcXmwSiGKpIsnFpmdAzfs%3D) Fellow American, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dea8c618dc3431a85dd264613ddf14c&_e=SB5KO8QIqQa4GQak66Nj9FhaKr2mjR6t9CZzrNYOdvw48PeikLFuZOKNebDwDQCBheeOADXzeRkS-wru-dtLQ6BPp8fMpvOikVXyZrVKv3sAY-HZDTeRAjYj_hdJFSbG5tfdmLgqm6B1mPduzJII3PoZJjyxK57ONThtio1c8j7MgF6H_F71LE0MVXiob1gLLz9KjqQ3BZXSgyeZ5Vd9jRJiUS4okJVxvcznmL15iwRhKW2i-tNwVuod8aaTb8ZWgBKy_PbNZxdsYGe7dkutEkFpjYJoUczD6Sebmi8U9TeOJTRrxPPMr0veuZaJNd8aewQo8spWkxrle9Mt6rkdhlDU2cvJQc_OH3PsfgoyGcNKqSRbBDk0eyxg_7CPxbpthNY4eqquaj0uOj6Ataj0fXsI4U6-vS6A6xQbpX6ApdM%3D) You may be discouraged by the Left's dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That's why we've turned our course, [**" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dea8c618dc3431a85dd264613ddf14c&_e=SB5KO8QIqQa4GQak66Nj9FhaKr2mjR6t9CZzrNYOdvw48PeikLFuZOKNebDwDQCBheeOADXzeRkS-wru-dtLQ6BPp8fMpvOikVXyZrVKv3sAY-HZDTeRAjYj_hdJFSbG5tfdmLgqm6B1mPduzJII3PoZJjyxK57ONThtio1c8j7MgF6H_F71LE0MVXiob1gLLz9KjqQ3BZXSgyeZ5Vd9jRJiUS4okJVxvcznmL15iwRhKW2i-tNwVuod8aaTb8ZWgBKy_PbNZxdsYGe7dkutEuq_SigRQffe4DVXECupBx7rpR1_rjMXZgK9HaFhYGv-2Gq4-2aeEQXxUSou7o_E0ZntBwAaSzO-x6RoXjoIaRhQ9ALIKZ4aLDibrxsnrXQCBWmy4E2QGIbDylhsNAkvkYxGMb7qK-dEyd7Nj7j7ae4%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. Hillsdale's goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dea8c618dc3431a85dd264613ddf14c&_e=SB5KO8QIqQa4GQak66Nj9FhaKr2mjR6t9CZzrNYOdvw48PeikLFuZOKNebDwDQCBheeOADXzeRkS-wru-dtLQ6BPp8fMpvOikVXyZrVKv3sAY-HZDTeRAjYj_hdJFSbG5tfdmLgqm6B1mPduzJII3PoZJjyxK57ONThtio1c8j7MgF6H_F71LE0MVXiob1gLLz9KjqQ3BZXSgyeZ5Vd9jRJiUS4okJVxvcznmL15iwRhKW2i-tNwVuod8aaTb8ZWgBKy_PbNZxdsYGe7dkutEtgaJ8U3DUgi8uLKX1zoa7wSZIG_OYb9O5FdT_exiJ1b7PNzsPhsYXB38ZTspFDzrD2fx2BQHMy6aTRLCHzZPFNrvRPuHJ_TuYwnWA56RkX2YSrFh2r1jL0P8oDssOVzKu9ahDyG2g76yi3potBotPs%3D) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dea8c618dc3431a85dd264613ddf14c&_e=SB5KO8QIqQa4GQak66Nj9FhaKr2mjR6t9CZzrNYOdvw48PeikLFuZOKNebDwDQCBheeOADXzeRkS-wru-dtLQ6BPp8fMpvOikVXyZrVKv3sAY-HZDTeRAjYj_hdJFSbG5tfdmLgqm6B1mPduzJII3PoZJjyxK57ONThtio1c8j7MgF6H_F71LE0MVXiob1gLLz9KjqQ3BZXSgyeZ5Vd9jRJiUS4okJVxvcznmL15iwRhKW2i-tNwVuod8aaTb8ZWgBKy_PbNZxdsYGe7dkutEhQ9pA88A8reNj417qkMcczCNxG8r22VSQmBv--JvJ7i8ieTH-sb0gWEFNG0liY9VDVf6EBWeRlHTv5z61oKPzRvtjbG0T1CUC8q7A9pbFRwFjtwYiWSIl96CmlKcpwW24wOOjCnbDTWpC-894JMecg%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Andrew Lorinser
subject: What happened at Pride Fest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
The response at Pride Fest yesterday was remarkable. Volunteers, my wife, and I worked a booth on behalf of my dad, Bob Lorinser for US Congress. We had conversations with hundreds of voters, and the support from the LGBTQ community and its allies was reciprocal and overwhelming. We felt the love!
However, my favorite moment occurred after our campaign had finished canvassing.
drbob.me/aboutbob [drbob.me/aboutbob]
CONTRIBUTE [drbob.me/aboutbob]
Friends,
Picture it: From a distance, I watched Bob Lorinser, veteran Mst. Sgt. Blair Anderson and another dad standing behind the crowd, sipping on their beers and supporting their children and grandchildren as everyone enjoyed a captivating performance by a local band.
That simple act of presence reminded me of the times when all the hockey dads congregated behind the glass at games when I was a Squirt. They would stand proudly, uplifting their children and showing they cared about their lives.
Or, when my dad came to my first local music gig. He didn't know the words to the songs, and he didn't realize the garageband musical masterpieces for what they were, but, nevertheless, he was there.
Showing up matters.
That's exactly what he intends to do for all of us when elected - do what our current Congressman won't do. Show up.
Just like later on in the evening when the dads volunteered to serve beer at the beer tent. One of their happy customers found me in the crowd, leaned over and exclaimed,
"Andrew, your dad is slaying it right now!"
"We've come so far. I can't imagine getting to be your niece and saying, 'My grandpa volunteered at the beer tent at Pride Fest.' Some people might not consider this the typical 'Dad crowd,' but he's a breath of fresh air. We need to elect more people like Dr. Bob."
Friends, to achieve that, we need to propel our grassroots fundraising efforts. Your donations, big or small, make a significant difference in our outreach abilities. We are fostering communities where everyone is seen, heard, and valued.
Thank you for your continued support, and happy Pride!
-Andrew
Andrew Lorinser
Grassroots Outreach
Bob Lorinser for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
andrew@votedrbob.com
906.250.2728
CONTRIBUTE NOW [drbob.me/aboutbob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

clean_body: [] The response at Pride Fest yesterday was remarkable. Volunteers, my wife, and I worked a booth on behalf of my dad, Bob Lorinser for US Congress. We had conversations with hundreds of voters, and the support from the LGBTQ community and its allies was reciprocal and overwhelming. We felt the love! However, my favorite moment occurred after our campaign had finished canvassing. drbob.me/aboutbob [drbob.me/aboutbob] CONTRIBUTE [drbob.me/aboutbob] Friends, Picture it: From a distance, I watched Bob Lorinser, veteran Mst. Sgt. Blair Anderson and another dad standing behind the crowd, sipping on their beers and supporting their children and grandchildren as everyone enjoyed a captivating performance by a local band. That simple act of presence reminded me of the times when all the hockey dads congregated behind the glass at games when I was a Squirt. They would stand proudly, uplifting their children and showing they cared about their lives. Or, when my dad came to my first local music gig. He didn't know the words to the songs, and he didn't realize the garageband musical masterpieces for what they were, but, nevertheless, he was there. Showing up matters. That's exactly what he intends to do for all of us when elected - do what our current Congressman won't do. Show up. Just like later on in the evening when the dads volunteered to serve beer at the beer tent. One of their happy customers found me in the crowd, leaned over and exclaimed, "Andrew, your dad is slaying it right now!" "We've come so far. I can't imagine getting to be your niece and saying, 'My grandpa volunteered at the beer tent at Pride Fest.' Some people might not consider this the typical 'Dad crowd,' but he's a breath of fresh air. We need to elect more people like Dr. Bob." Friends, to achieve that, we need to propel our grassroots fundraising efforts. Your donations, big or small, make a significant difference in our outreach abilities. We are fostering communities where everyone is seen, heard, and valued. Thank you for your continued support, and happy Pride! -Andrew Andrew Lorinser Grassroots Outreach Bob Lorinser for Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 andrew@votedrbob.com 906.250.2728 CONTRIBUTE NOW [drbob.me/aboutbob] [] Or, send a check to Friends of Dr. Bob PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

name: Marco Rubio
subject: a jelly doughnut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)

Friend,

I can't tell you how much it means to me that you opened this. Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these messages from me?

I do have to ask a quick favor of you - I'm simply asking you to read this all the way through. If you finish reading this and you still think a $1 donation doesn't matter, then I want to just say **[thank you for hearing me out.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)**

While only about 25% of our friends are opening messages from me and my team, **[only about 1%](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)** will go the extra mile by donating! I'm not exaggerating when I say this, friend, conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires that I can call on to hit these goals. **[I rely on the couple of bucks that hard-working Americans receiving these messages can afford to give me from time to time.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)**

If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit - even just $1 - we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' _MASSIVE_ campaign coffers.

**[I'll be honest...](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~) **

The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit of support we can get if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. If we're going to stay on pace to reach all of our goals, I truly need your help.

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)

**[I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a single cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a jelly doughnut. The Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my next crucial Goal.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)**

**[☕CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A CUP OF COFFEE☕](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)**

_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether. _

We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to work for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I **[need](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)** patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

**[But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can afford before midnight.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)**

**[DONATE TODAY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JIqc6m3DFzrR24FU7s6EIQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoSCDUP0T-~)**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Do you know about Joe Biden’s Executive Order 14019?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
URGENT: Biden's new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden's personal "Get-Out-The-Vote" machine.

|
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonxD2t3v0NUYAprhNgAeGibO_FQ4DFb-CtgC0E_K0Hw6CARcoZWEsHJNaFah2g5Td-bcCe6ZlnjmoQy_hrHaWBoY3WO4ZDgBzHlL_3uQoCUJ94aS6thfSni9d6N9xQ9abkHEJtHMoFf231Qr_GOEiO_bELi9qawb9oybrTzfxO239Q%3D%3D)
Friend,

**URGENT: Biden 's new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden's personal "Get-Out-The-Vote" machine.**

While courts may take up the case, here's what I fear the most...

Republicans in Congress do not have the willpower to stop this unprecedented and unconstitutional use of our government to interfere with our elections in 2024. Republicans are already behind the Democratic machine to turn out votes, and this will only increase their efforts.

No wonder Biden and his campaign are "increasingly confident" they will win despite bad polling and collapsing approval numbers.

I'm not going to sit aside and do nothing. And neither should you.

Here's my solution:

**I am directing Turning Point PAC to fund the largest ballot-chasing army ever in key electoral states. The success of this operation will determine the White House and help elect President Donald J. Trump.**

Here's how you can help:

[As a personal favor to me, can you send an urgent donation today of $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to fund ballot chasing in key states? Please select an amount below to donate:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonxD2t3v0NUYAprhNgAeGibO85hQPEufdzVLMpcPskKNgYDhVWVE8aF2mMmVk20L_ulqDFOwQBIAumQoYeljaNtykwkBxW4rrXt0nBfaPTwLkQbLuuBcUN7LT_FG7uTpk6EyKuF1acUdeiw6dm7ju-RYDWLDhHMRBzwrSaFlxvJ51w%3D%3D)

[$250](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonznXgYbQeEQ7O83gpx6Xeac-ybYIEarnfomgWJgTS-y2uPmqHl4hgkgs3oAT6S16Prdm2FJNFqBbDJ9qtLI32Ny6sOckRIiSThxulbucEi_aPUIpnvnWyj039fBNXZbs3gR6bgeR0xSqLwv63zs3W8MFFIPf3sUZfGnc9oft9afAUO62LYzLdiC8qhPnw35nlE%3D)

[$500](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonzUmdidl-4Su27XFH3Q3CHWWG4gzJwA90_iWiA4JVMqR8vlEjy8xZRoqiZV06nvJca_MqCjvfdANRZKStJw3yCEax_CazZAHdR-cfb4TJlsiTRy535vThWUr8kln504LCKVfj6gYSrTleYPbqqWAtnbvJWiNUA0p4zjyBdR4TjjjjXvqwBhzPjc-XePZ1j1GEY%3D)

[$1,000](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonzZosTwSz_kjCYfcPMWD3-0zzFuvM3ENZ3UnxnjqGs43uQ7-QAVZep5XYXG6V0qy5AOKFc8uK8SApJszUXKpVhHdJZPSM_DRDwFbvs7i9Sc0ONW3lbFZKmwrQ-gkQq-tRvR1-wsZRvSFmuHnNFTq5C2bQKW2Pz0sXXb0-oNyS0uUgsIoM6JT6LVY8ORQJCdIQU%3D)

[Other](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonxD2t3v0NUYAprhNgAeGibOBbLtlQKgXcESsgJkXV9c7LzFFnLUxfTDl63IsIe4l9HzQMDrspkNfI8uA680Jq9bi0Vm0vRaCMY3qH-g_ysroBZV0OwSrfHsPfgpuNFJ2C1przhUIjFRylHf9mfW4O95KhVGq69J9azreazCQebs5g%3D%3D)
Even if you can't give $20.24, please consider chipping in $10 or ANY amount you can generously contribute.

My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to fund ballot-chasing operations in key electoral states to win back the White House--and take back our country.

To be frank, I don't trust the DC Establishment and Uniparty to do this important GOTV work. It's going to require organizations like Turning Point PAC to do the hard work. And I am up for the challenge if you can join me today in supporting our movement.

[Please rush your support today by donating $20.24 or more and help us win back the White House >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6aea4e1a07914207b139f7f4e60e6bd6&_e=AfJHO14hhL70Fu6I_dXWaywzyzAx9cLFcyUqVe1gc-LNOufi7Drp-tTgoVvk40pVcW-qhI005160g8JhbZvwOYAfhzdvy4X_UxgmOLNaonxD2t3v0NUYAprhNgAeGibOEcdMm4v5bNm2JsLx7Vi7ZPbLj8OPYRS9acYSWFE-X6O0zUXecTCkkPPiz50jdmKFN2fIGZ0may2Y2kTMyWvjy53a98RVNd5UCGca39RSVqUSuLCERrOieufLmjcuz25XSTM_1_ej4ewqj1sI-SbkJg%3D%3D)

We need to win in November. This isn't a football game. This is for our civilization.

Thank you,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g. corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidate and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g. foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Let's change course before it’s too late
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWBI-e6WEN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBI-e6WEN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Good day, fellow American.

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation.

Your leadership and knowledge are needed today…

We need more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and
patriotism.

The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen!

That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand

WHAT the Constitution says;
HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed.

These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school.

You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.

That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans, and this initiative starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country.

So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63264983:WBI-e6WEN:m:3:2627245898:687039DD9A0F97ABCF74FABF2B1F419A:r

For our children,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWBI-e6WEN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBI-e6WEN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-75425352925-echo3-FD6942B72AFDBFF35FF64F66BD101542@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

|
