| Peter, **Bill is LIVE NOW for an exclusive broadcast of the Common Ground Podcast, **directly from the vibrant Ria Mar Restaurant and Bar in South River, New Jersey.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO JOIN A LIVE NEW EPISODE OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/19d932a5ca3625deaaee8c68c71111d0/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqkhSRUNlGKtaEiUIlXpqazJlC4mm2Eza7pK3r2rFU8t9DKX-f7vZ-YEjEooTgqI4YuPYRiBBxpzSRIVT2rFIr9sw_59EAUelFLtZ7o2BPHp1_ANuKSi_sADtoQOeV2NJ2mynL1nyTJ1JAntOv7pGYY3z3QxTjLouj_FWEmeHpy7gZi1wfNFhXRX8VqXjv9kpib2_bZte7Y2bHbYy-vKp1LYUjb8eB4PL9nT_IiHN7UzFad3ivR8_zz6WA3tNths82AtXJUgQlVc_5Si_SnsvgGaXnHY)
---
|
---
This will be an engaging episode filled with local charm and special guests from the community. [**Click here to tune into the LIVE new episode now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/322276d7282ecba39b2bd6295366dcd7/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqkhiYINSLFWNCQVkap4KmsypYvJZtjMmq6Sd-9qxVMLvcxlvv_7mTkDoxKKkwJi-OJTGEbggcZckkTFk1qxyK_bcNAPosCDUqrDTNeGID7_Gr4D11Q06HvAltAhb6vxJE0Ws_csWaSOJKFdxz89w_Dumb6Okwy67k8xVpKnR-duIGZt8HJRId1VvNal4z-ZqYl9v23bnq0Nmz328rryqRS2lA0_XcZomT3PT3jcqb2pOH1QpOeHl8eP1dBug802D9bCVQkiVMXtTynan8LuG5h0cdY=) **Don't miss out as Bill explores the rich history of South River, particularly its surprising connection to NFL greatness, and discusses key issues facing our community today with the very people who know it best.**
---
| **Featuring Special Guests:**
* **Mayor Peter Guindi:** Hear from South River’s mayor about the latest community developments.
* **Rui Baptista:** Join the conversation with the owner of Ria Mar, discussing the history of this beloved local establishment.
* **Chief of Police Mark Tinitigan:** Get insights on public safety and community engagement from our chief of police.

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 09, 2024

Biden campaign falls
flat on it's face after being caught in this humiliating act

The Joe Biden/Kamala Harris reelection campaign is a
disaster. They're making devastating mistakes at every turn.

And the Biden campaign falls flat
on it's face after being caught in this humiliating act.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden was rocked
to his core after losing the support of this crucial ally

Biden's reelection
goals are starting to look more like a dream than reality. But
now that dream is about to turn into a nightmare.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris scared
straight after being ambushed by a crazed mob

The vice president is
certainly an unpopular politician who many Americans dislike.
Both one group of radical protestors are dead set on making an
actual enemy out of her.
➞ Continue Reading

Mitch McConnell
blindsided Senate Democrats with an unexpected announcement

McConnell has said he
will retire in 2027. But now he's shaking things up with a major
surprise.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Letter to President Trump
subject: Sign this beautiful letter of love and support to stand with Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're sending President Trump a beautiful letter to make sure he feels our love and support. Will you co-sign it?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

God bless President Trump!

_**During this dark time for our great nation, we must surround President Trump with the LOVE and JOY of our MAGA movement. **_

So we wrote this big, beautiful letter to express our affection and gratitude for all he has done for us and America.

But we still need **1 Million more MAGA patriots** to add their names to this letter before we can deliver it.

[**Will you show President Trump your love right now and sign your name to this beautiful letter?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f2cc4cef47d40179cca5e041e647297&_e=0R-mLeJ0AnpqXMdhm-WqCft4oTFQlm21YCtpUpxVSY1FdDMJbS7x4QAgJHHQwerbDBwumw5ffNFSI2-2hLVUzUPb_TVsap_mv6HPXESwT44Z8seDD0jeYEp3oQQF9KNGW2FhC__42AzFza0AZ7HQ9BrkFigNuhUX2-2eMJDtlaT3jkq5DtzYCALr6IDPbYtMeyaAfhhl8eT4JZns1ELGBIicrkjuI1yKEEoP1zQS-TI_tf8GxPY0AzQunGzHLsBFB23rOFxWwUFhyFr14K23aphF0dG4g9Lpn2Q91iA5xFA-trM_ArqXjrPbifBV88XfvByzaBCFazkq4FiZleTsk0t62At9evPDmoooRtQ3dWzy8EuqoR4zrT-Boqhj5btcQ-8M6LS0ufDkgCOGodVWNeza9DiL5Fa7Rth8v3nwg7lSje1O3OJAR-pW_h_ne0q2sYhfrSsg7ObQ5lxs1v2oWw%3D%3D "Will you show President Trump your love right now and sign your name to this beautiful letter? ")

_We will win this war for our great nation and we will win it with LOVE!_

---
| | | [READ AND SIGN THE LETTER ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f2cc4cef47d40179cca5e041e647297&_e=0R-mLeJ0AnpqXMdhm-WqCft4oTFQlm21YCtpUpxVSY1FdDMJbS7x4QAgJHHQwerbDBwumw5ffNFSI2-2hLVUzUPb_TVsap_mv6HPXESwT44Z8seDD0jeYEp3oQQF9KNGW2FhC__42AzFza0AZ7HQ9BrkFigNuhUX2-2eMJDtlaT3jkq5DtzYCALr6IDPbYtMeyaAfhhl8eT4JZns1ELGBIicrkjuI1yKEEoP1zQS-TI_tf8GxPY0AzQunGzHLsBFB23rOFxWwUFhyFr14K23aphF0dG4g9Lpn2Q91iA5xFA-trM_ArqXjrPbifBV88XfwfzOtLx3E3X82kEBkGGAIrfK8vl_DUeXrj19V61dwDW6aVVLxV3PqDjQ_2uSWIa3Mrh_SFiet-xdCKvFUvzoWZV3hQg_YU0y7V1qJUWl43LdP49SPy_ZIJpHEvOlroDkKVwNyEt3JhlpXFLV9bB4dw%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| |
Dear President Trump,

God bless you!

During this dark time for America, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love and support.

So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU!

Thank you for protecting us from the Radical Left hordes that want to destroy our country and our movement.

Thank you for never surrendering to these evil forces that want to destroy America.

And thank you for sacrificing yourself for us.

We know that they are after all of us, but you are selflessly standing in their way.

Thats why:

WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU.

WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU.

AND WE WILL NEVER ABANDON YOU.

The Radical Left may have won this battle, but we will win the war.

Because the real verdict will come on November 5th!

During this dark time in America, I hope you feel the love of the millions of patriotic Americans who have your back.

And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to doing everything we can to defeat Joe Biden in November.

Justice will be served. We will make sure of it.

God bless you President Trump, and God help America.

Sincerely,

{YOUR SIGNATURE}

clean_body: We're sending President Trump a beautiful letter to make sure he feels our love and support. Will you co-sign it? | | | | Friend, God bless President Trump! During this dark time for our great nation, we must surround President Trump with the LOVE and JOY of our MAGA movement. So we wrote this big, beautiful letter to express our affection and gratitude for all he has done for us and America. But we still need 1 Million more MAGA patriots to add their names to this letter before we can deliver it. "Will you show President Trump your love right now and sign your name to this beautiful letter? " We will win this war for our great nation and we will win it with LOVE! | | | "Generic Button" | | | | Dear President Trump, God bless you! During this dark time for America, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love and support. So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU! Thank you for protecting us from the Radical Left hordes that want to destroy our country and our movement. Thank you for never surrendering to these evil forces that want to destroy America. And thank you for sacrificing yourself for us. We know that they are after all of us, but you are selflessly standing in their way. Thats why: WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU. WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU. AND WE WILL NEVER ABANDON YOU. The Radical Left may have won this battle, but we will win the war. Because the real verdict will come on November 5th! During this dark time in America, I hope you feel the love of the millions of patriotic Americans who have your back. And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to doing everything we can to defeat Joe Biden in November. Justice will be served. We will make sure of it. God bless you President Trump, and God help America. body:
Here's The Plan

| [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a3b064f0eef547b59ffae6e2d3c3595d&_e=FFePKDBcw_uyNjuHG1KRvDznY_nE2d_bG3DeaeAtFsdE0rnr56bLBR-lyCl9n0QyOkqwFVOh1np74fPSSJBFDUTB1Fef2qx1QFlbek-rkCwEyNocEJ7FP_u6sqgtJLDRzytHzzPC-ry8dtPvstOLbwqAC4FC33ukG1ZVVxsvCrQMhhNX5cPB3nQUt52rnWlmCc-NAqauEZHSXMZQGvf2stF0uhiBnp3FAdTk_KdxS7v6R_z__IzokxsnXxO8UQEIxygsSADVh2TGUnTPG3k8mR5fqdxopW9pmV37on9NnoT8QURDgEwerEFbdoifmlibII10zoTZs0QjRDeXfrkwE3geGbZFOPwiRjPTDCt0Fo6jXIhIp25NGcpEnkGdO-bwAKQ3qYeCRlH4RNZHh3KoZNjGm9OIVyePsMUhanJpyVjcXcRcWOD3wHt0U2nNcCNX)
---
Friend,

I'd hate to say this to you, mainly because I know I've been reaching out a lot - but things have been as dark as coffin air. But I'm betting that you can help me out.

We had a three-point plan, a carefully crafted strategy to try and out-maneuver the Woke Left.

> 1\. Rally grassroots support in preparation for the Democrats' wave of dark money spending.
>
> 2\. Increase communication with our supporters with daily updates on our fight against the Woke Left.
>
> 3\. (The Most important part) Raise $500,000 in small-dollar donations to jumpstart the next wave of Common Sense leaders and mobilize our supporters to ensure victory on Election Day.

We're days away from our strategy meeting, and I've just been informed that our strategy is working. We've got the Left on their hind legs - but our plan is missing the most important component...

We haven't raised nearly enough money to launch our Election Day push. We're way behind schedule, and we need your help ASAP.

Our grassroots army is on standby, waiting for the green light to start this final push.

I'm told that we're so close to our goal. If we can get just 250 patriots to help, we would need just $50 from supporters like yourself to implement our plans.

Friend, can you contribute $50 in the next 5 minutes to help us put Common Sense FIRST and kick the Radical Wokers to the curb?

name: JR
subject: My decision to say YES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
how I first got involved in politics
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86555079/478264930/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3914-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjAxNTA3ZS01ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6SKSdT3JalQP-a_TaXuzXW-WBO555XJZb7nNzoGJoc=)
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend?
While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today.** **In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country.** ** And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**
**My ****far-right opponent**** set a new GOP fundraising record to defeat me, and recent polling shows me tied in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you ****– if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love – ****will**** you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86555080/478264931/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3914-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjAxNTA3ZS01ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6SKSdT3JalQP-a_TaXuzXW-WBO555XJZb7nNzoGJoc=)

clean_body: how I first got involved in politics | | | = Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend? While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today. In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it. Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. But I need your help. My far-right opponent set a new GOP fundraising record to defeat me, and recent polling shows me tied in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Jacky | | = A note from Sen. | | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=fd46ddc4e0824b4682246d43f97b4d68&_e=Ys6r9YaF_WCj7yWJ8laErqG-_q6Eswd3zsUTexlBXgDYZZtSv8KPCya66TgTDt6mCBeuoKoMZsyCqa8bZuVs0RQ2JkeJeMOMv1C5kB7MNgdaZqgFUTMOuPNpeB3k0QAbuZ4jEYiEEYMUtPHDiFOuN53dtpW3AweE0OYQRGkMM1i6KBVL074X-L3xOS139tx5u8S0nh-PD_7QRACnAaWgypeXKSQDbFm66nld6VmdpN9hIr0OHo44aAEBRwNGb66zNtxBuh278wLz18LgAZMAmlkh1KbaOXjUYKdzlop-FLmHkk6mwRYarzFgb054JGPJnxKjYmWXsj3gXgh0R4_AIijGLVD1_qVK5VZxeLXS_wnwSCRMHg4lPO4yX1PMH1bU-GPqUf84SqMcnEXin0OyyA%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=fd46ddc4e0824b4682246d43f97b4d68&_e=Ys6r9YaF_WCj7yWJ8laErqG-_q6Eswd3zsUTexlBXgDYZZtSv8KPCya66TgTDt6mCBeuoKoMZsyCqa8bZuVs0RQ2JkeJeMOMv1C5kB7MNgdaZqgFUTMOuPNpeB3k0QAbuZ4jEYiEEYMUtPHDiFOuN53dtpW3AweE0OYQRGkMM1i6KBVL074X-L3xOS139tx5u8S0nh-PD_7QRACnAaWgypeXKSQDbFm66nld6VmdpN9hIr0OHo44aAEBRwNGb66zSsTmMXoX-lKjgOgLZLsl2UDe0IAqsAgTgbqnRe08cTiHjiQ71c0xrqhxzVQSDCJFU8NBV4jyeC9Yuv6yfe-Lb-doexhM9ipQAuFBFmt0UrfoALT0BxG5J81PWvv-hKZHB94qlDZr3VvbTZPsA99t6g%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you! | | | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of $25 million in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. Please don't delay. | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Mother of Suicide Victim Sues Delaware County | Normandy: 80 Years Later ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=73f9a8640b&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Mother of prison suicide victim sues Delaware County and prison contractors](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dc4bcb3b04&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_

The mother of Andrew Little, a 34-year old man who took his own life while in custody at the Delaware County prison two years ago today, filed suit against the county as well as numerous other parties, seeking damages for her son’s death because of “deliberate indifference” and “medical negligence” to Little’s mental state.

The federal suit, filed Friday in the Eastern District of Pennsylvania, also names Wellpath and the GEO group as defendants, as well as ten corrections officers. The lawsuit argues that because Little had been in the prison before, the administrators were aware or should have been aware of his history of mental illness.

**Why It Matters**. Meanwhile, tensions between the county management and the rank and file have been constantly rising since the takeover. After complaining about increasing dangers and sinking morale for more than a year, a group of correctional officers recently [launched](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4bdffef1ff&e=b7b3eddce2) a no-confidence [petition](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=71c0fcdd4b&e=b7b3eddce2) against Warden Laura Williams. As of this publishing, the [petition](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8ad260c233&e=b7b3eddce2) is nearing 500 signatures, although Broad + Liberty is unable to verify how many of those signatures are from current employees of the county.

In 2017, the prison [settled a lawsuit for $7 million](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1c1029aaa8&e=b7b3eddce2) over the death of Janene Wallace, who took her own life two years earlier. Wallace’s death became a rallying point of the campaign to deprivatize the GWHCF.

**Quotable**. The lawsuit argues that because Little had been in the prison before, the administrators were aware or should have been aware of his history of mental illness. “Despite such knowledge, Defendants ignored, if not exacerbated, Little’s obvious suicidal propensities and failed to take necessary and available precautions which would have saved his life,” the suit says. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=da2f2f66c6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Looking back at Normandy, eighty years later](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=63581104d9&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Richard Koenig_
Apart from the ashes I scattered upon Latimore Creek, the stream in Central Pennsylvania where my father first took me trout fishing, his remains rest at Florida National Cemetery. I remember the long cortege our family joined the day we arrived there — car after car, the line trailing slowly when it moved at all, other families also waiting their turns at one of the shelters where a brief ceremony would honor their dead.

Until then it had not struck me how suddenly the veterans of World War II were leaving the rest of us. On that day, however, Feb. 27, 2004, I was seeing before my eyes the departure of a generation to whom our debt is incalculable. Long library shelves are filled with accounts of their sacrifice and their valor, and yet many of their individual stories are surely gone, never to be known and told.

So it is with Louis Richard Koenig. Upon his return from Europe, Dad just wanted to get the war behind him and hurry on. He went though Gettysburg College on the GI bill in three years, an MBA program at New York University in one year. Hardly ever did he talk to me about the war, and it seemed he didn’t want a lot of questions.

I have nevertheless tried to piece together bits of his experience from the little he told me and others, together with histories and military records. His is one story among those of the more than 100,000 men in the Allied forces who 80 years ago landed on the beaches of Normandy during D-Day.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0169bd57ac&e=b7b3eddce2)

|
---
|
### **3. Don’t let politicians & lobbyists mess with YOUR credit card!**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a0068cbb24&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
_Sponsored Partner Content_ – Electronic Payments Coalition
| **DON’T LET BIG BUSINESS AND POLITICIANS TAKE AWAY YOUR CHOICE!**

Electronic payments allow for the speed, the convenience, and the fraud protection you’ve come to expect and enjoy. Changing the system puts all that at risk.

Draft proposals are being promoted by certain interest groups in Pennsylvania that would prohibit financial institutions from collecting interchange on the sales tax portion of credit and debit card transactions. Interchange is the fee merchants pay to transmit their payments electronically.

Guard Your Card and tell politicians that Pennsylvania families lose when they choose.

Learn more [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b10861277e&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Andy Bloom: The Democrats and their unconventional means](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b137843cf&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Verdict or vengeance?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7cc55ec875&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: When politics comes between friends](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=180168b745&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: School choice yields high returns for vulnerable students](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2f2c3c36c4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Trump campaign opens first Pennsylvania office in Northeast Philly](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7c3246870b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: In Philly, even the cops get robbed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1c2e5273d0&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
You may have noticed this already, but President Joe Biden isn’t what he used to be. This week, the _Wall Street Journal_ took a hard look at the question of our aging chief executive and, in [a deeply reported piece](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9f0255a5ce&e=b7b3eddce2), found quite a few people willing to go on the record about their interactions with him.

The prognosis isn’t great. “Some who have worked with him,” the authors write, “including Democrats and some who have known him back to his time as vice president, described a president who appears slower now, someone who has both good moments and bad ones.” Administration officials counter that Biden is as sharp as a tack when no one’s around. Opponents say that if this were true, wouldn’t he be out and about more often, showing off his totally functional brain?

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd The mother of Andrew Little, a 34-year old man who took his own life while in custody at the Delaware County prison two years ago today, filed suit against the county as well as numerous other parties, seeking damages for her son’s death because of “deliberate indifference” and “medical negligence” to Little’s mental state. The federal suit, filed Friday in the Eastern District of Pennsylvania, also names Wellpath and the GEO group as defendants, as well as ten corrections officers. The lawsuit argues that because Little had been in the prison before, the administrators were aware or should have been aware of his history of mental illness. Why It Matters. Meanwhile, tensions between the county management and the rank and file have been constantly rising since the takeover. After complaining about increasing dangers and sinking morale for more than a year, a group of correctional officers recently a no-confidence against Warden Laura Williams. As of this publishing, the is nearing 500 signatures, although Broad + Liberty is unable to verify how many of those signatures are from current employees of the county. In 2017, the prison over the death of Janene Wallace, who took her own life two years earlier. Wallace’s death became a rallying point of the campaign to deprivatize the GWHCF. Quotable. The lawsuit argues that because Little had been in the prison before, the administrators were aware or should have been aware of his history of mental illness. “Despite such knowledge, Defendants ignored, if not exacerbated, Little’s obvious suicidal propensities and failed to take necessary and available precautions which would have saved his life,” the suit says. | | 2. By Richard Koenig Apart from the ashes I scattered upon Latimore Creek, the stream in Central Pennsylvania where my father first took me trout fishing, his remains rest at Florida National Cemetery. I remember the long cortege our family joined the day we arrived there — car after car, the line trailing slowly when it moved at all, other families also waiting their turns at one of the shelters where a brief ceremony would honor their dead. _And Democrats weaponized these headlines to go on an all -out [_**BLITZ**_](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3dd7fbe031340b39b3ca38181c62803&_e=oTNJm-vPPY7UZthzzb-q-b7ldYjjZ1ovl4UNPAGauPK5entWjLkweZylNliQOsUZZ334QBSp8wyV8M1I4oZMvHRqME3jfLgqTil6XOh1hf31mOKdxp-X7RhAPUehb29jUC3VQXrZBmO240iCWUqRZ8sEU20vkkq4O_GgCF3BEd8tQaizViyYs-JBXAMXogPGqUHnOhNwAV4egGzz_60sNNXOxMAXsmt-0FWPJRQyg213zDr4lzoh3iGGkD_7RUNL7-B5dPyA_i8gVDNuHgQWQ1fvFvihAd7gqPXOGDfXx5xXvz9GBE69VUVrHvMUY3Mr4qRHKLqhkiwZo_utw7OpBSF05Kbt1x1btQSzYX-lSQUNdkNaJhbVdUfSUy331pCr7gWiHW5VeKMhYBmNzHek3d6UfhmI2GcpkvwGIObxdhgBKE_yThuwafMBee84BQ5WZEps8NpWYHVrvtTUym4x1IF95nsIdgUdaexRdloK7P1TKX5b8xNpAUI_xYUfM0i4vti7dGkhe71DXkzrqCAATndgX-3k8TcbAdNUfqQMt9k%3D) of attacks against our America First candidates._

But now, we have to level with you, Fellow Patriot, we've never been more worried...

[**_NEW polling just indicated that 10% of Republicans are now WALKING AWAY!_ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3dd7fbe031340b39b3ca38181c62803&_e=oTNJm-vPPY7UZthzzb-q-b7ldYjjZ1ovl4UNPAGauPK5entWjLkweZylNliQOsUZZ334QBSp8wyV8M1I4oZMvHRqME3jfLgqTil6XOh1hf31mOKdxp-X7RhAPUehb29jUC3VQXrZBmO240iCWUqRZ8sEU20vkkq4O_GgCF3BEd8tQaizViyYs-JBXAMXogPGqUHnOhNwAV4egGzz_60sNNXOxMAXsmt-0FWPJRQyg213zDr4lzoh3iGGkD_7RUNL7-B5dPyA_i8gVDNuHgQWQ1fvFvihAd7gqPXOGDfXx5xXvz9GBE69VUVrHvMUY3Mr4qRHKLqhkiwZo_utw7OpBSF05Kbt1x1btQSzYX-lSQUNdkNaJhbVdUfSUy331pCr7gWiHW5VeKMhYBmNzHek3Q78kfZCS6RFztKHdWnkg29o4-s0nbN4MNDfxdTn1LeoWaNO5kSI7NlfdXViEzL0yykSRHouHdxBA_TEKZ125Y0KrQ2fN9xYu5W55oVRR7O8EpUX1K5loIFSgnKHgMFqQcwZ9NPWJYH7bpW5bIDOfoY%3D)
If ultimately true, this would spell DISASTER for our Party.

_That's why our[**Voter Verification Initiative**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3dd7fbe031340b39b3ca38181c62803&_e=oTNJm-vPPY7UZthzzb-q-b7ldYjjZ1ovl4UNPAGauPK5entWjLkweZylNliQOsUZZ334QBSp8wyV8M1I4oZMvHRqME3jfLgqTil6XOh1hf31mOKdxp-X7RhAPUehb29jUC3VQXrZBmO240iCWUqRZ8sEU20vkkq4O_GgCF3BEd8tQaizViyYs-JBXAMXogPGqUHnOhNwAV4egGzz_60sNNXOxMAXsmt-0FWPJRQyg213zDr4lzoh3iGGkD_7RUNL7-B5dPyA_i8gVDNuHgQWQ1fvFvihAd7gqPXOGDfXx5xXvz9GBE69VUVrHvMUY3Mr4qRHKLqhkiwZo_utw7OpBSF05Kbt1x1btQSzYX-lSQUNdkNaJhbVdUfSUy331pCr7gWiHW5VeKMhYBmNzHek3dVS15C0Z0jXz2mzM_M2-W9-Pb6Fbz9zB0_yhJobDbsn5b3VxKhdK-cV1wkawMg00q1zcIBbeCqW2XWCg0CPjGRcfpVoBP9tpjZ6qJtI58ewqCqZi98h9XsvsyzmTACXVE-I6KUHP-FWL5ldWbpUb1Q%3D) has never been more critical. We need to _PROVE_ just how many patriots still stand behind this movement to save our country._

But with just HOURS to go until we have to close the books on the project, we saw that YOUR 2024 Voter Verification Questionnaire was still [**_INCOMPLETE!_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3dd7fbe031340b39b3ca38181c62803&_e=oTNJm-vPPY7UZthzzb-q-b7ldYjjZ1ovl4UNPAGauPK5entWjLkweZylNliQOsUZZ334QBSp8wyV8M1I4oZMvHRqME3jfLgqTil6XOh1hf31mOKdxp-X7RhAPUehb29jUC3VQXrZBmO240iCWUqRZ8sEU20vkkq4O_GgCF3BEd8tQaizViyYs-JBXAMXogPGqUHnOhNwAV4egGzz_60sNNXOxMAXsmt-0FWPJRQyg213zDr4lzoh3iGGkD_7RUNL7-B5dPyA_i8gVDNuHgQWQ1fvFvihAd7gqPXOGDfXx5xXvz9GBE69VUVrHvMUY3Mr4qRHKLqhkiwZo_utw7OpBSF05Kbt1x1btQSzYX-lSQUNdkNaJhbVdUfSUy331pCr7gWiHW5VeKMhYBmNzHek3SDRq-j_Fbb3qd9nxlUL4nXpfJFFl3OsMdHEPB0iGXvx98tjs5Dcm7fCoBG0ZdeYPz_fZQYAJRwyipInAyXTYCHdY0XgaoZClcDh64sFGsbXJUxdRriijfZvU2GOGGauoU-1e6KLHEyP6UAQqpJ_DF8%3D)

Peter,
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), **so be it.**
**I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else.**
[_**Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate — the last place Trump wants me to be — by splitting a contribution between Upset the Setup and my campaign of $3 or any amount you can spare.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86560938/478274227/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240609_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmZDFmZWY5LTYyMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ibbrXBbUku7O6t3laeOIhE37oldnWAc2-Tjg8HnKodA=)

clean_body: = Peter, Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it. And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), so be it. I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thanks for your support. This is an FEC fundraising deadline month, which means we're legally required to report our numbers when it ends.
This is a chance to show the strength of our team and to possibly keep some outside spending organizations who want to beat us OUT of this race.

|

The guilty verdict against President Trump changed everything.

The Democrats have made it clear. There is no level they won't stoop to in their quest for power. They convicted the former President, now leading Presidential candidate of phony crimes in a rigged trial. This is something you see in third-world banana republics, not the United States of America.

[**The only way to stop this is to make sure we have a MAGA sweep in November. We need to win the Presidency, the House, and the Senate. In order to do this, we've set a goal of 1,000 online donors by Friday at midnight. # JUNE EVENTS
MARK YOUR CALENDAR FOR THE EVENTS BELOW.
---
| We are excited that our dynamic Shelby County Republican Party Chairman Cary Vaughn, and Second Vice Chair Naser Fazlullah have already made commitments to purchase tables at the Douglass Lincoln Brunch. We also have commitments from many other supporters who understand the need to win this election.

With your help, Tennessee will have a delegation of 9 congressional members who will vote to advance President Trump's and the Republican agenda in 2025.

**[Get your ticket today by clicking HERE](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=94fe13bc40&e=9dd54a4530)** for the Douglas Lincoln Brunch on June 29, 2024, at 10:00am. Tickets are going fast.

Don't miss out on this great event on June 29, 2024, at the Southbrook Town Center in Whitehaven. This event is sponsored by the [Whitehaven Republican Club](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=f2080fd8a7&e=9dd54a4530), Melanie Mosley, president.

Chairman Cary E. Vaughn will also be a guest speaker at this great event.

You may purchase your secure ticket online via credit card or check.

Or you may mail your check to:
Bergmann for Congress Douglass Lincoln Brunch
4310 High Plains Road
Bartlett, TN 38135

---
|
# **_DOUGLAS LINCOLN BRUNCH_**
**June 29, 2024, 10:00am
Southbrook Town Center Banquet Hall
1212 E. Shelby Dr, Memphis, TN 38116**
**Come hear how two trailblazers overcame major obstacles in their lives to realize success, and you can, too.**

Our guest speaker is the former Washington County **Judge Joseph Wood**. He was elected by the Republican Party of Arkansas to serve as the Arkansas GOP Chairman and was backed by Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders. His role is similar to our own Tennessee GOP Chairman Scott Golden.

Chairman Wood was born in Chicago, Illinois. He earned a bachelor's degree from Iowa State University in 1987 and a graduate degree from Ecclesia College in 2016. Chairman Wood's career experience includes working as a County Judge and as the Arkansas Deputy Secretary of State.

Chairman Wood was not born into riches. For as long as he can remember, he always felt just a little bit different from the people around him. Adopted into a large family, at times he felt as a stranger growing up among siblings. Attending college in diversity-starved Iowa only reinforced how few black and brown faces there were to mirror his. Even his political philosophy — a conservative of color — earned him a place in an exclusive club that began in his 20s. Chairman Wood presents as a modern-day Frederick Douglass!

_**SPONSORS NEEDED**_
We are looking for sponsors to purchase tables to allow more Whitehaven residences, college students, and church leaders to attend this Brunch. Please help us spread the message of freedom and liberty to a community that has only received liberal messages year after year.

[RESERVE A TABLE HERE](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=dbbaa86a0c&e=9dd54a4530)

name: Bob Casey
subject: we can’t afford to fall behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Back-to-back polls show this race is tightening.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN)
Peter -- in a minute, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign, but first I wanted to explain why your donation matters right now.
**First,** a billionaire-funded super PAC raised a record-breaking $18 million last year, including a massive $10 million donation from just _one_ guy.
**Then,** that same super PAC started blanketing Pennsylvania’s airwaves with ads to prop up my opponent and flip this seat red.
**Now,** back-to-back polls show this race is tightening.
With Senate control hinging on this seat, we can’t afford to fall behind my Trump-endorsed opponent. But if the polls continue trending this way, that‘s exactly what could happen.
[**That’s why your support matters so much. Whatever you can give will help us stop these Wall Street billionaires from buying this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?refcode=em20240609-1&recurring=1&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240609-1-el&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240609-1-el&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240609-1-el&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240609-1-el&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240609-1-el&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240609-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240609-1&refcode2=3203_552475_xUQhTN&akid=3203%2E552475%2ExUQhTN)
---
In a race this consequential, every dollar matters, so thank you.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

Trump!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c48223788794bde8fb05a4d7cf82608&_e=UYPsDo83ZjW8gbZgci6cTOM9d86m2VdMd3keBQUL8KRyQeJylecp3dwkkZqBrRCPeC1934daiVjUN7iOVepqt3-9-CY55LjFWcGrNLV36jDVg6UDAtQi8srigCNUtuwQD7T8ec_hd7uCV4IS5FfNZY_IPnMPNBUkGj5d19W6EhhOV8QgfF1RSv_SUxNIqgAmicZyiA852WoHcqKkN-Tl5JBT-2iBkiTwqjXLdeLYMOkPqmsB9QfpLnyqN_4OWiIpMi3lhZL1dluRlTh64poJ03JLN9LEn64smBfHlKXQfZhHjOQrcluQBJBo89a-FYILYqFGfXN_jrQcKC1bMUc7VU4IA6OunfqC7JTa3rL2EH7g6mn6Ua6QzkoTgtKi0lOeEb-HDmOwNb7hHLqvMGfD5NhETBKuyjYFRJsKbqkI1V2SHpmT4QjsffRIfYzpz0tEGuvtMu8u8_9ZBuE2RorU0w5RZzxLvMCoG1xFhK9MllPxFhyKkwebXnqIp0JxxRmg)** Friend, Angus King just announced he’s running for reelection and asked us if we could share the following message with you. He’s an important ally of Sen. Hassan's in the U.S. Senate, so I hope you’ll take a minute to read his message and [**split a contribution between our campaigns today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86566966/478287849/815818154?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2619-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzOTk5MS02ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q17HRHXVpllMEG-sTI3woEYDDSJoYplrC_yYvkHZQTU=)

Team Maggie
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Angus King**
Subject: Big news
| | | I just turned in a huge stack of petition signatures, which means I am officially running for reelection to the U.S. Senate!
---
I'm running for two main reasons:
1\. _We’re losing the middle in the Senate._
2\. _There’s a lot left to do._
**In a Congress and nation that is deeply partisan, my position as an Independent has helped bridge the divide.** And we’ve gotten some important things done in the last few years – the _CARES Act_ to send direct economic assistance to American families and businesses hurting during the COVID pandemic, the _Great American Outdoors Act_ to protect our public lands, the _PACT Act_ to expand benefits for our veterans, the $1.2 trillion _Bipartisan Infrastructure bill_ , and the _CHIPS and Science Act_ which has already resulted in an explosion of investment in bringing semiconductor manufacturing back home. All of these accomplishments were the result of bipartisan negotiation, debate, and compromise. And it’s that spirit of working together I'm afraid we’re losing.
Our work isn’t done. **From the unsustainable cost of prescription drugs to the unacceptable attacks on reproductive rights, our nation is grappling with serious and complex issues.**
**[I’m going to keep doing what I always have: encourage compassion and civility and try to bring people and politicians together across party lines to get things done. Here’s the deal, though: this won’t be possible without your support. Friend, would you consider becoming a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign by chipping in $3 or $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86566967/478287850/815818154?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2619-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzOTk5MS02ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q17HRHXVpllMEG-sTI3woEYDDSJoYplrC_yYvkHZQTU=)**

name: Sheldon Whitehouse
subject: Let’s give Americans the fair shake they deserve:
body:
It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T055d5e2d-0952-4faf-a5b4-343d586d1a50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, I’m running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate. [I’m hoping you’ll split a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a87637a-f507-4631-9786-b0e29bbf8bf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – and here’s why. It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem. I recently published a law review article highlighting how this captured Supreme Court often simply makes up false facts to arrive at decisions that ultimately benefit partisan Republican special interests. Take Citizens United v. FEC as an example. Remember when the Federalist Society justices said that all the unlimited political spending they were unleashing would be “transparent”? Well, we’ve seen dark money in politics prove them wrong several billion times over. Our system is designed to leave fact-finding to the lower courts that hear testimony, make credibility determinations, and review evidence. The Supreme Court is then supposed to defer to – and not alter – factual records in its decisions. Think about it: if the Highest Court in the Land makes up phony facts, there is nowhere else the parties can appeal to. The captured Roberts Court has done a lot of this phony fact-finding in big decisions that have fundamentally changed life in America. The Dobbs decision that ended a fundamental freedom for women is another one that was built on made-up history. How are the American people supposed to trust a Court that makes up its own rules to concoct decisions that suit right-wing special interests? [I won’t give up my fight to improve transparency and accountability at the Supreme Court, but I need your help. Split a contribution today to send me back to the Senate so I can protect American democracy and make sure our Court is giving Americans the fair shake they deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6786690-b280-47ef-95f8-743552c3afe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3e6478c-be09-4e50-bdf8-c1c38b551ff6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Americans deserve a Court that plays by the rules. \- Sheldon Whitehouse
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6854b158-45ba-4c40-b4c7-eca7a9cc15a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_90do_whitehouse_24060921?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f60b1a4-181f-4631-b7c4-9297b40240cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=38adfe1e-bdb1-44de-93b9-1f7d25678e47&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=38adfe1e-bdb1-44de-93b9-1f7d25678e47&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Our data team at Defeat Republicans is asking 16 more Democrats in PA if they agree with the Supreme Court’s ruling on states removing Trump from the ballot.

You can [_click here to respond_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86567257/478288829/1380339368?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240609_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmMjZkMjFmLTY5MjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_UqfAnajvrwTf1z4oy8dWQ8CxRRxeLqwE01tpxQGpKM=) or read below for some helpful context.

Despite leading a deadly insurrection at the Capitol, the Supreme Court says Trump must appear on the ballot in every state.

Hi Peter, My name popped up in the _New York Times_ a few days ago. It wasn’t necessarily anything bad (on my part, at least), but it sure wasn’t for any reason I’d ever hoped my name would be printed. Here it is, from a piece on Congressional retirements: For three of the 54, [retirement] was forced: one by expulsion (George Santos, the Long Island Republican) and two by being **gerrymandered out of winnable districts (Representatives Wiley Nickel and Kathy Manning, both North Carolina Democrats).** It’s a reminder of what the extreme Republican supermajority in Raleigh has cost us in North Carolina — not my job, but your voice. **Millions of North Carolinians will not be fairly or adequately represented in Congress next term because the GOP put politics over people.** [**I’m going to continue fighting with all I’ve got, and that includes working to break the GOP supermajority in Raleigh this fall. By forcing through their extreme gerrymanders, Republicans purposely diluted the votes of those who don’t see eye-to-eye with them, and more often than not, those voices are from underrepresented communities like young people, low-income folks, and Communities of Color.
To do it, they packed our state courts with partisan loyalists and used political games to build a veto-proof majority. Without Tricia Cotham, who switched parties and turned her back on the very same voters who supported her, these gerrymanders would not have been possible.
**Peter, I’m sure you agree: I’m tired of political games that put party loyalty first and working people last.** This problem won’t be fixed in a day, but we can take a big step if we pull together and turn North Carolina blue this fall.

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, My name popped up in the New York Times a few days ago. It wasn’t necessarily anything bad (on my part, at least), but it sure wasn’t for any reason I’d ever hoped my name would be printed. Here it is, from a piece on Congressional retirements: For three of the 54, [retirement] was forced: one by expulsion (George Santos, the Long Island Republican) and two by being gerrymandered out of winnable districts (Representatives Wiley Nickel and Kathy Manning, both North Carolina Democrats). It’s a reminder of what the extreme Republican supermajority in Raleigh has cost us in North Carolina — not my job, but your voice. Millions of North Carolinians will not be fairly or adequately represented in Congress next term because the GOP put politics over people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = By forcing through their extreme gerrymanders, Republicans purposely diluted the votes of those who don’t see eye-to-eye with them, and more often than not, those voices are from underrepresented communities like young people, low-income folks, and Communities of Color. To do it, they packed our state courts with partisan loyalists and used political games to build a veto-proof majority. Without Tricia Cotham, who switched parties and turned her back on the very same voters who supported her, these gerrymanders would not have been possible. Peter, I’m sure you agree: I’m tired of political games that put party loyalty first and working people last. This problem won’t be fixed in a day, but we can take a big step if we pull together and turn North Carolina blue this fall. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being a part of this important work. — Wiley Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

**One year ago yesterday, this movement won big at the Supreme Court** — securing an important victory protecting Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and ensuring Black Alabamians have a fair chance to elect the candidate of their choice in a new district. But while the Court’s decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ gave our movement the opportunity to advocate for – and achieve – new, fair districts across the country before the 2024 election, the GOP’s efforts to undermine our elections continue to this day. **These anti-democratic forces will do absolutely anything to gerrymander — and it’s up to us to stop them.** [**This election year is a critical moment for the NDRC’s work, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our efforts nationwide. Chip in $30 today to continue fighting for fairness so we can hand power to the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86568079/478291206/1762736337?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_junefun_email_20240609-NDRC-Red-AllenvMilligan_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240609-NDRC-Red-AllenvMilligan_&utm_campaign=junefun&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxZTkwZDg3LTZhMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGUEzmHu3vo4YMarC3q9DzgMEJXRN3WbC8alk3Maobk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friends, fair maps have a real, tangible impact on our democratic process.
When voters headed to the polls in the first congressional election in Alabama since the landmark victory at the Supreme Court, Democratic primary voter turnout in the state’s new Black opportunity district saw an _extraordinary 134% increase_ over the 2022 Democratic primary there.
**It’s clear that Alabama’s representative map is a boon for political participation. That’s great news for democracy! **
[**Now, we must continue fighting for more victories and pushing back against anti-democratic forces. Will you pitch in to help the NDRC continue working across the country to prevent gerrymandering, secure fair maps, and strengthen our democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86568108/478291305/1762736337?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_junefun_email_20240609-NDRC-Red-AllenvMilligan_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240609-NDRC-Red-AllenvMilligan_&utm_campaign=junefun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxZTkwZDg3LTZhMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGUEzmHu3vo4YMarC3q9DzgMEJXRN3WbC8alk3Maobk=)

Marina

clean_body: Help continue fighting for fairness so we can hand power to the people. | One year ago yesterday, this movement won big at the Supreme Court — securing an important victory protecting Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and ensuring Black Alabamians have a fair chance to elect the candidate of their choice in a new district. But while the Court’s decision in Allen v. Milligan gave our movement the opportunity to advocate for – and achieve – new, fair districts across the country before the 2024 election, the GOP’s efforts to undermine our elections continue to this day. These anti-democratic forces will do absolutely anything to gerrymander — and it’s up to us to stop them. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Friends, fair maps have a real, tangible impact on our democratic process. When voters headed to the polls in the first congressional election in Alabama since the landmark victory at the Supreme Court, Democratic primary voter turnout in the state’s new Black opportunity district saw an extraordinary 134% increase over the 2022 Democratic primary there. It’s clear that Alabama’s representative map is a boon for political participation. That’s great news for democracy! = Thank you, Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: June is different. Let us explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Give us just two minutes to explain why we’re reaching out today.
#
Friend — Give us just two minutes to explain why we’re reaching out today.
As you know, we’ve had a few fundraising deadlines come and go so far this year. But June is different.
That’s because June 30th is our **first official FEC fundraising deadline of 2024.
**
That means after the month is over, our fundraising totals _for the entire year so far_ will be published online for all to see.
And not only is this an FEC deadline for us at The Long Run, but it’s an FEC deadline for our endorsed changemaking candidates across the country, too.
You can bet that far-right Super PACs, Republican mega-donors, and GOP campaigns in battleground districts and states will be watching to see how our candidates do. They’re looking for any sign of weakness so they can focus their attacks.
**So please, chip in $5 and help us start off our FEC fundraising push on the right foot.**
$5 to prove that we have the energized support of folks across the country who want to protect our democracy and beat the far-right.
$5 to help candidates in extremely close races have a huge fundraising haul when they report their totals at the end of the month.
Truly, it’s not even about how much money we raise. It’s about how many people chip in to become a part of this movement, proving the size and strength of our grassroots team.
[**Click this link or the button below to chip in your first contribution towards our June FEC fundraising deadline. We need all hands on deck as we work towards this crucial benchmark.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-june24.CRDCuz&refcode=em240609-1-tt&t=1&akid=5324%2E196590%2Ezx9lL-)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)
friends -
At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to **[make your first contribution — of $3 or any amount you can — to stand with our campaign for Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june24.zT5set&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=2&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)** But before I do that, please give me a chance to explain why your support is so important to our success.
Here's the situation:
This June is a critical month for our campaign. Part of the reason why is because at the end of it — just three weeks from today — we're facing an official Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline, the final one before our primary on August 14.
I know my team and I have written to you about these quarterly deadlines before, but I mean it when I say that this is a big one. One that could very well set the tone for the home stretch of this campaign.
Shortly after the deadline, our campaign has to file a report publicly disclosing our fundraising numbers. That means how much money we've raised, and how many individual contributions make up that amount.
Believe it or not, a LOT of people — from AIPAC and their billionaire donors, to our establishment challengers and the media — will be combing through the receipts to see how we're doing.
They're going to use our fundraising numbers as an indicator of our campaign's grassroots strength. They want to see if there are _any_ signs of weakness in our movement, and check if it's worth it to pour obscene amounts of dark money into Minnesota to try and exploit it.
Reporting the strongest numbers possible will tell them there is _nothing_ they can do to stop this team's momentum, and show that our collective grassroots power is greater than anything they can throw our way.
**That's why your support — alongside thousands of progressives across the country — is so important. Especially today.**
So please:
**[Can you make your first online donation — of $3 or any amount that feels right to you — to support our movement today? No matter the size of your contribution, it'll help send an unmistakable message that this campaign stands united.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june24.zT5set&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=3&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-june24.oUz4Ct&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=23&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-june24.roAWh_&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=24&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-june24.4Fjxdb&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=25&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-june24.T6YjK_&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=26&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-june24.zSwSc7&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=27&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**
---
****
When I think of the many, many reasons I'm so proud of this incredible team, one of them is the fact we fund our campaigns the right way. I hope you feel the same way.
Thanks for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june24.zT5set&refcode=em240609-1-1&t=28&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=32&refcode2=1190_791427_fXqbyO&akid=1190%2E791427%2EfXqbyO)**.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A Republican in disguise
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

One of the most competitive Democratic primaries of 2024 is only 16 days
away in New York’s 16th congressional district, where progressive champion
Jamaal Bowman could lose his seat to a Republican in disguise. But not if
we come together NOW.

Our Justice Democrats incumbent is being outspent by AIPAC’s network of
MAGA millionaire and billionaire donors, the same ones supporting Donald
Trump for president. They’ve dropped millions in ads already and show no
signs of stopping.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240609.RbJoZH&refcode=em20240609-35183&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=35183%2E1203867%2ETZgzYb ]Jamaal needs us now more than ever,
Peter. Will you help us raise as much
grassroots resources as we can to defend Jamaal’s House seat before it’s
too late?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240609.RbJoZH&refcode=em20240609-35183&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=35183%2E1203867%2ETZgzYb ]Contribute $5

It’s no exaggeration: Jamaal is THE most vulnerable Democratic incumbent
facing a primary fight this cycle. And it’s no wonder why.

Jamaal is one of the few progressives in Congress challenging the status
quo and courageously fighting for bold change like a permanent ceasefire
and peace in Gaza, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, strong public
education, workers’ rights, affordable housing, and criminal justice
reform.

The far-right and wealthy few don’t like that, so they’re funneling
massive amounts of money into anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and their
network of super PACs to fund Jamaal’s primary challenger, George Latimer.

Latimer is a career politician with a history of corruption and racism. He
shares the same donors as Trump and other Republicans, and he recently
said he won’t repeal Trump’s tax cuts for billionaires or raise taxes on
them because, well, they’re his donors too.

This district deserves a representative for the PEOPLE, which is what they
already have in Jamaal. We can’t let Latimer and AIPAC oust him and set
our progressive movement back at this critical juncture.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240609.RbJoZH&refcode=em20240609-35183&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=35183%2E1203867%2ETZgzYb ]We’re running out of time. If you can afford to, please pitch in
$5 or more to help us re-elect Jamaal.

Thank you for fueling our fight to protect Jamaal and the rest of our
Squad this election year.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240609-35183-footer&t=1022&refcode2=35183_1203867_TZgzYb&akid=35183%2E1203867%2ETZgzYb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=35183%2E1203867%2ETZgzYb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

This has been a tough month for Republicans. We’ve lost a lot of ground fighting back against the radical ideologies and manifestos from my far-left colleagues, and it seems as if every time they open their mouths, money pours in from their base. body:
This month is 20 years since I started serving the country, first as an intern, and now, I’m running for Senate.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86570136/478296276/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQ3NGZjMy02YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jg3SWcjKAvCmHXKltkMjPlZx4WNS5xnn5MovsU87gFs=&emci=2ce490db-1b24-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ab474fc3-6c26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=26261389)
---

| | This month is 20 years since I started serving the country, first as an intern, and now, I'm running for Senate. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86570137/478296277/-1197072038?refcode=2024-06-09-goal&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ab474fc3-6c26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQ3NGZjMy02YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jg3SWcjKAvCmHXKltkMjPlZx4WNS5xnn5MovsU87gFs=) I've been blessed to serve, working my way up from a desk in the photocopy room. But I always remembered my first lesson in service. 20 years ago, arriving at Union Station, I realized I didn't know anyone else in the entire city of D.C. I didn't come from a political family and didn't have any previous experience in D.C. except for a family trip or two. I was nervous. I felt out of place. I felt like I didn't belong. Who was I to think I could work in government? I am a son of immigrants, a public school kid. I made my way by Metro, lugging a big duffel to Foggy Bottom, where I had a dorm room at George Washington University for the summer. I showed up at work at a building three blocks down from the White House. I was in awe. I could not believe that I really got to do this work. But that proximity to power made me feel even more of an imposter. I still felt like a tourist. But, thankfully, I learned from my boss a sentence that stuck with me for 20 years. He said, "You don't have good government if you don't have good people in government." Effective governance isn't derived from stately buildings. It's what we make of it. The quality of our government is based on the quality of the people who step up to serve. If you have egotistical narcissistic and power-hungry people in government, you will have an egotistical narcissistic and power-hungry government. **But if you have people in government who believe in public service, who believe that empathy is a strength, not a weakness, and who believe in humility over hubris, you can have an altogether different government. One that seeks to solve real problems and help people.** I hear Trump and others criticize those working for the government, but I am proud to serve. Service isn't a bad word. Yes, there are some who put their ambitions and power ahead of what's right for the country but don't cast that shadow over all of our public servants. We face real problems right now, and if we are to heal our broken politics and shift us from this dangerous trajectory, I believe we need to inspire and reignite a new era of public service in our country. It's not going to happen overnight, but it starts by stepping up. Whether from my time serving the country abroad in war zones or back here in my home community in New Jersey, I have seen public servants step up to make a real difference and help those in need. And I've seen Americans step up to protect our democracy in extraordinary ways. I'm humbled to be running for Senate. I never imagined this when I started on this path of service 20 years ago. But I still believe we can heal this country and fix what's broken. I'm ready to do my part. [**I'd be grateful if you would support our campaign by pitching in $10 or whatever is meaningful to you before the day ends. We're close to hitting our Blue Jersey goal, and I'm asking for your support to get it done.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86570149/478296278/-1197072038?refcode=2024-06-09-goal&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ab474fc3-6c26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQ3NGZjMy02YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jg3SWcjKAvCmHXKltkMjPlZx4WNS5xnn5MovsU87gFs=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86570157/478296279/-1197072038?refcode=2024-06-09-goal&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ab474fc3-6c26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQ3NGZjMy02YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jg3SWcjKAvCmHXKltkMjPlZx4WNS5xnn5MovsU87gFs=) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: This month is 20 years since I started serving the country, first as an intern, and now, I’m running for Senate. | | | | This month is 20 years since I started serving the country, first as an intern, and now, I'm running for Senate. = I've been blessed to serve, working my way up from a desk in the photocopy room. But I always remembered my first lesson in service. 20 years ago, arriving at Union Station, I realized I didn't know anyone else in the entire city of D.C. I didn't come from a political family and didn't have any previous experience in D.C. except for a family trip or two. I was nervous. I felt out of place. I felt like I didn't belong. Who was I to think I could work in government? I am a son of immigrants, a public school kid. I made my way by Metro, lugging a big duffel to Foggy Bottom, where I had a dorm room at George Washington University for the summer. I showed up at work at a building three blocks down from the White House. I was in awe. I could not believe that I really got to do this work. But that proximity to power made me feel even more of an imposter. I still felt like a tourist. But, thankfully, I learned from my boss a sentence that stuck with me for 20 years. He said, "You don't have good government if you don't have good people in government." Effective governance isn't derived from stately buildings. It's what we make of it. The quality of our government is based on the quality of the people who step up to serve. If you have egotistical narcissistic and power-hungry people in government, you will have an egotistical narcissistic and power-hungry government. But if you have people in government who believe in public service, who believe that empathy is a strength, not a weakness, and who believe in humility over hubris, you can have an altogether different government. One that seeks to solve real problems and help people. I hear Trump and others criticize those working for the government, but I am proud to serve. Service isn't a bad word. Yes, there are some who put their ambitions and power ahead of what's right for the country but don't cast that shadow over all of our public servants. We face real problems right now, and if we are to heal our broken politics and shift us from this dangerous trajectory, I believe we need to inspire and reignite a new era of public service in our country. It's not going to happen overnight, but it starts by stepping up. Whether from my time serving the country abroad in war zones or back here in my home community in New Jersey, I have seen public servants step up to make a real difference and help those in need. And I've seen Americans step up to protect our democracy in extraordinary ways. I'm humbled to be running for Senate. I never imagined this when I started on this path of service 20 years ago. But I still believe we can heal this country and fix what's broken. I'm ready to do my part. = = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .
