subject: Hey Peter, it’s Jason Kander.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I know Lucas Kunce has what it takes to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. Please let me explain:
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52030?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ)
Hi Peter, it’s Jason Kander. I’m the veteran and Democrat who was elected statewide as Missouri’s Secretary of State and then nearly defeated Roy Blunt, an incumbent GOP Senator, in one of the closest races of the 2016 election cycle.
**With Joe Manchin’s retirement taking West Virginia’s Senate race off the board, our Senate race here in Missouri is the perfect candidate to replace it.**
So in a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign to defeat Josh Hawley.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52030?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ)** But first, please let me explain why I know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat:
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52030?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ)
---
If you’ve followed election coverage over the last year or so, the pundits might lead you to believe something new is happening.
Despite high disapproval for President Joe Biden in red states like Kentucky and Mississippi, Democrats outperformed their party’s presidential margin in statewide races by double digits. And after Republican-dominated legislatures passed extreme abortion bans in red states like Kansas and Ohio, voters delivered huge wins for reproductive rights and democracy.
But the truth is, this isn’t all that new. While pundits and insiders increasingly divide us into columns of red and blue based on their one-dimensional view of politics, voters continue to confound their expectations in election after election.
Missouri is a great example. While our state has shifted solidly red in presidential preferences since 2012, Democrats have won a half-dozen statewide campaigns, even as recently as 2018. And when Missouri politicians have adopted extreme positions on issues such as abortion, workers’ rights or health care, they’ve often seen their out-of-touch agendas soundly rejected by voters.
**Just like voters in states where we’ve seen big wins for Democrats and pro-freedom initiatives in the past year, hundreds of thousands of voters in Missouri are still splitting their tickets.**
I know this more than most because I’ve lived it. I won a race for Missouri Secretary of State. And in 2016, Missouri’s last Senate race to take place during a presidential election, I fell just 2.8% short of defeating a longtime Republican incumbent for U.S. Senate. And I outperformed the Democratic presidential ticket’s margin by more than 16%.
We proved that in races where well-funded candidates can set themselves apart and make it clear to voters that they’ll fight for them in office, Democrats can win in Missouri.
That’s what we’re seeing in Missouri’s current U.S. Senate race, as my friend Lucas Kunce takes on incumbent Josh Hawley. Much like my race in 2016, 2024 pits a labor-backed veteran against a politician — _except my opponent never tried to overthrow the government violently just to get his name out there._
Now up for reelection in 2024, Hawley faces Lucas, a Marine veteran and antitrust advocate who’s broken fundraising records, rallied Missouri’s election-winning labor movement behind him and built a reputation as a different kind of Democrat who speaks truth to power, regardless of party.
**[I’m proud to support Lucas Kunce in his race against Josh Hawley and I hope you’ll join me by adding a donation of $10 or whatever you’re able to today. Multiple polls have already confirmed that this will be a tight race, so your early support could be what helps Lucas tip the scales.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52030?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52031?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52030?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ)
---
**Now let’s talk about why Josh Hawley is so vulnerable.**
Hawley famously popped popcorn in his dorm room to gleefully watch the invasion of Iraq and then claimed a decade later to have opposed the war.
And since he’s represented Missouri in the U.S. Senate, he’s also become known as a desperately anti-union scab who is self-consciously obsessed with manhood.
From blocking defense nominations to voting against health care for veterans exposed to burn pits, Hawley has put his personal politics ahead of national security and the needs of military families. And he’s used his office to build a family business dedicated to restricting abortion access nationwide as his allies in Jefferson City enacted one of the nation’s most extreme abortion bans.
**Now with five years under Hawley’s belt in the U.S. Senate, Missourians don’t like what they’ve seen.**
Approval polling from _Morning Consult_ shows that Hawley has the lowest approval of any GOP senator running for reelection in 2024, lower than Sens. Ted Cruz of Texas and Rick Scott of Florida. And even his mentor, Missouri’s former U.S. Sen. John Danforth, has called backing Hawley the _“worst mistake I ever made.”_
Donald Trump recently commented on Hawley’s race too — _“So interesting that the Democrats are looking hard at the Senate races in both Missouri and Texas. Josh and Ted must be very careful, stranger things have happened!!!”_
**Hawley is vulnerable, and everyone knows it.** The proof is in his rapidly changing election-season rhetoric, Republicans in Washington fretting about their draconian abortion bans across the country, and Hawley’s billionaire allies launching a new pro-Hawley super PAC right after Lucas entered the race.
**[FIGHT BACK: ELECT LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52030?refcode=em20240609-5712&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=5712%2E614464%2Eq87-wQ)**
Just as we saw in elections across the country — both last year and in the last decade — pundits and presidential politics won’t be deciding the result of every race in 2024. Voters will be.
**That’s why I’m confident that Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley.**
And with so much at stake in this election — reproductive freedom, health care access, and even our democracy — this race must be a priority.
That’s why I’m asking you today, Peter:
**[Will you join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign against Josh Hawley for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? clean_body: I know Lucas Kunce has what it takes to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. Please let me explain: Hi Peter, it’s Jason Kander. I’m the veteran and Democrat who was elected statewide as Missouri’s Secretary of State and then nearly defeated Roy Blunt, an incumbent GOP Senator, in one of the closest races of the 2016 election cycle. With Joe Manchin’s retirement taking West Virginia’s Senate race off the board, our Senate race here in Missouri is the perfect candidate to replace it. So in a moment, But first, please let me explain why I know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: If you’ve followed election coverage over the last year or so, the pundits might lead you to believe something new is happening. Despite high disapproval for President Joe Biden in red states like Kentucky and Mississippi, Democrats outperformed their party’s presidential margin in statewide races by double digits. And after Republican-dominated legislatures passed extreme abortion bans in red states like Kansas and Ohio, voters delivered huge wins for reproductive rights and democracy. But the truth is, this isn’t all that new. While pundits and insiders increasingly divide us into columns of red and blue based on their one-dimensional view of politics, voters continue to confound their expectations in election after election. Missouri is a great example. While our state has shifted solidly red in presidential preferences since 2012, Democrats have won a half-dozen statewide campaigns, even as recently as 2018. And when Missouri politicians have adopted extreme positions on issues such as abortion, workers’ rights or health care, they’ve often seen their out-of-touch agendas soundly rejected by voters. Just like voters in states where we’ve seen big wins for Democrats and pro-freedom initiatives in the past year, hundreds of thousands of voters in Missouri are still splitting their tickets. I know this more than most because I’ve lived it. I won a race for Missouri Secretary of State. And in 2016, Missouri’s last Senate race to take place during a presidential election, I fell just 2.8% short of defeating a longtime Republican incumbent for U.S. Senate. And I outperformed the Democratic presidential ticket’s margin by more than 16%. We proved that in races where well-funded candidates can set themselves apart and make it clear to voters that they’ll fight for them in office, Democrats can win in Missouri. That’s what we’re seeing in Missouri’s current U.S. Senate race, as my friend Lucas Kunce takes on incumbent Josh Hawley. Much like my race in 2016, 2024 pits a labor-backed veteran against a politician — except my opponent never tried to overthrow the government violently just to get his name out there. Now up for reelection in 2024, Hawley faces Lucas, a Marine veteran and antitrust advocate who’s broken fundraising records, rallied Missouri’s election-winning labor movement behind him and built a reputation as a different kind of Democrat who speaks truth to power, regardless of party. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Now let’s talk about why Josh Hawley is so vulnerable. Hawley famously popped popcorn in his dorm room to gleefully watch the invasion of Iraq and then claimed a decade later to have opposed the war. And since he’s represented Missouri in the U.S. Senate, he’s also become known as a desperately anti-union scab who is self-consciously obsessed with manhood. From blocking defense nominations to voting against health care for veterans exposed to burn pits, Hawley has put his personal politics ahead of national security and the needs of military families. And he’s used his office to build a family business dedicated to restricting abortion access nationwide as his allies in Jefferson City enacted one of the nation’s most extreme abortion bans. Now with five years under Hawley’s belt in the U.S. Senate, Missourians don’t like what they’ve seen. Approval polling from Morning Consult shows that Hawley has the lowest approval of any GOP senator running for reelection in 2024, lower than Sens. Ted Cruz of Texas and Rick Scott of Florida. And even his mentor, Missouri’s former U.S. Sen. John Danforth, has called backing Hawley the “worst mistake I ever made.” Donald Trump recently commented on Hawley’s race too — “So interesting that the Democrats are looking hard at the Senate races in both Missouri and Texas. Josh and Ted must be very careful, stranger things have happened!!!” Hawley is vulnerable, and everyone knows it. The proof is in his rapidly changing election-season rhetoric, Republicans in Washington fretting about their draconian abortion bans across the country, and Hawley’s billionaire allies launching a new pro-Hawley super PAC right after Lucas entered the race. Just as we saw in elections across the country — both last year and in the last decade — pundits and presidential politics won’t be deciding the result of every race in 2024. Voters will be. That’s why I’m confident that Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley. And with so much at stake in this election — reproductive freedom, health care access, and even our democracy — this race must be a priority. That’s why I’m asking you today, Peter: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you so much, Jason Kander | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

body:
We are STILL being attacked.

| [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d0f83c6c2fd4d6782cb349e231944dd&_e=lyih6C7Hth_760EfyOnPN1390rGw81ey5SqZX2jfQNNac-CQ15EQ9tCXdpengPAXmbdJ_pKKbcH_w3B0Yd2XqGvtfhLW0v-U8dG-b0fzYoIE6LMM_x5Rg1pci17HHjfXf4esQgsDVEKdeKcD_RV0olfOKBuNo__BoVW_5flY_eOGJxWJZL5NGssg9hIf_ifdK8tMSUf0VzUjEljQUSI33yBxUglf0L7uK3mvI_WHVUzhXeFNdhDAcZWFNO5JmZJNr-pOnNm7d00CTDQ-CNeUfAu8Vu7hmXk6ou3QSJCYMq_pBCsY2lX_DbObTQr_1dVSZp4VcWc929IecXBcP1MfBPKFPACTnvQpxFHEinqIBDpW0e6Z7D5bxv4SRNBMkWiShv8iG3-_uD_yqVmF9-OPYA%3D%3D)

Hi Fellow American,

Take a good look at this headline! This is the kind of hatred Republicans deal with every day from the radical Left.

I lost my legs while on duty in Afghanistan after a Taliban bomb detonated beneath me. Now, I get attacked by pro-Hamas protesters in the country I almost lost my life to defend.

[](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d0f83c6c2fd4d6782cb349e231944dd&_e=lyih6C7Hth_760EfyOnPN1390rGw81ey5SqZX2jfQNNac-CQ15EQ9tCXdpengPAXmbdJ_pKKbcH_w3B0Yd2XqGvtfhLW0v-U8dG-b0fzYoIE6LMM_x5Rg1pci17HHjfXf4esQgsDVEKdeKcD_RV0olfOKBuNo__BoVW_5flY_eOGJxWJZL5NGssg9hIf_ifdK8tMSUf0VzUjEljQUSI33yBxUglf0L7uK3mvI_WHVUzhXeFNdhDAcZWFNO5JmZJNFWvrUBO-66Gh3MBH3-ZTb3JkfROKl_scc7JzTwDuNmrHV_gTbN6hy4NaZhkBRDzlyk6NGe613BGSJMhF3I-DCTFYdKBGHI343_Bg78LQyJqOPVimTz1O0MDmusmTUsUvkWa7E6AlpnK5-GHLEVFPuw%3D%3D)
Look, this isn't new — and I know I'm not the only one. Our entire America First movement is subjected to hatred like this on a daily basis.

In fact, nearly this identical incident has happened to me before. In the summer of 2014, I wanted to show my support for our America First ally Israel in a tangible way. Whenever I show support, I do it with the work of my hands and not just with posts on Facebook.

At the time, I was in Boston pursuing a degree in economics at Harvard University. As I relaxed one evening with my then-pregnant wife and two young children at the Boston Common, some men who had participated in a nearby anti-Israel protest, singled me out because they saw an "easy target" on prosthetic legs and started picking a fight.

I didn't back down then. In fact, I resolved to fly to the Middle East and volunteer in the fight against terrorism — even on prosthetic legs — to show radical activists that democracy will not be defeated!

Just like then, I won't back down now. I'm more determined than ever to use my voice as an America First representative in Congress to defeat Hamas and support American greatness.

This is why **it is crucial** that I have backup from you, our loyal America First supporters. **[Will you rush an emergency donation of just $5 to help me combat anti-American attacks?](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d0f83c6c2fd4d6782cb349e231944dd&_e=lyih6C7Hth_760EfyOnPN1390rGw81ey5SqZX2jfQNNac-CQ15EQ9tCXdpengPAXmbdJ_pKKbcH_w3B0Yd2XqGvtfhLW0v-U8dG-b0fzYoIE6LMM_x5Rg1pci17HHjfXf4esQgsDVEKdeKcD_RV0olfOKBuNo__BoVW_5flY_eOGJxWJZL5NGssg9hIf_ifdK8tMSUf0VzUjEljQUSI33yBxUglf0L7uK3mvI_WHVUzhXeFNdhDAcZWFNO5JmZJNXoewCZyQ7ZKFTvzhUaVDTiRCAF7UWB5eZBRiYIlqgqCKwa2V1yYLopV3mE0qEVJH6PULFnnkrJh3QhNxuFySI_7p6StPpqX5qsft4rSm5O1ulwimSGyhgl7CkMS-UZ5O-cjFZenUpwJY20a554n99w%3D%3D)**

| [**RUSH IN $5**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d0f83c6c2fd4d6782cb349e231944dd&_e=lyih6C7Hth_760EfyOnPN1390rGw81ey5SqZX2jfQNNac-CQ15EQ9tCXdpengPAXmbdJ_pKKbcH_w3B0Yd2XqGvtfhLW0v-U8dG-b0fzYoIE6LMM_x5Rg1pci17HHjfXf4esQgsDVEKdeKcD_RV0olfOKBuNo__BoVW_5flY_eOGJxWJZL5NGssg9hIf_ifdK8tMSUf0VzUjEljQUSI334t23jgb_pBIyyQvRl49H_QAETPnZBkcc9ZstFkIxJDNYcXOYCa2FoqoNMlSvX_F-VOKZZjrrO7YyFyC9zZXlFmVwMrZLfLd0g47g4HERVHZjvoQ_myMk2g0BbSkwygx0E5Uol3qraMllBy_KBlELT497bCGXcuIJwQlmItxFI5U8tF7b55VsPMIFAiqkTUSwbN0uOCcCyLrp18X8nhVkdU%3D)

These attacks will never stop, but the more momentum we have going into November, the better path our country will be on for the future.

**[Can I count on you to show these losers that we will not be intimidated into silence?](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d0f83c6c2fd4d6782cb349e231944dd&_e=lyih6C7Hth_760EfyOnPN1390rGw81ey5SqZX2jfQNNac-CQ15EQ9tCXdpengPAXmbdJ_pKKbcH_w3B0Yd2XqGvtfhLW0v-U8dG-b0fzYoIE6LMM_x5Rg1pci17HHjfXf4esQgsDVEKdeKcD_RV0olfOKBuNo__BoVW_5flY_eOGJxWJZL5NGssg9hIf_ifdK8tMSUf0VzUjEljQUSI33yBxUglf0L7uK3mvI_WHVUzhXeFNdhDAcZWFNO5JmZJNMEpn1NQjrcLTGMnJ1Gmcftji8-yJl48prkaibJNNBZZer0FZIu_EMrZw188BE2AS1qRq5ur_mjiCp54AP6589AVxzxluVDj1226bFru4xSo0iXOrzqMHcV2hJP5oMMrfJE29CIeFms3JtCseeCi9nQ%3D%3D)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Ban Corporate PACs.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
To me, public service is about serving people. And I don't think you can do that very effectively if some big corporation has you in its pocket.
#

Friends —
When Gabby and I first kicked off this campaign, we wanted to do things a little differently.
To me, **public service** is about **serving people**. And I don't think you can do that very effectively if some big corporation has you in its pocket.
So, one of the first things we decided was that I was never — ever — going to take donations from corporate PACs. Not a dime.
This was a key piece of the platform I ran on in 2020, and again in 2022. And that’s why I reintroduced the Ban Corporate PACs Act with Jon Ossoff last month, before the anniversary of the Citizens United decision that opened the floodgates for corporate money in our elections.
Last year, pharmaceutical companies fought tooth and nail to block legislation that would reduce the cost of prescription medication for seniors. It’s an all too familiar story, and one that doesn’t often have a happy ending.
But this time, the pharmaceutical companies failed. Millions of people will benefit as a result.
And that’s why I’m writing. Things like this can make a big difference in Washington, so I’m asking you to endorse my standard of government. That means all members of Congress should:
1. Release their official schedule.

2. Place their assets in qualified blind trusts.

3. And refuse any donations from corporate PACs.

[**Please, add your name. This might sound like a small act. But with thousands signing on, it’s a message to my colleagues on the fence that our supporters will have our back if we do the right thing.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mk_standard_em_june24/?source=em240609-1-90&refcode2=5780.6688874.Q6-qAL&akid=5780%2E6688874%2EQ6-qAL)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mk_standard_em_june24/?source=em240609-1-90&refcode2=5780.6688874.Q6-qAL&akid=5780%2E6688874%2EQ6-qAL)**
I’m the only one in the Senate who does this today, but with any luck, we’ll pull a few more people to our side with your support.
Thanks for listening,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5780%2E6688874%2EQ6-qAL).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Layla isn’t afraid to push back against the unjust status quo. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWdjcoP73K2B5DONGZ6RTqYeXgrAQZ2QQPLY1Gnh5xypHHdeoXoGBtuhsWxaKSbxrWhODpUjXiI1MGj5X1mWPfRAJU6i_rplB0nem-wCkpIsafk3DR_BnNBrxsEuK77vli7_yd6e2S_UCW6Gyi_VyhfmNBJQTO6qerJGT2EERU3ws/472/u3TBbf1xQ6eSg9nMoPr2-g/h0/h001.2pAlviUeVLluuRTXipu3wQ-nGiQGo6Est1Qav-Ytgf4)

Friend, Too many elected officials are millionaires who can self-finance their campaigns, and who don’t understand the needs of their constituents. That’s why we need more working people to run for office, who understand the urgent struggles of everyday people and who will fight for the transformative changes we deserve, including tenants’ rights, workers’ rights, and more. Layla Taha is running for State Representative in Michigan. Layla was raised by a single working mother and believes strongly in strengthening human rights and building a government by and for the working class. She’s the only pro-ceasefire candidate in her Democratic primary and she’s running to ensure everyone has access to quality healthcare, affordable housing, a livable wage, and clean water and air. Unlike many Michigan state legislators, Layla also **refuses to take any contributions from corporations** , instead relying on grassroots donations to power her campaign. [**I am proud to endorse Layla Taha for State Representative. Can you join me today by making a donation to Layla’s people-powered campaign and help send a champion for working people to Lansing to fight for us?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ8oJ2C_OmxpZm6JAw_oidCizqiA8YMsPnVoDONGpkDg_EMv4PFMXwFtpiwCyn6F6LsNEV7dGwmq3EHR4GNA0FEV-WYOjiscO2JTaM6m9bDcnSE1UMXMaT7MdtFKb2TA9JN5mzyMH6iJYDE-wKgA6Filf3OnjdAFMRfRtjRqGDxV7mrwMO2N9faHqoPwwqeoqn7j4AJn0gdOb7-JOeA8SQFv-rrV6pVW0A-Jhohds1Jo30WEoEL7uoa8py3dPyf2WDNFfepCMs2djOQcfOfsdkqVrVht14Hh9Vj2IvS1sdXyM/472/u3TBbf1xQ6eSg9nMoPr2-g/h1/h001.vTQAsdjQ7oqwPVYLs4CFISrAZOPXMeveD1jsI6m1QH8) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ8oJ2C_OmxpZm6JAw_oidCsZhMeUXJibw98ynKIAKO2YpaPWe0ROg2QXUsOYx1L749xjrNxTpna5oSojRWjkwDrl7RXjnh5LJjvzOysKvsiREBe9lIGVK_a8gGwtVtLpS0ruqYBQHXEodu-PCFo236FtsZy3s3pXQJ8b8mFrsSRDSaUL94yaREj1zWFBJ93Oo-11AlsSxkXGJ5XU2EXdp3JjMHQ7LpPAM6iiUgop82Ep87HsqFagI_zRQLugHFFxKEnrOK766IZRTIJzf2munnTO3LfgLMvOLcfN9hBFboak/472/u3TBbf1xQ6eSg9nMoPr2-g/h2/h001.1ZSae1zZ5uRRPlhyizyTBPNCcHdFqzrTm55EqdFUEGI) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ8oJ2C_OmxpZm6JAw_oidCrk_y1QrXa6hfejRHF-8agLNUzgUGh8zPemU5bJbA17_0g3-BNiHrup7vfCFREdSUkTWNdzo_vD1xvxYgUU2GbYMiO4t-8OWS02qinz3SNcm3UO5pbP6DEFPHN3CFHsugepY2GK-BSRBzrXnYCyvdA_yVY0pFJQa0d5cNH6MuJpysmqdhjuJS-jaxrYkufgyRf2NxMOq83cqz1W7HCx53QSFbbQjZkDSCd02zUwutBKemaZ276F3X9YuQc-zo5Iz6Y-hzYZzLZ20NFRHqoqhxuI/472/u3TBbf1xQ6eSg9nMoPr2-g/h3/h001.bW2l8IDEKeg8zpwWdSNlW-iO5Mk2BWS6Ysd2AG_kAwY)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Jun 8, 2024
Subject: I endorse Layla for State Rep:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
As a proud Arab American Congresswoman, I know that many people across our country are facing intense anti-Arab hatred and dehumanization while feeling abandoned by our government. It’s important for our community and all marginalized communities to feel seen, heard, and celebrated by our government.
For years I’ve had the opportunity to work alongside Layla Taha, an Arab American running for State Representative in Michigan who is unapologetically committed to saving lives, no matter faith or ethnicity. She’s speaking out for the humanity of the Palestinian people, as well as others in danger from the U.S.-backed Israeli attacks on nearby countries like Lebanon, where she has family.
When Layla led my team’s constituent services programs and our youth fellowship program, her deep love and commitment to our district’s residents was clear. She will work hard for all of us to build a government that works for the working class, where everyone has access to quality healthcare, affordable housing, a livable wage, and clean water and air.
Layla is a public health advocate and community organizer with an organizing background in voting rights and reproductive freedom. **She helped enshrine abortion as a right in our state’s constitution.** And in Michigan, where 93% of our state legislators take money from the exploitative utility monopoly DTE, the fact that she’s pushing for a publicly owned utility and refusing to take corporate donations is powerful.
[**I am proud to support Layla Taha for State Representative―and she needs our support today. clean_body: Layla isn’t afraid to push back against the unjust status quo. | | | Friend, Too many elected officials are millionaires who can self-finance their campaigns, and who don’t understand the needs of their constituents. That’s why we need more working people to run for office, who understand the urgent struggles of everyday people and who will fight for the transformative changes we deserve, including tenants’ rights, workers’ rights, and more. Layla Taha is running for State Representative in Michigan. Layla was raised by a single working mother and believes strongly in strengthening human rights and building a government by and for the working class. She’s the only pro-ceasefire candidate in her Democratic primary and she’s running to ensure everyone has access to quality healthcare, affordable housing, a livable wage, and clean water and air. Unlike many Michigan state legislators, Layla also refuses to take any contributions from corporations , instead relying on grassroots donations to power her campaign. | Layla has the courage to speak up for the humanity of all people, including Palestinians and others endangered by U.S.-backed Israeli attacks in countries like Lebanon, where she has family. This makes her vulnerable to attacks from right-wing groups like anti-Palestinian group AIPAC, which is spending millions of dollars to defeat ceasefire candidates. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Layla Taha | | | | | | | | | Together, we’re working for the promise of a true democracy where all of our voices are represented. Thank you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jun 8, 2024 Subject: I endorse Layla for State Rep: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, As a proud Arab American Congresswoman, I know that many people across our country are facing intense anti-Arab hatred and dehumanization while feeling abandoned by our government. It’s important for our community and all marginalized communities to feel seen, heard, and celebrated by our government. For years I’ve had the opportunity to work alongside Layla Taha, an Arab American running for State Representative in Michigan who is unapologetically committed to saving lives, no matter faith or ethnicity. She’s speaking out for the humanity of the Palestinian people, as well as others in danger from the U.S.-backed Israeli attacks on nearby countries like Lebanon, where she has family. When Layla led my team’s constituent services programs and our youth fellowship program, her deep love and commitment to our district’s residents was clear. She will work hard for all of us to build a government that works for the working class, where everyone has access to quality healthcare, affordable housing, a livable wage, and clean water and air. Layla is a public health advocate and community organizer with an organizing background in voting rights and reproductive freedom. She helped enshrine abortion as a right in our state’s constitution. And in Michigan, where 93% of our state legislators take money from the exploitative utility monopoly DTE, the fact that she’s pushing for a publicly owned utility and refusing to take corporate donations is powerful. Because Layla isn’t afraid to push back against the unjust status quo, she needs to be prepared to push back against attacks from corporate interests as well as anti-Palestinian groups like AIPAC, which is spending millions of dollars to defeat ceasefire candidates up and down the ballot across the country. If elected as the next Michigan State Representative for Metro Detroit, Layla will make sure that our government in Lansing prioritizes people over profits. As Layla said upon the launch of her campaign: "In my commitment to justice and equity I am not accepting corporate donations. I believe our elected representatives must be beholden to the people, not wealthy corporations and donors." She has also said that “every decision I’ll be making as a legislator is going to be about what’s in the best interest of my constituents” rather than corporate interests. She’s out knocking doors every day, prioritizing connecting with everyday people. Instead of corporate donations, Layla is relying on grassroots support. Dear, Peter. It's been an eventful two weeks... We watched with horror as President Trump was found guilty in a political witch hunt through a weaponized system of justice. While Biden and his allies spend their political capital to "get Trump," they have ignored the lawlessness their open borders policies have unleashed along our southern border and in cities across America. We need tough, proven, conservative leadership, and that's exactly what I'll bring with me to Washington. I will work tirelessly to end Joe Biden's war on Alaskan energy, hold his weaponized justice system in check, and secure our wide open border by completing Trump's wall and returning to common-sense conservative policies that work. Our country is a mess right now, but help is on the way.
---

**My Interview with KTVF-TV**
---
I sat down with KTVF-TV during my most recent visit to Fairbanks to discuss my campaign for Congress, my priorities, and my thoughts on the state of Alaska and our country. _"I am very very concerned about what’s happening in our country. My husband and I have four kids. We have 11 grandkids, and what’s happening in our country is really just, it’s sickening . . . I watched what happened in the last congressional race and I thought, ‘I don’t want that to happen again.’ We need to have a strong Republican in Congress to represent the state of Alaska, and I believe I’m that person.”_ You can listen and watch the full interview [here](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=c3e4e51990d64eb4a2489e7a3722265c&_e=xuqRvQc1sgULlrD1UsIk0EJNAfYMC6ezaEsLhV8h70iVNnmpjXmgoEG9EmjD2a8yOOBxIUW5ungz6qwP_w-do-luI-007AWh2hb5D7IlGhB3B6lIAUGxumgQvwXxszjPDaWvm7FbZFJrjao4h9WZJ8MxVKs8kdYT7Z0S8pn8Swt0SXaC8ycqRFvncd6qRiEPYrfNsevvf6WoN7IgSlCbCM-bViAn2IHWDkRbIBUQyLdnkCG7TMSRu4Rp4n9UEIfpLnJbhpAVo5_KxLDpBGF6L-EUF05_GfQjiwtCZaf657s%3D) with KTVF-TV.

**My Statement on President Trump's Verdict**
---
Last week was an embarrassment to our judicial system and will have cascading effects on our legal system for years to come. The Democrats have weaponized our justice system and think they can use it to target their political opponents. Americans have watched this scam trial for weeks and saw it for exactly what it is: a joke. One person completely silent? Mary Peltola. Alaska deserves a representative who calls it like it is and speaks out against blatant attacks on justice. Alaskans stand with President Trump, and we will show our support at the ballot box this November.

clean_body: | | | Dear, Peter. It's been an eventful two weeks... We watched with horror as President Trump was found guilty in a political witch hunt through a weaponized system of justice. While Biden and his allies spend their political capital to "get Trump," they have ignored the lawlessness their open borders policies have unleashed along our southern border and in cities across America. We need tough, proven, conservative leadership, and that's exactly what I'll bring with me to Washington. I will work tirelessly to end Joe Biden's war on Alaskan energy, hold his weaponized justice system in check, and secure our wide open border by completing Trump's wall and returning to common-sense conservative policies that work. Our country is a mess right now, but help is on the way. Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | I am honored to have received support from leaders across Alaska and our country. We need to rebuild our country and we need to work together to do it. ✅ Anne Garland Young,Widow of Don Young ✅ Congressional Leadership Fund ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC ✅ WY Congresswoman Harriet Hageman ✅ E-PAC ✅ Value In Electing Women (VIEW) PAC | | | My Interview with KTVF-TV I sat down with KTVF-TV during my most recent visit to Fairbanks to discuss my campaign for Congress, my priorities, and my thoughts on the state of Alaska and our country. "I am very very concerned about what’s happening in our country. My husband and I have four kids. We have 11 grandkids, and what’s happening in our country is really just, it’s sickening . . . I watched what happened in the last congressional race and I thought, ‘I don’t want that to happen again.’ We need to have a strong Republican in Congress to represent the state of Alaska, and I believe I’m that person.” You can listen and watch the full interview with KTVF-TV. | My Statement on President Trump's Verdict Last week was an embarrassment to our judicial system and will have cascading effects on our legal system for years to come. The Democrats have weaponized our justice system and think they can use it to target their political opponents. Americans have watched this scam trial for weeks and saw it for exactly what it is: a joke. One person completely silent? Mary Peltola. Alaska deserves a representative who calls it like it is and speaks out against blatant attacks on justice. Alaskans stand with President Trump, and we will show our support at the ballot box this November. | My Interview with Alaska Energy Hour Last week, I joined Power the Future’s Rick Whitbeck on the to talk about my recent trip to the southern border, Alaska’s energy potential, and more. 📻 Listen Now In the interview, I highlighted my experiences while taking a night tour of the southern border, including watching as migrants walked along the Mexico side of President Trump’s border wall toward an opening left by Joe Biden and Mary Peltola. You can listen to the full interview with Power the Future by . | In case you missed it, I recently spoke with the about my run for Congress, the economy, and the need for natural resource development in Alaska. “We should be leading the nation in oil and gas development. We have tons of gas and oil in the ground, and we just need to drill and get it out. Renewables are great, but I’m confident we cannot rely just on renewables. The perfect thing is a blend of the renewables with oil and gas. We can take all the power from turbines and solar and that can feed into the system to help people." You can read my full interview with the Fairbanks Daily News-Miner . | | | | Capture the spirit of Alaska and support my campaign with our North to The Future mug! Your purchase boosts our voter outreach initiatives and helps spread my message across the state. Hurry, supplies are limited! Grab yours ! | Let's retire Mary Peltola. Remember, Peltola has a history of not showing up when it matters most. Time and again, she has failed to be present or votes "present" for crucial votes and discussions that shape Alaska's future. And when she does show up, she pushes a radical agenda that is out of touch with the values and needs of our great state. | Thanks for checking out the latest edition of the Dahlstrom Dispatch! Together, we can take back our conservative voice in Congress. Can't contribute financially? Don't worry! There are plenty of other ways to get involved. | | | | Was this email forwarded to you? If so, below to sign up for our Dahlstrom Dispatch and never miss a beat! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

body:
A country in North America actually pulled it off... now it’s our turn.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86572706/478304104/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240609macho_N_CD_NO_13_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjN2UwN2YzLTcwMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p1bpzxaXHrmERz1KmyfXtA5P5hd1zT5YOrXnWJlQ2ZM=)
---
Hi Peter,

Earlier this week, Mexico elected its first female president, Claudia Sheinbaum. This makes Sheinbaum the first female president in all of North America.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86572707/478304106/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240609macho_N_CD_NO_13_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjN2UwN2YzLTcwMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p1bpzxaXHrmERz1KmyfXtA5P5hd1zT5YOrXnWJlQ2ZM=)
---
It turns out, this moment was made possible by an extremely concerted effort to increase women’s participation in Mexico’s young democracy – including the passage of a **_gender parity law._** At Her Bold Move, we are taking this news seriously – and learning all we can about Mexico’s approach to gender parity in government.

According to a recent article by the _Washington Post_ , women in Mexico didn’t gain the right to vote for president until 1953 – about 70 years ago. Not to mention, as recently as 9 years ago, the country didn’t have even one female governor.

**Now, Mexico, a country “famous for its macho culture,” has surpassed the United States in gender parity.** In addition to electing Claudia Sheinbaum as president, women hold half the seats in Mexico’s legislature (almost **_DOUBLE_** the percent of the U.S. Congress), and women lead Mexico’s Supreme Court and central bank.

According to _FastCompany_ , "Almost as soon as the gender parity law was passed, the political arena in the country started to shift dramatically. Important changes, like decriminalizing abortion, soon followed."

[**This is a perfect example of the world we are working to build; a world in which women hold equal stakes in our government – and that representation is reflected in our country’s policies. Will you help fund our work towards this vision by chipping in $20.24 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86572708/478304108/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240609macho_N_CD_NO_13_G_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjN2UwN2YzLTcwMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p1bpzxaXHrmERz1KmyfXtA5P5hd1zT5YOrXnWJlQ2ZM=)

---
How did they get there? _The Washington Post_ writes, “Female politicians, lawyers, academics, and activists lobbied for years to set quotas for female candidates. In 2019, they succeeded, and Mexico passed a constitutional amendment **requiring parity** for all elected offices.”

Not a single member of Congress voted against it. – Can you imagine?!

To ensure that the laws stuck, they also established “strong institutions to interpret and enforce electoral laws.” Activists fought so hard that it became “costly” to oppose such initiatives, and “politicians who made sexist comments about female rivals could be stripped of the right to run [for office].”

Meanwhile, America is falling behind – even losing ground on progress we’ve made in this category since 2018. We can **_and we must_** implement the strategies that paved the way for Claudia Sheinbaum’s success. At Her Bold Move, we are building a movement to do just that. We have been putting together our own coalition of female politicians, lawyers, academics, and activists right here in the U.S. working together toward much-needed reform.

As we work to get individual women candidates elected – especially in states with abortion bans – we are also working to make this issue a priority for elected leaders and lawmakers. It will take activism from both angles to see the real change we’re looking to make within the next decade.

[**To commemorate this important moment in our continent’s history, will you join us in our work to ensure women are always in the rooms where decisions are being made by pitching in $20.24 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86572728/478304151/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240609macho_N_CD_NO_13_G_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjN2UwN2YzLTcwMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p1bpzxaXHrmERz1KmyfXtA5P5hd1zT5YOrXnWJlQ2ZM=)

Let’s do this,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager

Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXco33PEXnmKRrJTUgdqJ4mLtWzMrKZ4WZv28fCI_Qx8xAHOW-Yty_vD_D7bBhvDXKXfkiu0CvvRfmcKsBxay-EWEEfiWrbFbBqnva79r0CQopvS4rx5oVimAh9wACYqdS6FtjrgevYwFtuTLUoVFh0efFqirvEGrJ--WBuXjfhfbvxgYKpFaz4LgQiJQo471bR6MXo2zRG6L_9gZSx4TD1qBPXwfWnUmxemrnCiIhXV_1oSJjFdXRWED6dQoDZc-w/472/hMLDr_pHTeWfQe-8vH8a6A/h7/h001._9UrynkuXTWaDZvp3BpiCLFP7hG-so_lwQCtZrD-xoI) is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. clean_body: | | | With 9 days to go until the Virginia Primary, join Elizabeth Guzman today on Zoom at a Progressive Democrats of America town hall at Guzman came to America with $300 in her pocket, working three jobs at the same time to finish her education and become a social worker. She fought back against the rise of Donald Trump, defeating a MAGA Republican and becoming the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia House of Delegates. Elizabeth passed laws to raise the minimum wage, expand collective bargaining rights, and reduce gun violence. Now, she's just days away from her primary for Congress - and you can meet her online today. ****WHAT: WHEN: June 9, 4PM Eastern / 1PM Pacific WHERE: Virtually on Zoom! Can't make it? Thanks for your support, Guzman for Congress | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Now, she's running to continue the fight in Congress. To donate by check, send to: Guzman for Congress P.O. Box 1818 Woodbridge, VA 22195 \- \- Paid for by Guzman for Congress. subject: Jamie Raskin’s bold plan
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21509%2E4449941%2E6dn-l9)
---
**THE BAD NEWS:** Justices Alito and Thomas are far too biased to deliver an impartial ruling on Donald Trump’s January 6 case – Alito flew a flag in support of the Stop the Steal movement and Thomas’ wife was directly involved.

**THE GOOD NEWS:** Jamie Raskin has a plan – the Department of Justice can FORCE Justices Thomas and Alito to recuse themselves. | _But we need EVERY SINGLE Democrat to step up and demand it, so we’re launching an emergency poll to see what top Democrats think:_

**[_Do you think the Justice Department should force Justices Thomas and Alito to recuse themselves from Trump’s case?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=21509%2E4449941%2E6dn-l9)** | **[YES, OF COURSE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21509%2E4449941%2E6dn-l9)**
---
**[NO, THEY SHOULDN’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21509%2E4449941%2E6dn-l9)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=21509%2E4449941%2E6dn-l9)**
**POLL CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT, RESPOND NOW**
We all have to use our voice if we’re going to make this happen!

– FFR

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

**Team in case you didn’t already know, the issues you’re passionate about are the exact same issues NextGen PAC is fighting for. So when you invest in our movement, you’re sending the message that:**
🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️ Our right to love and live our lives authentically is unassailable and should be protected. 🏥⚕️ Abortion is healthcare, and healthcare is a basic human right. 🎓📚 College education should unlock opportunities, not drag us down in debt. 📈💰 Our economy should work for all of us, not just a wealthy few. 🪸🌱 Our planet and its resources should be protected. ✊🗣️ **Young Americans can and will make a difference in the fight to protect our democracy.**
While these statements may seem obvious to us, we know firsthand that fighting for what’s right isn’t always popular and it isn’t always easy.
MAGA extremists are determined to destroy our movement and undermine our efforts to make progress a reality.
**_We can’t let them win._**
If we’re going to vote out extremism this November, we need the resources to galvanize young voters across the country. **Because when young voters show up to the polls, we make a difference.**
[Folks, an investment of just $5 in this movement to amplify the youth agenda goes a long way toward victory in 2024 and beyond. Will you chip in right now so we can continue building up our network of over 2 million young voters ready and eager to get to the polls?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86573243/478305545/1051274364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U3Y2NhNy03MTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waGUcoGkL8M2GbaAiYwGUolIR22EO-xXcYfr69wa8wE=&emci=eff11dcc-f125-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b7e7cca7-7126-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)

#
Happy Pride Month, Peter!
Pride Month wouldn't be possible without courageous Americans who stood up against oppression and brutality in 1969 at the Stonewall Inn.
It wasn't the first time police raided the refuge for the LGBTQ+ community in Manhattan but, that night, led by Black and Latinx patrons, they said, "Enough!"
Despite the threat of losing their jobs or homes because of who they were and whom they loved, they protested for days and sparked the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement.
We've seen incredible progress in the years since, but some desperately continue to try and turn back the clock. From book bans to ending gender-affirming care, we must continue to fight back against this hateful and harmful rhetoric and legislation.
**[It's time for federal legislation to end discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans. If you agree, will you stand with me and demand action this Pride Month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86573268/478305574/-900359286?source=LOC_EM_PET_2024.06.09_B1_EqualityAct_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU3Y2NhNy03MTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q--wjV27OREI--9gfXnVI-NSpDZ8_xoZqNtt5sZJgbM=&emci=ff730977-4923-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bae7cca7-7126-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2727974)**
**[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86573269/478305575/-900359286?source=LOC_EM_PET_2024.06.09_B1_EqualityAct_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU3Y2NhNy03MTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q--wjV27OREI--9gfXnVI-NSpDZ8_xoZqNtt5sZJgbM=&emci=ff730977-4923-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bae7cca7-7126-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2727974)**
Onward,
Dick Durbin

Friend: It’s no secret that Senate control hinges on Sherrod Brown's seat in Ohio, and we're up against a millionaire, self-funding, MAGA Republican – Bernie Moreno. **But did you know that Moreno is also one of Donald Trump’s closest allies? **
Trump handpicked Moreno and personally campaigned for him during the Ohio Senate primary. Trump even offered up his personal club, Mar-a-Lago, for a fundraiser where Moreno raised $350,000 from Trump's megadonor friends – **and that's on top of the $4.5 MILLION that Moreno has already spent to self-fund his campaign.**

If Moreno wins in November, we already know he'll fall in line with Trump's MAGA agenda, putting the interests of the wealthiest 1% before Ohioans.** ** We can't let that happen – **but recent polls show Sherrod and Moreno _statistically tied,_ which means it's more important than ever to make sure Sherrod has the resources he needs to fight back. **
Sherrod doesn't have (or want) a bunch of ultra-wealthy dark-money donors dumping money into his campaign. He has something way better: this grassroots movement – including you, friend. **[So please, will you give $5 now to help us defeat Moreno, win this race, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86573613/478306901/691330008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk1964-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmU3Y2NhNy03MTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ug8LtQJrgQ0dgApVbGp-GkyEctII9LZIz2_xAl19X6g=)**

body:
"Why is Secretary Mayorkas singling me out?

|

| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=1)

Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=2) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
[Glendale, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/glendale-reception-june?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=3) \- Thursday, June 13th at 6:00 PM
Don’t miss this exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a private venue in Glendale. This special fundraising event includes a fireside chat, Q&A session, and a photo opportunity with RFK Jr.
[Albuquerque, New Mexico](https://www.kennedy24.com/recovering-america?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=4) \- Saturday, June 15th at 1:00 PM
Join in person for the world premiere of the new documentary film, ** _Recovering America_** , about the drug addiction crisis and hear from RFK Jr. about his own challenging road to recovery.
[Oklahoma City, Oklahoma](https://www.kennedy24.com/oklahoma-city-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=5) \- Monday, June 24th at 6:30 PM
You are invited to join RFK Jr. for an exclusive evening in the vibrant heart of Oklahoma City. This is your chance to contribute and help shape the future of our nation.
* * *
RFK Jr.: Why Is Secretary Mayorkas Singling Me Out?
In response to my father’s assassination 56 years ago, Congress began offering Secret Service protection to all serious presidential candidates, even those without a party nomination.
I’ve requested protection five times, but despite the Secret Service’s evaluation that I am at elevated risk, President Biden’s Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas has continued to deny me.
Mayorkas has absolute discretion to make this decision. Why do you think he has singled me out as the first candidate since my dad’s death to be denied protection?
[Please sign this petition urging the Biden White House to reconsider this undemocratic decision and grant me Secret Service protection.](http://www.kennedy24.com/security-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=6)
[SIGN NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/security-petition?=&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=7)
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/security-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_9_24_rnd1&n=8)
|

Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. Kennedy Jr. at a private venue in Glendale. This special fundraising event includes a fireside chat, Q&A session, and a photo opportunity with RFK Jr. \- Saturday, June 15th at 1:00 PM Join in person for the world premiere of the new documentary film, Recovering America , about the drug addiction crisis and hear from RFK Jr. about his own challenging road to recovery. \- Monday, June 24th at 6:30 PM You are invited to join RFK Jr. for an exclusive evening in the vibrant heart of Oklahoma City. This is your chance to contribute and help shape the future of our nation. RFK Jr.: Why Is Secretary Mayorkas Singling Me Out? In response to my father’s assassination 56 years ago, Congress began offering Secret Service protection to all serious presidential candidates, even those without a party nomination. I’ve requested protection five times, but despite the Secret Service’s evaluation that I am at elevated risk, President Biden’s Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas has continued to deny me. Mayorkas has absolute discretion to make this decision. name: Scott Parkinson
subject: Matthew 17:20
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Campaigning on a Sunday is tough. This morning I went to Powhatan for church. About 5 weeks ago I was in deep Southwest Virginia. At the end of the event, I was speaking with a Virginian when I felt a tug on the elbow of my jacket. I looked down and there was a woman in her late 70’s, probably 4’10” tall. She said, “I’m praying for YOU.” It was one of those moments that’s stood out over the past year and a half. My family and I are so appreciative of the prayers we’ve received. For those wondering, we often ask for prayers of safety (because we drive thousands of miles on the car every week), prayers of wisdom, clarity, and discernment (because God’s path is not always the easiest path to take), and prayers for my wife and our four children. For those that have heard my stump speech, you’ve heard me talk about Matthew 17:20.
---
---
For 18 months, I’ve held FAITH that we can win this race. I’ve traveled to all corners of Virginia, planting mustard seeds and growing our faith journey with tens of thousands of Virginians. Sometimes people question whether I can actually defeat Tim Kaine. This week, Real Clear Politics moved Virginia to a “Toss Up” State on the Electoral College Map.
---
---
| | The data is moving our direction. It’s a mountain we’ve moved by building a movement to save the middle class by stopping Bidenflation, ending the illegal alien invasion, and preventing the indoctrination of children, and fighting alongside Donald Trump. On Thursday afternoon, I had a call with my campaign team where we went over the budget. I was challenged to raise $20,000 by Sunday night so we can expand our voter contact campaign. I worked hard and many friends and family stepped up with contributions as small as $25 and one as big as the individual maximum of $3,300. And a lot of people have $100. Every dollar adds up to help us hit our goals. And we hit that goal yesterday — as long as a few pledged get their contribution submitted today. So I’ve set a new goal: raise $50,000 more over the final 9 days. Every dollar we raise will be spent directly on voter contact. Not consultants or staff expenses. Is $50,000 more possible over such a short timeframe? I have the FAITH we can do it. And my faith is bigger than a mustard seed. Please donate now!
---
[$25](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/97994b896f0f28093947229f28c3afba/c0fb0648d030bd16c3d6b838967d376c/42903)

---
[$250](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/97994b896f0f28093947229f28c3afba/8bce500ae218b6d8c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
[$1,000](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/97994b896f0f28093947229f28c3afba/5d2be60bd5fcd79ec3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
[$3,000](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/97994b896f0f28093947229f28c3afba/a090a752e9fe2b7ac3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
God bless you all. God bless America.Scott 🙏🏻🇺🇸🙏🏻
---

name: Diana
subject: re: I just selected you to represent Pennsylvania! –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It's Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That's why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn't get an answer from you -- and now he's 10 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: June 8, 2024
Subject: I selected you to represent Pennsylvania -
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I'm real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)
---

I've been in politics a LONG time, and I'll be honest, **I don't think I've ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we'll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Senate Republicans will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman's right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don't get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate this year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJune/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240609-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15163%2E9716520%2EHukGhX)

name: yes or no (via NewDems)
subject: live poll for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
VP Harris is the future

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86574239/478309323/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTVmNGNiYy03MzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPq9pheA_JTnT50wdcFizF4rPIinHmVkaAse-an9Fpw=)

name: D. Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I have to be transparent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
My team and I had to call a weekend meeting
| | |
---
This is never an easy email to send, friend. We're nearly a third of the way through June, and I want to be completely transparent about where things stand right now.
**I just had an emergency meeting with my finance team and, unfortunately, we’re falling short of our $700,000 mid-June goal.** **We still need to raise $103,237 in the next week if we want to close the gap. **[**And with the future of our democracy at stake this November, I can’t afford to miss this goal. Will you chip in $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575111/478312702/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1350-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzM5NjY3ZDgtNzUyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SU8WRgaD8ha9ZIQ62WCb-KivGRsbwP82EExV71ckqac=)
As the general election nears and things continue to ramp up in the second quarter, all eyes are on us to see how much money we raise and how deep this support goes. From Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell, everyone will use my fundraising numbers to test the strength of this grassroots campaign. That's why it's _critical_ to meet this goal, and why I'm counting on you to help.
While my opponent, one of the richest senators in the country, is more than capable of self-funding his campaign, I'm fully relying on grassroots support from people like you to help me fight for Florida's future.
We can’t keep letting politicians like Rick Scott buy their seat. **We have to do something about it, which means we have to win.** Every dollar counts, friend, and that means every dollar could be the difference between winning or losing in November.
**We have to stay ahead of our fundraising goal if we want a good chance at defeating Rick Scott and flipping Florida. This could set the tone for the rest of the race. **[**So please, will you help close this gap by donating $5 or more so that I can win in Florida and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575112/478312703/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1350-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzM5NjY3ZDgtNzUyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SU8WRgaD8ha9ZIQ62WCb-KivGRsbwP82EExV71ckqac=)

clean_body: My team and I had to call a weekend meeting | | | This is never an easy email to send, friend. We're nearly a third of the way through June, and I want to be completely transparent about where things stand right now. I just had an emergency meeting with my finance team and, unfortunately, we’re falling short of our $700,000 mid-June goal. We still need to raise $103,237 in the next week if we want to close the gap. = As the general election nears and things continue to ramp up in the second quarter, all eyes are on us to see how much money we raise and how deep this support goes. From Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell, everyone will use my fundraising numbers to test the strength of this grassroots campaign. That's why it's critical to meet this goal, and why I'm counting on you to help. While my opponent, one of the richest senators in the country, is more than capable of self-funding his campaign, I'm fully relying on grassroots support from people like you to help me fight for Florida's future. We can’t keep letting politicians like Rick Scott buy their seat. We have to do something about it, which means we have to win. Every dollar counts, friend, and that means every dollar could be the difference between winning or losing in November. We have to stay ahead of our fundraising goal if we want a good chance at defeating Rick Scott and flipping Florida. This could set the tone for the rest of the race. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support. I couldn't do this without you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
This is a make-or-break moment
| | |
---
Friend — when I saw this news, I was sick to my stomach:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575094/478312682/-1374272946?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5088-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk2NjdkOC03NTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLRBi2bthViYag88SOCa34tZIE7YgB3Uw96x9c1Xb2Y=)
This means my race to retire Rick Scott could decide BOTH the Senate majority and the majority leader.

If we thought the current GOP Senate leadership was bad, we really don't want the guy whose agenda was too extreme for Mitch McConnell to take his place. He already laid out his plan for the country:
❌Pass a national abortion ban
❌End Medicare and Social Security
❌Raise taxes on the middle class
**Now more than ever, it is vital that we kick him to the curb this November.**
[**So please, friend, we need to raise $250,000 by midnight to make sure this nightmare won't come true. I'm counting on you to do your part before 11:59 p.m. and split $5 or anything you can between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to help me flip Florida blue, defend our Democratic majority, and block a Rick Scott-led Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575095/478312683/-1374272946?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5088-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk2NjdkOC03NTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLRBi2bthViYag88SOCa34tZIE7YgB3Uw96x9c1Xb2Y=)
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575097/478312684/-1374272946?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5088-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk2NjdkOC03NTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLRBi2bthViYag88SOCa34tZIE7YgB3Uw96x9c1Xb2Y=)
---
**Make no mistake: Mitch McConnell's time as Senate GOP leader was one of the worst things to ever happen to the Senate.** It will take years for our country and our democracy to fully recover from his decades of corruption, cronyism, extremism, and obstruction.

**But Rick Scott as Senate GOP leader would be much, much worse.**
He oversaw one of the biggest Medicare frauds in U.S. history and used the money to buy his seat. Then he wrote the plan to raise taxes on working families and end Medicare and Social Security. THEN, he co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions that could send doctors to prison. All that destruction and he's only been in the Senate for a single term. **Imagine what he could do as GOP leader.**

In short — Rick Scott shouldn't be allowed to step foot in the U.S. Senate, let alone lead the GOP caucus, whether they have the majority or not.

But with McConnell out of the way, Scott is under the impression that this will be an easy win. **I need your help to prove him wrong.**
**This is a make-or-break moment not just for my campaign but for our entire country.[My team set a $250,000 emergency fundraising goal to make sure we never see a Rick Scott-led Senate, and it will take each and every one of us doing our part to hit it. I'm hoping I can count on you to split just $5 between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to make sure we don't fall short so we can defeat Rick Scott.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575098/478312685/-1374272946?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5088-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk2NjdkOC03NTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLRBi2bthViYag88SOCa34tZIE7YgB3Uw96x9c1Xb2Y=)**

name: Eileen Filler-Corn
subject: Before I put on sunscreen and head out the door to talk to voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eileen for Congress

I’ve been in tough races before, so I know just how far contributions of any amount can go in a competitive election. A contribution, no matter how large or small, means more doors knocked and more ads aired — which means more voters going to the polls!
VA-10 just flipped from red to blue in 2018, ending decades of Republican control in what was formerly a GOP stronghold. Following the 2018 elections, Republicans have waited for their opportunity to take back the seat – and without an incumbent on the ballot, Republicans see this year as their best shot.
**My experience and record show that I can get the job done and protect Virginians from Republican chaos and extremism. Now is the time to think big and prepare for the future, not just for Virginia but for all Americans.**
[_**Peter, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t absolutely critical to winning this election. Can I count on you to donate to my campaign for VA-10 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86575278/478313248/-167990570?refcode=E8908-20240609-EileenGOTV-SL-GOTV&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNhYjkxZC03NjI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSxfN_dwfaaf3vnlSh2WsNqWDOJhUwEnfxpTXklwNJ8=)

— Eileen

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: My parents weren’t politicians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
Hi Derek,
**[I hope you’ll give me a few minutes to explain why your split donation today would be so impactful for my reelection and Adam Schiff's campaign.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=june2024_abs_em_heinrich.l2CXZD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240609_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=6661%2E5257348%2E6TDfhR)**
**My multi-millionaire challenger has already flooded New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race with half a million of her personal fortune. That’s only the beginning.**
She has a long career as a hedge fund executive and is the daughter of the last Republican elected to the U.S. Senate in New Mexico.
My parents weren’t politicians — my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker.
I was a mechanical engineer before I went into politics, not the former CFO of the largest hedge fund in the world.
I’m not in this fight to prop up Wall Street. I’m running for re-election to continue delivering meaningful change for New Mexico, like protecting reproductive rights, passing more common-sense gun safety legislation, and taking action on climate change.
**But my Republican challenger already has the support of Mitch McConnell’s allies, who are dead-set on flipping New Mexico, taking back the Senate, and enacting an extreme agenda.**
**[Will you help my team face off against a Republican opponent who has already started self-funding her campaign to defeat me? Please split $10 or any amount to my re-election campaign and Adam Schiff today to help put us on a path to victory:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em_heinrich.rTrh64&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240609_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=6661%2E5257348%2E6TDfhR)**
