name: Jennifer McCormick
subject: Investing in Our Children's Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Dear Peter, I’ve seen firsthand the transformative power of a strong public education system. Education is the foundation upon which we build our future, and every child in Indiana deserves access to high-quality schooling. However, our current system is under threat. Over the past twenty years, we’ve witnessed drastic cuts to education funding, an overreliance on standardized testing, and policies that undermine our teachers, **[and that’s why I’m asking if you’ll stand with our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86576711/478318257/690963215?refcode=240609future&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE1NzhlYi03ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PsL4cjXN-ZoPCrK77VUtDlEyNaiz05hqr4v-aYoCZy0=)**

Indiana’s educators are some of the most dedicated professionals you’ll find, yet they’re often overworked and underpaid. Our classrooms are overcrowded, and resources are stretched thin. This is not the way to prepare our children for the challenges of tomorrow.

I’m running for governor because I believe we can do better. We must invest in our public schools, support our teachers, and ensure that every child has the opportunity to succeed. Here’s how we can achieve this:

1. **Increase Education Funding:** We need to ensure that our schools have the necessary resources to provide a well-rounded education. This includes up-to-date textbooks, technology, and safe learning environments.
2. **Support Our Teachers:** Our educators deserve competitive salaries and professional development opportunities. By investing in our teachers, we invest in our children’s futures.
3. **Reduce Classroom Sizes:** Smaller class sizes allow for more individualized attention and better learning outcomes. Wemust hire more teachers and build additional classrooms to make this a reality.
4. **Expand Early Childhood Education:** Early education is crucial for long-term success. We need to provide access to quality pre-K programs for all Hoosier children.

**[Your support is crucial in making these changes a reality. Together, we can build a brighter future for Indiana’s children. Will you join me in this fight for better education by donating to my campaign and the IDP? Your contribution will help us reach more voters and spread our message across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86576712/478318258/690963215?refcode=240609future&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE1NzhlYi03ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PsL4cjXN-ZoPCrK77VUtDlEyNaiz05hqr4v-aYoCZy0=)** | | | [DONATE NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86576713/478318259/690963215?refcode=240609future&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE1NzhlYi03ODI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PsL4cjXN-ZoPCrK77VUtDlEyNaiz05hqr4v-aYoCZy0=)
---

Thank you for standing with me in support of our schools and our students. Together, we can ensure that every child in Indiana has the opportunity to succeed.

With gratitude,
Jennifer McCormick

**[P.S. Education is the key to our future. Let’s invest in it today. clean_body: | Dear Peter, I’ve seen firsthand the transformative power of a strong public education system. Education is the foundation upon which we build our future, and every child in Indiana deserves access to high-quality schooling. However, our current system is under threat. Over the past twenty years, we’ve witnessed drastic cuts to education funding, an overreliance on standardized testing, and policies that undermine our teachers, = Indiana’s educators are some of the most dedicated professionals you’ll find, yet they’re often overworked and underpaid. Our classrooms are overcrowded, and resources are stretched thin. This is not the way to prepare our children for the challenges of tomorrow. I’m running for governor because I believe we can do better. We must invest in our public schools, support our teachers, and ensure that every child has the opportunity to succeed. Here’s how we can achieve this: 1. Increase Education Funding: We need to ensure that our schools have the necessary resources to provide a well-rounded education. This includes up-to-date textbooks, technology, and safe learning environments. 2. Support Our Teachers: Our educators deserve competitive salaries and professional development opportunities. By investing in our teachers, we invest in our children’s futures. 3. Reduce Classroom Sizes: Smaller class sizes allow for more individualized attention and better learning outcomes. Wemust hire more teachers and build additional classrooms to make this a reality. 4. Expand Early Childhood Education: Early education is crucial for long-term success. We need to provide access to quality pre-K programs for all Hoosier children. = | | | = Thank you for standing with me in support of our schools and our students. Together, we can ensure that every child in Indiana has the opportunity to succeed. With gratitude, Jennifer McCormick = [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Vote for my husband, Rick Becker, for Congress!

body:
He loves our state and our country, and he is committed to working with President Donald J. Trump to secure the southern border, combat Biden’s... | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rickbecker2024/campaignannouncement-17379680?e=d842fb25cc)

[](https://rickbecker2024.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d6930e918a0489c6f7d6bb50&id=cd3ad6a353&e=d842fb25cc)
| Dear Peter,

Election Day is on Tuesday, and the last day to return your absentee ballot is tomorrow!

Polls open across North Dakota on Tuesday at 7:00 AM, and I am asking you to vote for my husband, Rick Becker, for Congress.

Not only is Rick a great father and wonderful husband, but he’s also a true leader who is very passionate about North Dakota’s future. He loves our state and our country, and he is committed to working with President Donald J. Trump to secure the southern border, combat Biden’s inflation, and restore common sense in our nation’s capital.
---
[](https://rickbecker2024.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d6930e918a0489c6f7d6bb50&id=af442b3509&e=d842fb25cc)
| There is no denying that the past three and a half years have been challenging. Inflation is skyrocketing, our southern border is being invaded, and our rights as citizens are being threatened by those who claim to represent us in Washington.

My husband has no interest in overstaying his welcome in Congress. He is only running because there’s not another America-First candidate on the ballot who truly represents North Dakota’s conservative values.

The choice has never been more clear. We cannot afford to maintain the status quo, and that’s why I ask you to join me in voting for my husband, Rick Becker, on Tuesday.

Polls open at 7:00 AM and close at 7:00 PM on Tuesday. [Click here](https://rickbecker2024.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d6930e918a0489c6f7d6bb50&id=a03fe732ed&e=d842fb25cc) to find your polling location, and please make sure to get out and vote for Rick Becker!

Thank you so much for your support,
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://rickbecker2024.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d6930e918a0489c6f7d6bb50&id=c0ab21cc9d&e=d842fb25cc)
| Anne Becker

---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7c303691716a4a3b8223a314dceebc70&_t=C0zAoQiidR7JIXTIq1ZfxDKfp98kthRSavgyKlJc6_GwiUtfSiFW02IcVVx7hP9HJeibUl0Ixq5tELeenZnzP4uHI8MxztWPmb5XLQAVBnpGrgOFYGcL0aD9n-2bqKPy)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c303691716a4a3b8223a314dceebc70&_e=mIYaKidLBy8MJwlecec2UKTL-R9IErtNhevX1ad5x5sltopo7tQTpg8spnoEunjPDK0TLA8HLPfbXUlj35Njqp9hlDQsUK-vbjEXgE_46xyH15LP4WGtfgpKP1ZJpf03kU7ZHKY-jZAv7h5N3cN573zwBWK72cRHxeNhZLSmuH7Z8o4wOVYEDLr0N6sMQV9krW1ywf6-pajWxClso1UEDoJ7sWHU6kJksbDZ8yBTidS4D8zGJMfz2KaQWs3uGFrefAjzdCIKUCRXuFJKA-Uo_X-B4rzIMWa_C9-lYbQ_BeKE6pdRPDEOJIZyKIxda9L_WcB7bxUTOthF5zbFTEvW8xECgtE3sWDjKwJRPGujMuwfonYuwZubXXw7HtOFidUH1406Y3cVUSd46G65XOwf7eIV4SK57oD0MamTQn63L-w%3D)
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c303691716a4a3b8223a314dceebc70&_e=mIYaKidLBy8MJwlecec2UKTL-R9IErtNhevX1ad5x5sltopo7tQTpg8spnoEunjPDK0TLA8HLPfbXUlj35Njqp9hlDQsUK-vbjEXgE_46xyH15LP4WGtfgpKP1ZJpf03kU7ZHKY-jZAv7h5N3cN573zwBWK72cRHxeNhZLSmuH7Z8o4wOVYEDLr0N6sMQV9krW1ywf6-pajWxClso1UEDoJ7sWHU6kJksbDZ8yBTidS4D8zGJMfz2KaQWs3uGFrefAjzdCIKUCRXuFJKA-Uo_TATxgfk9GQeVi6bIuX7akxrYh_atFbPBCf3ulCjB6t12DSTs2pRwKL5H1fejw69Gmq8zeiSsl8TiHRbirYcxudREmvr-PalOHAzJtDSi3FDj7GLSmdmaXWCNpwKjHX_Q5G4CdfTC8RS6N2jXzXa_K0%3D)
Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c303691716a4a3b8223a314dceebc70&_e=mIYaKidLBy8MJwlecec2UKTL-R9IErtNhevX1ad5x5sltopo7tQTpg8spnoEunjPDK0TLA8HLPfbXUlj35Njqp9hlDQsUK-vbjEXgE_46xyH15LP4WGtfgpKP1ZJpf03kU7ZHKY-jZAv7h5N3cN573zwBWK72cRHxeNhZLSmuH7Z8o4wOVYEDLr0N6sMQV9krW1ywf6-pajWxClso1UEDoJ7sWHU6kJksbDZ8yBTidS4D8zGJMfz2KaQWs3uGFrefAjzdCIKUCRXuFJKA-Uo_e4Oa-b0dWE6tm2dbDtOhyX5TePsgDOJ8m5x8GXjpDR-fdRMOW7-2PD5-n1oGd6cDThsb9NyFKYCRX1quaT9wAJqstK3Yr8qiI8M0h6sQdEMCu1sFPaEJLbY9u6EjrCBiWKPdi_zISKkZkDh_nCwl_U%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c303691716a4a3b8223a314dceebc70&_e=mIYaKidLBy8MJwlecec2UKTL-R9IErtNhevX1ad5x5sltopo7tQTpg8spnoEunjPDK0TLA8HLPfbXUlj35Njqp9hlDQsUK-vbjEXgE_46xyH15LP4WGtfgpKP1ZJpf03kU7ZHKY-jZAv7h5N3cN573zwBWK72cRHxeNhZLSmuH7Z8o4wOVYEDLr0N6sMQV9krW1ywf6-pajWxClso1UEDoJ7sWHU6kJksbDZ8yBTidS4D8zGJMfz2KaQWs3uGFrefAjzdCIKUCRXuFJKA-Uo_QKdCOm_dUoVeQKGl_l3wbAwf-_yrQc97kLMEq1supwnWa4xiSuafwUqkyT3zpfkxZJ1fTziry9RN-w-ixyHF7xn4AFx2D21s1H5F5fS8eFmad7IG9fjtVIackO-RbwAkBHbnNUDtGPn9xcRu2iV_8I%3D)**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

body:

Peter — We want to explain why Tammy’s counting on your support today: Republicans are going all out to flip this seat **red**.

name: Team DASS
subject: nearly 80 election deniers are working in election oversight positions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86577102/478319648/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzgzYmI1Ni03OTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PkyvBhX784_CbeEa4OqI0OuVROiv6iHnQ-DfyrZeVz0=)
CBS News just released a shocking new report and revealed that **nearly 80 election deniers** are working in election oversight positions:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86577103/478319651/-209663063?refcode=em-6.9.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzgzYmI1Ni03OTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PkyvBhX784_CbeEa4OqI0OuVROiv6iHnQ-DfyrZeVz0=) You read that right: the key swing states of Georgia, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, Arizona, and Nevada, have election deniers running some local elections. subject: I’m ready for Tuesday’s primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
The primary election is the first critical step in HOLDING this seat for Lowcountry Republicans. |
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=543fe6bddf3644a4b315ec93537f5666&_e=vG9CxxB0ojvtLPT1HWst2VVTLSl5IjuC1GX7z_6AZ5BTNVUYPq4lMs8dpgvp6CdQEZ-eENWnwc6Vk99FkzMG5d1L4c_GPry0km0BTMBwimJ0DOJWLzRGFkFbHzl0rly6yU_D9Qwa6pPoIpIE_6mzxlJFncV5iU1VPSTiG6p3CbCGkv499Vb5bSxXrodx8bX7fQcBSbfdqzEF3ZUJ32t2bYFQFOEN0dZGHIkM959DNAgL8uMIQ2VbiQiaqenFZZXgAb6nO1WlMwH5CVLykze8VAfotRDv0SJ1UOZ_E11YtMuJGKQA994AWo45iXLW2q6RDcR_vIiTilg1xHt05myIcmIGQ7RzQjIPdQ2dVrvfJvSlah3jtJ2iRjQ7p-ItqiY21-KgqA3N446VRLe4oH9H6kQmviaOgR5VDVk6ecf5CgQ%3D)
---
Peter,

This Tuesday, June 11th, 2024, is the South Carolina primary election. I need all my strongest supporters like you, Peter, to make a plan to VOTE REPUBLICAN ON TUESDAY.

I’ve run a clean campaign focused on the issues and what my leadership will bring to the Lowcountry if I am granted another term in Congress.

My opponent focused on attacking me and my family, lying about my record, and intentionally misleading voters about my positions and beliefs.

**_Bless her heart._**

Lowcountry voters know the truth about my time in Congress and that I can be counted on to stand for conservative principles and work with President Trump to pass the America First agenda and undo the damage Joe Biden and far-left Democrats have done to our state and country.

[**I’ve written a Primary Election Pledge of Support for your signature, Peter.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=543fe6bddf3644a4b315ec93537f5666&_e=vG9CxxB0ojvtLPT1HWst2VVTLSl5IjuC1GX7z_6AZ5BTNVUYPq4lMs8dpgvp6CdQEZ-eENWnwc6Vk99FkzMG5d1L4c_GPry0km0BTMBwimJ0DOJWLzRGFkFbHzl0rly6yU_D9Qwa6pPoIpIE_6mzxlJFncV5iU1VPSTiG6p3CbCGkv499Vb5bSxXrodx8bX7fQcBSbfdqzEF3ZUJ32t2bYFQFOEN0dZGHIkM959DNAgL8uMIQ2VbiQiaqenFZZXgkQk1QZkrTT6k3xe36A5onzvTHt3xjFPG9y-QR33KIXsqgimbRLB5OMX3GW-9IJIzgh7172Bu2qJVuSiAoGDZpZKDxch42Y7IzSbnh23EF7FDXPrn-adKfjXnNQLvKE4mMXJbXEy18Ovcx2U5mZZ0buzx0v-0OEZm473Zx2mRkPA%3D)

**I’m reaching out because you have a history of supporting my campaigns and my work in Washington for the Lowcountry.**

[**Please sign my Pledge of Support today.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=543fe6bddf3644a4b315ec93537f5666&_e=vG9CxxB0ojvtLPT1HWst2VVTLSl5IjuC1GX7z_6AZ5BTNVUYPq4lMs8dpgvp6CdQEZ-eENWnwc6Vk99FkzMG5d1L4c_GPry0km0BTMBwimJ0DOJWLzRGFkFbHzl0rly6yU_D9Qwa6pPoIpIE_6mzxlJFncV5iU1VPSTiG6p3CbCGkv499Vb5bSxXrodx8bX7fQcBSbfdqzEF3ZUJ32t2bYFQFOEN0dZGHIkM959DNAgL8uMIQ2VbiQiaqenFZZXgX_MdWKeP6-0M-wvpUde_FUwUWkr45UILAIbdT52Boda5QGoYxv6ps6_-HKugqHloyVpGznvBnTau07mMPG7cLUGmVzb8v7zByvbrOK77eR8iBk2lPxfoF-8YsBVmn7GC-t30pOpQbieknyB_wZGfuoeNnzRwMq_oEHDv84Xh1SA%3D)

[ ** SIGN NOW » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=543fe6bddf3644a4b315ec93537f5666&_e=vG9CxxB0ojvtLPT1HWst2VVTLSl5IjuC1GX7z_6AZ5BTNVUYPq4lMs8dpgvp6CdQEZ-eENWnwc6Vk99FkzMG5d1L4c_GPry0km0BTMBwimJ0DOJWLzRGFkFbHzl0rly6yU_D9Qwa6pPoIpIE_6mzxlJFncV5iU1VPSTiG6p3CbCGkv499Vb5bSxXrodx8bX7fQcBSbfdqzEF3ZUJ32t2bYFQFOEN0dZGHIkM959DNAgL8uMIQ2VbiQiaqenFZZXg8kl8gnDB_WJ6JLO1h1fupz68R9vuR-i5BHz_YkAkwcMXaX_IMHVan2PaSna5j-XSmjUsSLkFvKjnY1KzbFBgguDdwMB11uvsrvh2NPHC-dEwRed6sMaWgvs7ilWizIhRiZh5X56tLkvmNKLzv967K0P47q003cJzJOxPIfTrJjs%3D)

Gratefully,

Nancy Mace
P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress.

| |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

clean_body: The primary election is the first critical step in HOLDING this seat for Lowcountry Republicans. | Peter, This Tuesday, June 11th, 2024, is the South Carolina primary election. I need all my strongest supporters like you, Peter, to make a plan to VOTE REPUBLICAN ON TUESDAY. I’ve run a clean campaign focused on the issues and what my leadership will bring to the Lowcountry if I am granted another term in Congress. My opponent focused on attacking me and my family, lying about my record, and intentionally misleading voters about my positions and beliefs. Bless her heart. Lowcountry voters know the truth about my time in Congress and that I can be counted on to stand for conservative principles and work with President Trump to pass the America First agenda and undo the damage Joe Biden and far-left Democrats have done to our state and country. I’m reaching out because you have a history of supporting my campaigns and my work in Washington for the Lowcountry. Gratefully, Nancy Mace P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress. | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. go.txting.io/mEWDMy | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

subject: Can you help my father in Texas?

body:
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>

| | | Fellow Conservative, Donald Trump, Jr. here - As you know, my father is under attack from the Biden White House and numerous absolutely unhinged persons using and abusing the American legal system to try and take him down. We also have Biden and the Democrats spending millions on ads falsely smearing us all and working to register as many far-left voters as possible before November. **But** _**we have another huge problem**_**you haven't heard about. We have an extremely close Senate race in Texas, and****Senator Ted Cruz needs urgent help****. We saw** _**Chuck Schumer**_**boasting just this week that the Democrats will win Texas and keep the U.S. Senate... ** Fellow Conservative, we can't let that happen. If the Democrats take Texas, they'll keep the Senate and use senatorial power to stop the MAGA movement and block everything my father wants to accomplish-_including a full investigation of the Washington Swamp!_ Ted Cruz is a proven America First warrior, and we need him in the Senate fighting for us all. **[I urge you to chip in a donation to help him KEEP TEXAS RED for me and my body:

| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70031?t=6&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70031?t=7&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70031?t=8&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70031?t=9&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70031?t=10&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15021%2E878179%2ErmVgP7).**

1. Democrats are clinging to a SINGLE SEAT majority. \*\*Flipping this seat will put an immediate end to their majority.\*\*

2. This race is the closest battleground Senate race in the ENTIRE country. \*\*Polling shows me and Tammy Baldwin in a TIED RACE at 50-50.\*\*

3. My Democrat opponent has raised millions and is receiving millions more from Chuck Schumer to keep this seat.

Every single dollar you donate will make a critical difference in a race that will be decided by just a handful of votes. \*\*That’s why I’m only asking you to pitch in just $5 to show Democrats we have the grassroots support necessary to flip this MUST-WIN Senate seat.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=10340987.4395.1.85af340978f195ecfc60262698c23778 )

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: $2 for Ruben, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is a campaign built on the support of thousands of people from all walks of life. We don’t just go after big checks from Q Anon millionaires or MAGA billionaires, like Kari Lake does.
#

You read that right, Peter.
We’re not asking you for $50, or $20, or $10, even $5.
Just $2 today.
This is a campaign built on the support of thousands of people from all walks of life. We don’t just go after big checks from Q Anon millionaires or MAGA billionaires, like Kari Lake does. We’re not making ridiculous promises to corporate special interests in exchange for millions of dollars like Trump does.
This is a campaign built by normal people. And we believe — strongly — that we’re better off this way. Because when Ruben goes to the Senate, he won't be representing the wealthy, or the well connected.
He’ll be there for you, and for a ton of other people like you.
So, yes. $2.
[**Can you chip in $2 to Ruben’s campaign today, Peter. It’d mean a lot to us, especially with a critical FEC fundraising deadline coming up at the end of the month.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240609-1-160&t=1&akid=2449%2E734936%2EC48W7L)
[CHIP IN $2](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2650?c0=ruben-em-june24.V_UsDd&refcode=em240609-1-160&t=2&akid=2449%2E734936%2EC48W7L)
Or, if you want to give more than that, it’d mean a lot to us.
[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2650?c0=ruben-em-june24.V_UsDd&refcode=em240609-1-160&t=3&akid=2449%2E734936%2EC48W7L)
Either way, we’re grateful you’re with us. Even if you can’t give today.
Thanks a lot,
Team Gallego

clean_body: I didn’t come to Congress for profit or to get involved in partisan drama – I came here to do the work a 50-year Republican stronghold failed to do for West Michiganders. | = | A lot gets lost amidst Republican attacks on this district. But, I didn’t come to Congress for profit or to get involved in partisan drama – I came here to do the work a 50-year Republican stronghold failed to do for West Michiganders. In my first year in Congress, I’ve fought attacks on reproductive rights, tackled climate change, and worked to end gun violence in our country. I’m so proud of the work I’ve started, but it is far from over. | = National Republicans have left no doubt that they are coming after this seat, and they’re hellbent on rolling back our progress. Now, with new polling showing Trump ahead of President Biden in Michigan, they’re ramping up their efforts to unseat me. = | = | = | = | = | = This district is crucial to taking back the House and preventing a second Trump presidency. I hope I can count on your support. Thanks so much, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Bloated ankles
subject: The ROOT cause of swollen feet?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Your lymphatic system acts as a
one-way detox channel for your body…
It filters and carries cellular
waste and harmful bacteria into your bloodstream for your liver &
kidneys to process and flush out…
It also plays an important part
in delivering essential nutrients all the way from your brain to
the bottoms of your feet.
Over time, these lymphatic
channels can break down, age, and congest - rendering them
USELESS… often resulting in swollen tissue around your
legs, ankles, and feet.
If you've noticed your ankles are
a little puffier… your shoes feel tighter… or your
socks are leaving a red ring around your ankles…
You may find relief when you feed
your body UNIQUE FATTY ACIDS recently found to support healthy
lymphatic function… help to remove clogs… and
increase lymphatic flow.
⇒ eat THIS fat once a day to
relieve swelling & pain
As always-to being & staying on
The Path together.

-Dr. Chad Walding
DPT, ISSA Nutrition Specialist &
NativePath Co-Founder

body:
Since May 16th, AIPAC has spent more than $10.9 million against Jamaal Bowman. | | | Peter, we did the math. [We even launched our own website to track it](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUt9x2zVWgvwZZxpfCnwM7Nwjfd-yKnJJirm24qHFOU3h4LjAR0pe3txigZfofcRmDokEpKoO2yVpgaIQqx3Z1hqlRiA6HIH8d-xjA0ZiHiQnkdFespiA3wFfxKel1W2O4q0tTdiFSZFZtqttjAvAqSNouBsSCSAngmNRr5PXugGkKQCV2PMJvi2mFUw5PvSms-uWCd7l29yFAeCYcyVoOA2WSU3cliHR9Jain8T-shUH04lheZCQSUvQKKj0cpNWXHRf2q5v79adZU_OWX01KY/472/jFgwmw8qQCG6JN1nmw8qgw/h0/h001.i5dyzqrMydKxZ1xB9MCXZMJDxuqNpfWHjEbOWY5LTcE): **Since May 16th, AIPAC has spent more than $10.9 million against Jamaal Bowman.** _That’s almost half a million dollars PER DAY._ And they’ve committed to spending even MORE over the coming weeks — before Jamaal Bowman’s primary on June 25th — in the hopes of unseating one of the strongest progressive champions in Congress. **[Please split a contribution between Jamaal Bowman and WFP right now. AIPAC and their GOP megadonors are ramping up their attacks, and we’ll need every resource at our disposal if we’re going to win.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T928W_-pQpFlbMW_8vhLL4NYKImLThzH4WF7Or0w50d5YbxloJWSJXm0XyVMbm-m5ADC6hXu_GWCrfvxMFhi6tzms3S7m3aZSJ7Q0-G5jjfsGjdnkaQTusbKK132hzpOKpmT-VoT5v02Svye3S8onLCzm0pIhJ1aa1CtfZYpPqOnc28gjWMrYaCW-NEH73PPUjUS1P9pfBl1zLDOVYI8wnpxhfqWvPU_LNJd7yXWRDiil_qJDn7UQDF4RkFxkSBPnqsk9LMSdv6NTzwMucLFH5Kuox1RujPF6owkAzPWD7KiRIQHuyn0acJL8gg1f-0OaDq6VXCAvmgAz0DL7Aobxq6Q/472/jFgwmw8qQCG6JN1nmw8qgw/h1/h001.BM-8H8Pfy4MAxs54yTShxO7RNJLIEY0GODvPPwEQpNY)** **[Pitch in $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T928W_-pQpFlbMW_8vhLL4NYKImLThzH4WF7Or0w50d5YbxloJWSJXm0XyVMbm-m5AjGexoe6JnQitHQHFCSLqWWUFhr1B-9znJTeKLGHNBDz8lpGPlDbEDWPwOZoVsCwy380n4PyyiRs2wliNNme6JopFA168frb1PMnBpH7FB8f_gmCW_a6EuEdLdx-PoFPOZ9MU7g3p4x5SbKu_e2djBK30A08M5xVeioaF81A2pTX3eI31_khSOnJzgXEWIrQ68h6ikN3BUWHO_onDD-QV3OxPW7MVuzClPU436XaIJg_kdtAgM88mnLg9FKoN2mF6--Cw7vPiZIIHLfK-ca0_mw/472/jFgwmw8qQCG6JN1nmw8qgw/h2/h001.nFq7jnzYfiTPMCBQKBVjd9M8sqi-l61UDZ2GC18UqMQ)** Let’s break this down a little bit more, Peter. AIPAC is a GOP-funded lobbying group that has endorsed over 100 insurrectionists for Congress. That’s not a typo. And it’s not even something they dispute. _They actively endorsed and supported_ the same Republican members of Congress who tried to overturn the election results in 2020.1 AIPAC donors have also given millions to the likes of Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, and Ron DeSantis.2 Meanwhile, the members of Congress that they’re targeting — like Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush — have led the fight for working families in Congress, and for policies like affordable housing, healthcare for all, climate action, and a permanent ceasefire in Gaza. _The stakes couldn’t be higher._ We can’t let a super PAC funded by right-wing billionaires defeat Jamaal Bowman this month. **[Please make a split donation today between WFP and Jamaal Bowman’s campaign and help fight back against AIPAC’s attempts to flood the airwaves with GOP megadonor cash.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T928W_-pQpFlbMW_8vhLL4NYKImLThzH4WF7Or0w50d5YbxloJWSJXm0XyVMbm-m5ARVp61vd4FGvaHa3WEgJFof5RGpPT3Vw88DONCP38qD8JMWkhNZ-81zAsznqsZ05eo0e4nnFJBpywT8sCf0XXgZGz4E5RGQX7Kk7hscV5cY7EhUIcy3DnhiuD0_OQ3g6BEvKRDrJPljxzJnEJ7CF5Xb8Kzcl-gslEIbD31I2SkkplHqQL-uVvDomBB2FtYDsIxDHFZ0QD-lWyXagBL9SBBQ8rlgYNGeDM6s7Md-8bUUbDW2Qg9quU4_79Q3Z6TA8Ctzv4nNY1FoAgqfu5tgDOiQ/472/jFgwmw8qQCG6JN1nmw8qgw/h3/h001.HSVhEOK-YDj_zp-dFIYaRFqKhuuzSO_cbpdXiUq1-J4)** Thank you, Team WFP Sources: 1\. [‘Morally bankrupt’: outrage after pro-Israel group backs insurrectionist Republicans](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRXuNSlhDxcvv3N1sDz0lok7OscA1BdqXt17nckKYSJP2h1y_0FeUCNv_2xWS24mMiqxrqF8XqiIQBurv7U5G-nEaKXTjdgOwHxP0OcSpLouleZVt6t2KhgbC_MeBc6yzS6bbTsfpepey7uultTEsq6gbLZYuSb5OvwrDBo0sovl1USRlkCRos32FhrenCrE7lZUD53uO0sQRRPaP5rASIzwrNWLThQ4i96guVWEgiDa9KuBSoWLpbmYsT5zB6Qo1D777Pv-6ZiNYOy0WIT8lmljYjIUjm15JcYnsin03y-64C6r_-McSD9Murn5msCIkgPLYfGfI85DhMhugUFXIMr7m_zM-RLwo2REpMBPg3Yx4pwyl5qs_6HVD91HmWBOgQ/472/jFgwmw8qQCG6JN1nmw8qgw/h4/h001.ufj_WAvq_k-6p-ODo6hyrous7JxAxCH45y-qXDd3eoM), The Guardian, March 23, 2022 2\. clean_body: Since May 16th, AIPAC has spent more than $10.9 million against Jamaal Bowman. | | | Peter, we did the math. : Since May 16th, AIPAC has spent more than $10.9 million against Jamaal Bowman. That’s almost half a million dollars PER DAY. And they’ve committed to spending even MORE over the coming weeks — before Jamaal Bowman’s primary on June 25th — in the hopes of unseating one of the strongest progressive champions in Congress. Let’s break this down a little bit more, Peter. AIPAC is a GOP-funded lobbying group that has endorsed over 100 insurrectionists for Congress. That’s not a typo. And it’s not even something they dispute. They actively endorsed and supported the same Republican members of Congress who tried to overturn the election results in 2020.1 AIPAC donors have also given millions to the likes of Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, and Ron DeSantis.2 Meanwhile, the members of Congress that they’re targeting — like Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush — have led the fight for working families in Congress, and for policies like affordable housing, healthcare for all, climate action, and a permanent ceasefire in Gaza. The stakes couldn’t be higher. We can’t let a super PAC funded by right-wing billionaires defeat Jamaal Bowman this month. Thank you, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , The Guardian, March 23, 2022 2\. , Slate, February 7, 2024 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. body:
There weren’t any cakes or candles.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86579847/478329058/1328794144?refcode=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTYxM2E1LTdlMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1_HBEDGhSzt9rQ3VELjaX1DDUVLgCV-rgrIxD58Hf4=&emci=75739935-e924-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it. Throughout my life, I’ve always found activism to be the best antidote to despair. I even spent my 82nd birthday in jail for protesting government inaction on the climate emergency _(Can you believe it? There weren’t any cakes or candles...)_ It was my 5th arrest for civil disobedience, and you know what? I wear each one like a badge of honor because I was fighting for what I believe in. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86579848/478329059/2105508926?refcode=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTYxM2E1LTdlMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1_HBEDGhSzt9rQ3VELjaX1DDUVLgCV-rgrIxD58Hf4=) _Jane’s iconic mugshot taken in Cleveland after the Nixon Administration had her arrested in 1970._ For me, nonviolent disobedience is one of the most powerful tools we have in our arsenal; it’s why those in power are always trying to [take it away from us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86579849/478329060/1080487372?refcode=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTYxM2E1LTdlMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1_HBEDGhSzt9rQ3VELjaX1DDUVLgCV-rgrIxD58Hf4=&emci=75739935-e924-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105) Engaging in nonviolent disobedience invites you to put your body — your actions — in alignment with your values and goals. Doing so calls attention to the issue, sways public opinion, mobilizes large numbers of people, and creates change. Every time I stood, spoke, or sat in defiance, it was driven by my firm belief in collective action. When people come together, particularly at critical moments, we can make history. **[And this November is our next big test, team: We're facing the most consequential election for climate action in our lifetimes. We’re the last generation who still has a chance to force meaningful change that could mean saving lives and species on a vast scale. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today. Even a donation as small as $5 can power our vital work at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86579850/478329061/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTYxM2E1LTdlMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1_HBEDGhSzt9rQ3VELjaX1DDUVLgCV-rgrIxD58Hf4=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86579851/478329062/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTYxM2E1LTdlMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1_HBEDGhSzt9rQ3VELjaX1DDUVLgCV-rgrIxD58Hf4=)

The fossil fuel industry is intensifying its efforts to secure its grip on our government. They’re betting on us staying home, so we need to disrupt their plans. I am calling on everyone to take the energy that we’ve brought to the streets _to the polls_ and vote with climate in mind this year.
Through the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we've channeled the spirit of defiance into electoral action by supporting down-ballot candidates who treat the climate crisis with the urgency it demands, but our success depends on your involvement.
So, I’m calling on you. Now is the time to act — whether it's by **[donating to support our cause](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86579852/478329063/2105508926?refcode=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.039613a5-7e26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTYxM2E1LTdlMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1_HBEDGhSzt9rQ3VELjaX1DDUVLgCV-rgrIxD58Hf4=)** , joining a climate protest, educating others about what’s at stake, or simply going out and voting for pro-climate candidates. You play a critical role in this fight.

clean_body: There weren’t any cakes or candles. | I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it. Throughout my life, I’ve always found activism to be the best antidote to despair. I even spent my 82nd birthday in jail for protesting government inaction on the climate emergency (Can you believe it? There weren’t any cakes or candles...) It was my 5th arrest for civil disobedience, and you know what? I wear each one like a badge of honor because I was fighting for what I believe in. = Jane’s iconic mugshot taken in Cleveland after the Nixon Administration had her arrested in 1970. For me, nonviolent disobedience is one of the most powerful tools we have in our arsenal; it’s why those in power are always trying to Engaging in nonviolent disobedience invites you to put your body — your actions — in alignment with your values and goals. Doing so calls attention to the issue, sways public opinion, mobilizes large numbers of people, and creates change. Every time I stood, spoke, or sat in defiance, it was driven by my firm belief in collective action. When people come together, particularly at critical moments, we can make history. = | = The fossil fuel industry is intensifying its efforts to secure its grip on our government. They’re betting on us staying home, so we need to disrupt their plans. I am calling on everyone to take the energy that we’ve brought to the streets to the polls and vote with climate in mind this year. Through the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we've channeled the spirit of defiance into electoral action by supporting down-ballot candidates who treat the climate crisis with the urgency it demands, but our success depends on your involvement. So, I’m calling on you. Now is the time to act — whether it's by = , joining a climate protest, educating others about what’s at stake, or simply going out and voting for pro-climate candidates. You play a critical role in this fight. = In solidarity, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Just stepped off stage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter,
I just stepped off the debate stage for the first time and I’m more fired up than ever.
Today, voters across Montana saw Tim Sheehy for who he really is: **a wealthy outsider we can’t trust to fight for us in the Senate.**
And I mean seriously wealthy, like _growing up in a multimillion-dollar lakehouse and owning a private peninsula wealthy._
Between Sheehy’s disturbing refusal to tell the truth and his mounting conflicts of interests, I bet Mitch McConnell isn’t very pleased with his star recruit right now.
**But McConnell will do whatever it takes to unseat me.** His super PACs are dumping nearly $65 million into nasty, deceitful attacks ads. And with the polls tied, it’s more critical than ever we build a groundswell of grassroots support to fight back.
[**Will you rush a split donation between my campaign and Bob Casey right now to help us win 2024’s most important Senate races? Fellow American,

**_I would be honored if you could spare just one minute to read this heartfelt memo in its entirety. I guarantee it will be well worth your time._ **

**My parents taught me that when you're in trouble, the best thing to do is to tell the truth.**

So here's the unfiltered truth of serving in New York City:

* I'm the last NYC Republican in Congress
* My fundraising numbers are drastically declining
* My district is under attack by radical protests and antisemitism
* More migrants than ever are moving to NYC and can legally squat in our homes

**My friend, I said I'd give you the unfiltered truth.**

**_I'm scared. I'm sad. I'm run down._** But I refuse to give up the hope that led me to serve you in our government in the first place.

I've been wracking my brain for ways to make concrete change in a country where it seems as though one step forward triggers twelve steps back.

| [ **BE A PART OF THE SOLUTION** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=7ddb0d69513a40c0ab20f5165238644f&_e=QRm7_KTl7qVguORy2XFoFsoGfC3hgouEoEOXs5X5Nyb0xiyN415U-NN2U4tyjGuuih5LKkPaFGLp60wdIEGBlg9fq77ZsZiZMOvVdMkxDIXytpwDylExp7A6eb9fr5oobRJy1KmpF748nJbQXWVf6p7WcmzGcEXR5oMAOYww3yHpjTFhSZw4GpSRJ4bPKYryuSGrdT56kr_zBbvPH0E4TTmRpIhRpVpTVfjvihhEIcrpFge-4X1gSlt0IToVpxu73kGwicvPLQ3xPzVx-LrvwZBXadJ6u01e5vjYVXOvqpyG5n9bMxNPwTPJ80RUGvc1DrfKtUkC78wTaQZR51TM5hY5aIKypKbF_Ikl7PxwtSIu2Mcw9-29WqNBgYhv7aIqzTCXlPv-pzHn2Ruawew8rBNGAk-Qn7JOeCDBoILQ5HY%3D)
---

Let's return to the principles upon which this once-great nation was founded.**Life. Liberty. Happiness. Representation.**

**So please allow me to share my vision:**

* I want open communication with _**ALL Americans**_ , on both sides of the aisle, to encourage fruitful policy change and rational laws in this nation. You have my email– don't be afraid to say hi.
* I wish to inform _**ALL Americans**_ of the truth of the mayhem in our cities and the radical ideas that are pushed upon our youth against their will.
* I hope to inspire a spirit of hope within _**ALL Americans**_ to stand up and make a change in our country.

**We have power in numbers. If you can't relate to my unfiltered truth, I thank you for your attention. You can close this email now.**

**If my truth has inspired you to fight for your nation in any way you can, keep reading.**

Joe Biden is relying on a broken system and his own corruption to hold onto the White House for another four years. Life will get worse if he succeeds. It truly is only downhill from here– he's already promised higher taxes and unchecked immigration.

I mentioned before that my fundraising is in the gutter. While the media and woke institutions try to silence traditional, rational voices in this country, it's impossible to do so if we gain enough support.

**[So please– if anything I said resonates with you– consider the virtue of generosity and chip in what you can to support my honest cause.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=7ddb0d69513a40c0ab20f5165238644f&_e=QRm7_KTl7qVguORy2XFoFsoGfC3hgouEoEOXs5X5Nyb0xiyN415U-NN2U4tyjGuuih5LKkPaFGLp60wdIEGBlg9fq77ZsZiZMOvVdMkxDIXytpwDylExp7A6eb9fr5oobRJy1KmpF748nJbQXWVf6p7WcmzGcEXR5oMAOYww3yHpjTFhSZw4GpSRJ4bPKYryuSGrdT56kr_zBbvPH0E4TTmRpIhRpVpTVfjvihhEIcoMS_EA8sH6SSDleItU932UafeizpyKOZahTs8QavGIJaRgjUpcOiXcHTmybf8TbFIJ3ykR8QT65D60cnmIwsphpghDBteDibBg9i6DW8u3s2hbAGq9oR1zsEwGciqpKqL0dCUBpx2CZOS83MFKn2eyKXcBnjEKx0tEOhHx2-UCctqMSi1C58j3oUdhK0ghgf8%3D)** I've laid it all out on the table– it's up to you to act.

clean_body: it’s time you heard it It's time you heard it | Fellow American, I would be honored if you could spare just one minute to read this heartfelt memo in its entirety. I guarantee it will be well worth your time. My parents taught me that when you're in trouble, the best thing to do is to tell the truth. So here's the unfiltered truth of serving in New York City: I'm the last NYC Republican in Congress My fundraising numbers are drastically declining My district is under attack by radical protests and antisemitism More migrants than ever are moving to NYC and can legally squat in our homes My friend, I said I'd give you the unfiltered truth. I'm scared. I'm sad. I'm run down. But I refuse to give up the hope that led me to serve you in our government in the first place. I've been wracking my brain for ways to make concrete change in a country where it seems as though one step forward triggers twelve steps back. | Let's return to the principles upon which this once-great nation was founded.Life. Liberty. Happiness. Representation. So please allow me to share my vision: I want open communication with ALL Americans , on both sides of the aisle, to encourage fruitful policy change and rational laws in this nation. You have my email– don't be afraid to say hi. I wish to inform ALL Americans of the truth of the mayhem in our cities and the radical ideas that are pushed upon our youth against their will. I hope to inspire a spirit of hope within ALL Americans to stand up and make a change in our country. We have power in numbers. If you can't relate to my unfiltered truth, I thank you for your attention. You can close this email now. If my truth has inspired you to fight for your nation in any way you can, keep reading. Joe Biden is relying on a broken system and his own corruption to hold onto the White House for another four years. Life will get worse if he succeeds. It truly is only downhill from here– he's already promised higher taxes and unchecked immigration. I mentioned before that my fundraising is in the gutter. While the media and woke institutions try to silence traditional, rational voices in this country, it's impossible to do so if we gain enough support. I've laid it all out on the table– it's up to you to act. I shared my vulnerable, unfiltered truth. Thank you, Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis | A NO-NONSENSE LEADER. As the representative for New York's 11th Congressional District, Nicole is focused on government accountability and transparency, supporting law enforcement, securing our nation's borders and combating the spread of socialism. | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. body:
Trump requested that the Military shoot Black Lives Matter protesters. According to his own Secretary of Defense, Mark Esper, “It was a suggestion and a formal question.”
#
Derek, we all remember this shameful moment:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june24.b7PZyP&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=1&akid=25761%2E3013755%2EYA-O8c)
In the summer of 2020, Trump was incensed that Americans were exercising their constitutional right to protest. He forcefully cleared the square outside of the White House in order to stage a photoshoot in an outrageous attempt at projecting strength.
But most people don’t know what else happened.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june24.b7PZyP&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=2&akid=25761%2E3013755%2EYA-O8c)
Trump requested that the Military shoot Black Lives Matter protesters. According to his own Secretary of Defense, Mark Esper, “It was a suggestion and a formal question.”
Civilian and Military leadership told him: No.
If Trump wins, he’s committed to hiring only the most loyal in his administration. He has admitted that he will purge the government of anyone found to be insufficiently loyal. He plans to fire generals he deems “woke.”
Who will say no next time? You know the answer: No one.
VoteVets was one of the most effective and influential organizations in the fight against Trump in 2020. We wrote the book on defeating him — moving voters most organizations on the left don’t talk to with messengers that they can’t use. We’re hard at work building the campaign that will defeat Donald Trump in 2024, and we need your support.

| | Dear Peter,
---
| | Crime is out of control, and the Police are putting their lives on the line for us everyday. Yet the media demonizes them, and because of that, police departments are struggling to recruit new officers. [****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6ba8a4a4c5&e=54a81bd33c)

[****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=16b63d2b0f&e=54a81bd33c)

**_A miracle product exists that is responsible for dramatically reducing the number of rapes and sexual assaults in America. This invention has even contributed to lower divorce and teen pregnancy rates.

Even though this invention has proven so beneficial, millions of Americans want to moderate and even eliminate it. Why? Because the thing reducing rape and sexual assault, and producing a safer, more family-friendly society, is really, really offensive to a lot of Americans: low or no-cost, high quality online pornography._**

_Read enough?_

[Help me stop this Anti-Police, Pro-Porn and ANTI-TRUMP liberal wolf in sheep’s clothing.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6373d65372&e=54a81bd33c)

clean_body: Hear me out. | I have a simple request: = Yes, you read that correctly — just $1! $1 to help me defeat Marsha Blackburn and reclaim this Senate seat for the people of Tennessee. $1 to ensure Tennessee has a leader who will fight daily in Washington to protect reproductive healthcare, access to the ballot box, our democracy, and LGTBQ+ rights! $1 to invest in more fliers, yard signs, TV and digital ads, radio spots, and more opportunities to reach voters across Tennessee with a message of hope and progress. This isn’t just a donation. It's an investment in a brighter future for our state. Marsha Blackburn's corporate backers are ready to spend big to keep her in office, but with your help, we can fight back and win. = | = = Thanks for your support, Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. – Money is _pouring_ _into_ the Trump campaign, including a reported _**$34.8 million**_ in the hours after Trump's hush-money conviction last week.

– Senate Republicans raised **$18 million** to flip that chamber.

– And House Republicans revealed plans to spend **$141 million** to keep their destructive grip on power.

**Let's be crystal clear: If we lose the House, Senate, and presidency in this election, it could be the biggest setback for reproductive rights our country has ever seen.** [**Peter, we need to ensure Democratic pro-choice women have the resources they need to compete with Republicans' millions. If everyone reading this message chips in what they can, we'll have everything we need to help them win. Can we count on you to help defeat anti-choice Republicans?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86581288/478335042/-120062714?refcode=WTEFER17_20240609_SapphireDT_ALL&sourceid=1053983&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODYzN2FiOC04MTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKVRgihKXJXMLQDKRo3qfbxKjhu_oMgQ9IFCD-GC22g=)

Republicans turned back the clock on our reproductive rights._ _

They've vowed to ban abortion nationwide.

And they're clearly armed with MILLIONS to make their vile plans a reality.

_**We can't let that happen.**_

EMILYs List is fighting with everything we have to win this generation-defining election — but we can't do it alone.

**THE FIRST RALLY SINCE MY RIGGED CONVICTION BEGINS IN 2 HOURS!**
Friend, Democrats tried every dirty trick in the book to keep me off the campaign trail.
_**They RAIDED MY HOME WITH DEADLY FORCE.**_
_**They ARRESTED ME AND TOOK MY MUGSHOT.**_

But in just 2 hours, I’m holding my FIRST RALLY since my conviction to show that I will NEVER SURRENDER!

name: Marquis Govan, Field Director

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs]
Peter,
It’s summer in St. Louis... and we need to make sure our field team has the resources to keep our volunteers hydrated, cool, and out talking to the voters of MO-01.
You may not realize everything it takes to fuel our team’s outreach efforts. Knocking on doors, registering voters, and spreading our messages takes resources. For example...
$5 buys a pack of pens to sign voter registration cards [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs&amount=5]
$10 buys ice-cold water & snacks for our volunteers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs&amount=10]
$25 helps buy clipboards for our organizers to carry door-to-door [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs&amount=25]
$50 helps train & supply our volunteers with flyers, t-shirts, etc [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs&amount=50]
Needless to say, it all adds up.
From coordinating volunteers, to making phone calls and engaging with the St. Louis community face-to-face, our field program is the driving force behind our movement. It's about building relationships, listening to concerns, and mobilizing supporters to turn out and vote for real change.
And it’s not just about supplies – it's about building momentum. Truly, we believe we’re on track to beat our opponent and his Republican donors – and we’re doing everything we can to get the word out about why we need to keep Cori in Congress.
We just need your support.
We need resources to fuel our grassroots efforts and reach as many voters as possible. We need to print literature, signs, and shirts. All of that requires money. We don’t accept a cent of corporate PAC money; we rely 100% on regular, everyday people like you to fund our grassroots campaign. And now that we're up against far-right billionaires who will spend whatever it takes to try to oust Cori from Congress, we need all of the help we can get.
So, Peter, will you pitch in $10, $15, or $25 right now to ensure we have the resources necessary to run a winning field program? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs]
FUEL OUR WINNING FIELD TEAM! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs]
Let's roll up our sleeves and get to work!
Thank you,
Marquis Govan, Field Director
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_060924_field_actrs] As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, on a mission to save lives, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice.
Now, Cori is running for re-election to continue doing the most for everyone, starting with those who have the greatest need. name: Russell Vought
subject: WaPo did a hit piece on me
body:
I hope you are enjoying your weekend. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=17913c7d6d&u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8847fa62a4)
---
| | | [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8b1ac5f6ed&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | | Friends,

I hope you are enjoying your weekend.

It's not often that you wake up on Saturday morning to a flurry of messages from friends and colleagues alerting you to the fact that the Washington Post just published a nearly 2000-word hit piece on you.

Yesterday was one of those days, but it came as no surprise. Reporters have been circling for weeks asking me and my colleagues to go on record for the piece. **But far from being dismayed, I'm encouraged by the hit piece**. Let me explain.

The WaPo piece, _[**Trump loyalist pushes ‘post-constitutional’ vision for second term**](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=bd3d36cffe&e=17913c7d6d)_ ,**** is the latest in a series of exposés designed to paint an apocalyptic picture of President Trump’s America First vision for the country and those of us who have been preparing to help the President implement it on day one of a future Trump Administration.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2e95c34264&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| November draws closer and they know what Trump’s policy agenda means for the corrupt Marxist vanguard desperately clinging to power in D.C.

The irony, of course, is once you read past the usual slander and scurrilous insinuations about me, the narrative simply becomes - _he’s serious about helping President Trump implement his America First vision for our country_ and that frightens them more than anything. From [**the piece**](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=afc46b60d2&e=17913c7d6d):

_“Vought wants to gut the FBI and give the president more oversight over the Justice Department.” _**Correct.**

_“Vought favors boosting White House control over other federal agencies that operate somewhat independently.” _**Correct. **

_“Vought has called for “mass deportation” of illegal immigrants.” _**Correct. **

Friends, if President Trump’s recent convictions did not shake you, nothing will. It’s clear that we are in a post constitutional moment in our country. You can read my essay, _[**Statesmanship in a post-Constitutional moment**](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7fa1426f8b&e=17913c7d6d)_ , explaining how we arrived at this point, but the solution is to become what I call “radical Constitutionalists” by fully supporting a future Trump Administration’s Constitutional powers to fundamentally gut the federal bureaucracy and implement his vision for our country.

Which is exactly what myself and my colleagues intend to do. As evidenced by the WaPo piece, they are shaken to the core by this fact.

The media, liberal elites, academia, and bureaucratic class in Washington are apoplectic over what could unfold in the coming months.

Keep fighting and stay focused.

Sincerely,
Russ Vought
President, Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7832d37d4e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=4ae5a9e37d&e=17913c7d6d)

300 Independence Ave. SE

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=8847fa62a4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&t=b&e=17913c7d6d&c=8847fa62a4).

name: Jon Tester

body:
Opportunities like this don’t come around often, and we need to take advantage of them while they’re here.

| Hi Peter, it’s Jon Tester. I’ve got some big news, some bad news, and some good news.

**Here’s the big news:** I officially have a GOP opponent in the race for Montana’s U.S. Senate seat—Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Tim Sheehy.

**But the bad news is:** McConnell and all of his super PAC buddies are spending a whopping $65 million to prop up their handpicked candidate and attack me. In a race as close as this, every dollar could make the difference.

**And the good news:** A group of generous donors saw the polls tightening and agreed to match every donation for the next 48 hours.

Opportunities like this don’t come around often, and we need to take advantage of them while they’re here. This is the best time to make a difference in our campaign, and your gift will go twice as far.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d86ba03527dc42ff84196b9b6530cea2&_e=koTsAX7oA-Zafshq-NXuIAAklwq_aaYyfgfYHFr1zhlvadSTuL5EOfSgfdpERXfzCOdKwmpdbcXNs3_QQGVTI2YeeAT92L-IMDUaa1EnLcb08JFOBJpqzqbyIbh8UaTuZ-rYX5SmDwdpIgUKfgRXCf7mexAW1kJI9G_vtqdAZUhENyxVng6EakvNh1vtUHhcffLYmWdjtWLNjHPgH3IWfvAwWVGZow5fZ3wxEQd1IEUADz2TNzZeZcmXXz0VBiNW50kLyEcPjvmXni3lz-I-ejFlWIcRVn-jNjtWUFLeAox3MTnfV129nuRXxcqGOsZySDv-OwDc5XT1wR_Ui5Vda9VfyV6-VrChn13M3DIsihPwdzpbEBAoQ2w9SNhCY5g6d-nAap8gEzCXilud-l2vOLi-LPCcn0GzHUqWNrB1Xqg%3D)
Dear Fellow American,

Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.

To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**

**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d86ba03527dc42ff84196b9b6530cea2&_e=koTsAX7oA-Zafshq-NXuIAAklwq_aaYyfgfYHFr1zhlvadSTuL5EOfSgfdpERXfzCOdKwmpdbcXNs3_QQGVTI2YeeAT92L-IMDUaa1EnLcb08JFOBJpqzqbyIbh8UaTuZ-rYX5SmDwdpIgUKfgRXCf7mexAW1kJI9G_vtqdAZUhENyxVng6EakvNh1vtUHhcffLYmWdjtWLNjHPgH3IWfvAwWVGZow5fZ3wxEQd1IEUADz2TNzZeZcmXXz0VBiNW50kLyEcPjvmXni3lz-I-etkM_xZs_1LRGONGok5fbA1ctiD3tzChUNyNTfx8z6YgNIwDqTHU_9mGwylolzUbIXdmQvulS7VDCL4sXl61R-E9B3LYZQdlGIX8GxZx1NJ050iTqGje95EpjybkI6mNPpgjL5A-lXlO77quvRX-yhI%3D)
If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called " The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The " The Second World Wars" DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. .

body:
Please read.

| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e744adb8dcdc431cb026b2287d7b1c3b&_e=cHasWFgrI9dyRirAiuMMFygZGf-VsuOuR9Gx7ZhapeWHQVJG_jAUJzsiAQ4UFmoffXta82YkMPowNX5exbzvXfYrKDOPuXGhfQ4cSFLNBhmlUpzEeeIh2X0nrLh9tT7z9ZeT3mipPbPEGLVTz2cGPOQFd4ZPhwzf9dn7Jq4kkhMVcU2dCOWnVnbi84i11KIUcgdzPKA5Hnh1DEuaSXrgkK4jyxuz_NyAcVU13GGHUZgtKUMqnNlpH2l49jjP8g0MMxPHAuEYwaKQ3nE-xDHeaUuSrKILMoql9pxLWvV9oZ5DCpv9hzDOwgcdMlJ-CQG3ZyKmCGLFzrWs7b0a9bO_CIa2vXIhJWC_YUQTos1TBY9L9drusDZqObk1zigjCmG8)
---
Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what's never going to change.

**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.

[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e744adb8dcdc431cb026b2287d7b1c3b&_e=cHasWFgrI9dyRirAiuMMFygZGf-VsuOuR9Gx7ZhapeWHQVJG_jAUJzsiAQ4UFmoffXta82YkMPowNX5exbzvXfYrKDOPuXGhfQ4cSFLNBhmlUpzEeeIh2X0nrLh9tT7z9ZeT3mipPbPEGLVTz2cGPOQFd4ZPhwzf9dn7Jq4kkhMVcU2dCOWnVnbi84i11KIUcgdzPKA5Hnh1DEuaSXrgkK4jyxuz_NyAcVU13GGHUZjQdDPwkRhdxAtBl_uAtvhiw1a9bAr1Kqrgb1e35uZwTfgmEX_DNwtCiCn7CxeJo5v77e9b4Jgy1xlRoCy3RH-H8vr7rJwMjY1u9U7wy94k4ZrMmd3MJ4VkX1XcIfIsAvRbdgbthvQJG95Yu8e9M8oi)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.

**__So, what 'd I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state's $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet.

[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e744adb8dcdc431cb026b2287d7b1c3b&_e=cHasWFgrI9dyRirAiuMMFygZGf-VsuOuR9Gx7ZhapeWHQVJG_jAUJzsiAQ4UFmoffXta82YkMPowNX5exbzvXfYrKDOPuXGhfQ4cSFLNBhmlUpzEeeIh2X0nrLh9tT7z9ZeT3mipPbPEGLVTz2cGPOQFd4ZPhwzf9dn7Jq4kkhMVcU2dCOWnVnbi84i11KIUcgdzPKA5Hnh1DEuaSXrgkK4jyxuz_NyAcVU13GGHUZjJOiRRS9tNhuhmKKIpebxgrqukWxt6jYluJ5bu8Mhx2Z7zTcruezlv22GHy4Vi3bndeZVpLwlcJ-tUtOkJdlj7RowNRoIIGAHLWL0MJLFetZGwILIUz6n3SHKlsxGYroqY0DpXjGC91QZeqhwAUWIc)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**

**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.

[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e744adb8dcdc431cb026b2287d7b1c3b&_e=cHasWFgrI9dyRirAiuMMFygZGf-VsuOuR9Gx7ZhapeWHQVJG_jAUJzsiAQ4UFmoffXta82YkMPowNX5exbzvXfYrKDOPuXGhfQ4cSFLNBhmlUpzEeeIh2X0nrLh9tT7z9ZeT3mipPbPEGLVTz2cGPOQFd4ZPhwzf9dn7Jq4kkhMVcU2dCOWnVnbi84i11KIUcgdzPKA5Hnh1DEuaSXrgkK4jyxuz_NyAcVU13GGHUZivj_Ivzd4Vxx1ScHGivTjC_Mx-d8LZ2isB-bcNDWjvzUdNpfD2cbtzJ2ZrXc8GV0x0buSZDK6D03x-vtVPfsiMeeX6TZMybcnwzlkZSOg9OOoBeHkli5XE-h6pxM2v4PBp23BYHt7TGJTkpO4PLi7u)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. **

That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I've given you my story in a nutshell, I'm going to humbly ask for your support. The Left likes me about as much as a cat likes swimming. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama. I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much. | God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808

name: Peter Yu for Congress
subject: Is it Groundhog day
body:
| | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| As election day approaches, the news of me spending on average eight hours every day canvassing the neighborhoods of our district has become well known. My routine of waking up, grabbing a quick bite to eat and heading out to knock on a minimum of five hundred doors is the exact same routine I have done every day for the past five months of this entire campaign. Meeting as many constituents of the 4th Congressional district as possible and discussing the issues facing them today. As a result, we have a funny saying amongst my supporters that I am living the campaign version of Bill Murray's "Ground Hog Day."
The reason I am relaying the funny meme that has become my life, is because I am excited that I have spoken to over 35,000 new constituents these past five months and have learned what this district needs and have instilled a new trust to those looking for genuine representation. If there is one thing I have learned, people are tired of the same old campaign promises they hear every election cycle and are looking for someone that truly represents the people of our district, state, and country.
As ballots are now being completed, I was asked by a voter on her front porch who showed me that she voted for me, "why are you still knocking on doors as people most likely already filled out their ballot?" My response is that I do not stop representing or working for you or anyone else just because I have your vote or your support. I will always put the people of our district first. It is not about getting your vote, it is about having personal representation and making you the priority.
We are happy to see that the people do desire a true representative and recent polling shows my support growing rapidly. I am humbly asking for your vote and will continue to make sure that I am here for all of you when you need my help. Thank you!
---
---
| Best regards, Peter Yu
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
www.peteryuforcongress.com
---

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: I was asked about an assault weapons ban on TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
Peter,
I've spent my life as a public servant and a problem solver. I decided to run for Congress because I think we can all agree - we’ve got enough career politicians, how about electing some new leaders for a change?
Before I share more, if you agree we need real public servants in Washington, can you rush a contribution to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-08022023]
As the CEO of the Red Cross in Arizona, I’ve deployed to hundreds of disaster sites. Nothing could prepare me for what I’m about to share. My heart was broken into two.
I’ve always said this would be the Courageous Campaign that wasn’t afraid to answer the tough questions. I was interviewed on Sunday and I was asked if I support an Assault Weapons Ban. I’m not afraid to answer - will you take a look?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-08022023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-08022023]
After the horrific mass shooting in El Paso in 2019, I immediately went to the scene. We were there 6 hours later. Cowardly politicians did nothing to protect these families on that day - and today, still nothing.
We know we need courageous leaders in Washington. Powerful special interests like the NRA will spend millions to defeat our campaign. Luckily, though, they can’t stop all of us. Can you contribute today so I can continue to share our message and grow this movement? We’re picking up steam because of your help.
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-08022023&amount=5]
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-08022023&amount=10]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-08022023]
I will never stop fighting for what’s right.
Kurt

body:
Fox News rang in Pride Month with fear-mongering headlines about the LGBTQ community

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86583655/478343575/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNiZjEzMzItOGEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cdYLJaOB4EaUkJmP_ZzOF5jvuIpR-l8GE2f-l25PgUI=&emci=ccbf1332-8a26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d3bf1332-8a26-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
While members of the LGBTQ+ community and allies around the country celebrate Pride Month, _Fox News_ is going to war.
We’re not even a week into June, but just take a look at some recent headlines:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86583656/478343630/-593472309?refcode=20240609-EM-FoxPride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNiZjEzMzItOGEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cdYLJaOB4EaUkJmP_ZzOF5jvuIpR-l8GE2f-l25PgUI=)
Mocking an NBC documentary on queer animal behaviors, accusing the Navy SEALS of being “woke” for promoting equality, and praising NFL teams that skipped Pride Month messaging – this election year, Fox News seems to be pushing its right-wing agenda and boosting ratings by attacking the LGBTQ+ community during Pride.
[**We’ll explain more in a moment, but if you have a second to support COURIER’s factual reporting on the issues that matter most, can you chip in $20 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86583657/478343631/-593472309?refcode=20240609-EM-FoxPride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNiZjEzMzItOGEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cdYLJaOB4EaUkJmP_ZzOF5jvuIpR-l8GE2f-l25PgUI=)
**Thanks to the disgusting demagoguery of the LGBTQ+ community by _Fox News_ and the far-right, for the first time in decades, fewer people support rights for LGBTQ Americans than did just a few years ago.**
The trend has led to a record number of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation in our state legislatures and an alarming increase in hate crimes against LGBTQ+ Americans.
At COURIER, our local newsrooms are fighting back by exposing right-wing efforts to hurt the LGBTQ+ community and sharing stories about LGBTQ+ activism and its positive impact on our local communities:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86583658/478343632/-593472309?refcode=20240609-EM-FoxPride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNiZjEzMzItOGEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cdYLJaOB4EaUkJmP_ZzOF5jvuIpR-l8GE2f-l25PgUI=)
Now more than ever, Peter, this coverage is vital. We can stop right-wing hate from spreading, but we can’t do it without your support.
[**To continue providing news like this for free in our ten battleground states, we rely on contributions from supporters like you. Can you chip in $20 now to help us out?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86583661/478343635/-593472309?refcode=20240609-EM-FoxPride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNiZjEzMzItOGEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cdYLJaOB4EaUkJmP_ZzOF5jvuIpR-l8GE2f-l25PgUI=)
