name: Mackenzie For Congress
subject: Veterans for Mackenzie Expands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Ryan Mackenzie For U.S. Congress | | | | |
---
| Friend,
This week**#TeamMackenzie** is happy to announce our **expanded Veterans For Ryan Mackenzie coalition.** The purpose of this coalition is to connect with Veterans across PA-7 and promote policies to support those who served. On the heels of the 80th anniversary of D-Day, there is no better time to recognize the importance of our American heroes. Veterans are and always will be the foundation of our nation and the reason we have the freedoms we hold so close. Thank you to all the veterans that have sacrificed so much for our freedoms.
Sadly, this past week, **Susan Wild** turned her back on our veterans. On Wednesday, Susan Wild****[**voted against**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=5f451a70c5&e=5ccada9200)**** critical funding for our military and **veterans** because the bill prohibits sidetracking the VA to pay**for free healthcare for** **illegal immigrants.**
Her outrageous vote makes clear that Susan Wild is willing to put her radical, open-border agenda ahead of the needs of our veterans. **REMINDER** : Wild [voted against fully funding veterans’ health care and benefits](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=cf5aa8f19e&e=5ccada9200) and [voted to block pay raises for active-duty military](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=f73cb69fb1&e=5ccada9200) last July.
**Susan Wild also recently disparaged Veterans** by implying that a veteran who didn’t shake her hand is homophobic and bigoted. Maybe they did not want to shake her hand because she refused to stand up for Veterans. This was reported again on Friday by the **New York Post**. You can **read the article**[**here**](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=59ad98fe2b&e=5ccada9200)**.**
---
[Stop Susan’s Insults](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=9b4be8d85e&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| **Ryan’s Record of Supporting Veterans**
“As a state representative, I have been proud to help our veterans with regular office hours where we can dedicate time to focus on their particular needs. We have done this for many years — and helped some veterans with very difficult cases — and I will continue this if elected to Congress.
“I am also proud to have authored legislation known as Startups for Soldiers several years ago. This program helps veterans transition to the private sector by waiving new business filing fees. Each year, this program is utilized by thousands of veterans across Pennsylvania.
“In 2017, I was recognized for this work by the U.S. Department of Defense which shared their ‘grateful appreciation to Representative Mackenzie for his leadership on public policy changes positively impacting the quality of life of Service members and their families residing in Pennsylvania.’
“As congressman, I plan to do even more to help our veterans and I am honored to have the support of veterans across PA-7”
---
|
---
| **Veterans For Mackenzie**
---
| **Chaired by Joe Steber**
On October 29, 1984 Joe Steber enlisted in the Delayed Enlisted Program with the United States Air Force as a firefighter and attended firefighting school at Chanute AFB in Rantoul, IL. He was assigned to the 42nd Bombardment Wing of the Strategic Air Command at Loring AFB, ME where he served as the lead firefighter and crew chief on structural and crash fire trucks. Steber also served during Desert Storm in 1990/1991.
**Co-Chaired by Patrick Cubbage**
Patrick Cubbage served with the 173rd Airborne Brigade in Vietnam in 1969 as a combat Veteran. The 173rd Airborne Brigade was the most decorated unit during the Vietnam War.
**Co-Chaired by Mario Pasquariello **
Mario enlisted in the Navy in 1968, serving on the "USS Wright 2" and later the destroyer "USS Douglas H. Fox DD-779". Mario is currently retired after completing 33 years of teaching.
Thank you to all our veterans for their service!
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| FOLLOW ME ON FACEBOOK & X
---
| | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=f217a6869a&e=5ccada9200)| [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=81fd06eed8&e=5ccada9200)
---|---
|
---
| #TeamMackenzie and I continue to work hard every single day as we head toward November 5th. Please become a team member today to help us be successful. You can join by visiting [ryanforpa.com/#volunteer](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=3bf2c8eb57&e=5ccada9200) or donate [here](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=40d4b88ae9&e=5ccada9200).
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=165991bead&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com).
---
[Volunteer Today!](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=5931ac10b9&e=5ccada9200)
| | | |

Mackenzie for Congress
P.O. Box 747
Emmaus, PA 18049

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter,
Last week, I had an opportunity to tour a Planned Parenthood facility with Katherine Clark, the House Minority Whip [https://news.azpm.org/s/98790-house-minority-whip-backs-engel-slams-ciscomani-on-womens-health-record/] .
It was eye-opening and inspiring.
These facilities are providing critical healthcare services to women — reproductive care that goes far beyond abortions. And when the barbaric 1864 abortion ban was reinstated in April, it was these healthcare providers that came under attack.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_060924_KCPPRepro_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_060924_KCPPRepro_act]
Here’s what Representative Clark had to say about my opponent’s anti-choice voting record:
“It's not just about partisan politics or power [...] It's about keeping healthcare accessible for everyone. What we've seen from Congressman Ciscomani is he comes back to Tucson and talks about moderation and talks about health care for women... But really, he has a very clear record of votes in Washington D.C., and they are anti-health care for women.” ( x [https://news.azpm.org/s/98790-house-minority-whip-backs-engel-slams-ciscomani-on-womens-health-record/] )
Despite my opponent trying to claim that he’s a moderate, he paved the way for the reinstated 1864 ban, has repeatedly voted to restrict access to reproductive care in Congress, and is proudly endorsed by Donald Trump, who declared that states should be allowed to monitor women’s pregnancies.
I’m proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood, Emily’s List, and Reproductive Freedom for All. In Congress, I’ll fight to protect reproductive rights across the country.
In this toss-up race, I’ll need your help to win and take back the House majority.
We just found out that House Republicans made an almost $6 million buy in our district. Will you help us take on this dark money by chipping into our pro-choice, people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_060924_KCPPRepro_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you!
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_060924_KCPPRepro_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_060924_KCPPRepro_act]
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_060924_KCPPRepro_act]

body:
|
---
Please – If we don’t act now, it will be too late. I just got word that **_The New York Times_ released a BRAND NEW poll that shows me tied with my far-right GOP opponent. Please take a look ⬇️:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86584833/478347620/645926981?refcode=230609&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGIwMTU3OC04YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yox8tmN0kPUZNf8VcO82GIa4_Yg9d5BiHzze_2ZTI8Y=) **It’s clear: Nevada has become the GOP’s TOP priority. Unfortunately, their attacks are working, and I’m in danger of losing this seat to Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate.[Can you rush $10 or more, split between my campaign and Serve America to help me take back the lead and protect Nevada’s critical Senate seat? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86584834/478347621/645926981?refcode=230609&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGIwMTU3OC04YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yox8tmN0kPUZNf8VcO82GIa4_Yg9d5BiHzze_2ZTI8Y=)**
* * *
I wish I could sugarcoat it, but this is a bad sign. Experts at The Cook Political Report recently downgraded my Senate race to a “toss up,” and national Republicans took it as a green light to go ALL IN to try and flip Nevada red. Just this morning, Mitch McConnell’s dark money group announced that they’re spending nearly $6 MILLION on ads to try and defeat me. # FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

body:
We need your help to elect one of Trump’s closest allies to the Senate

|
---
With so much going on in the 2024 election, we wanted to give you a quick update on one of the year’s most important Senate Races, **Indiana.**

**First:** President Trump made Jim Banks one of his first endorsements of the 2024 election cycle because he knows Jim will always fight for America First.

**Then:** Despite interference from the Soros machine, Jim crushed the competition and won Indiana’s Republican primary, ensuring Indiana has a conservative choice on the ballot in November.

**Now:** Jim is in the fight of his life to win this race. The Democrats would love nothing more than to defeat him and swing a Senate seat in their favor. A Democrat win in Indiana would mean we have no chance of taking back the Senate.

[**Jim Banks is the conservative fighter we need in the Senate, but he needs your help to get there. body:
It’s no exaggeration to say that this is the most important election of our lifetimes. | | |
---
Peter, it’s Julia Roberts. George Clooney and I are meeting up with Presidents Biden and Obama at a crucial time in the election, and we are inviting one lucky grassroots supporter (and a guest!) to join us. There is a lot of work to do over these next few months, and each of us has a role to play -- including me. I’m proud to be part of this campaign, and I know you are too. (And I am excited for this upcoming event!) It’s no exaggeration to say that this is the most important election of our lifetimes. The stakes have never been higher. name: Mike Soboleski
subject: Thank you to my Church Friends
body:
A lot of great Sundays
| | |
---

# ONE OF US - FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
| [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VSlTD8ngyq1qfgxYx3G0beCWtfeMvFpYroDqCdsNooosl8v92AQuoS1jGHUgVrJe2ofVXqObnus_QsUMvvAx0LFIVJy8vfARq84uptHJbUzAHc4l1__25pcHONHUgkKLYhClIqbsjKVrZhgOjTxLVLRCdqV82kE5FLq7fbVRvFo1OCG3m8WZlqluYVZky6jz9HLT2G-TqH_lfAVihgt_NnwTm8PeP8MR&c=fVnhYcSBqIbcE7ab0mhijlAJMo1QqcrpEn0KAIqcPvcnHifoy3xZvA==&ch=oEVDCwUb5P3vJw0uAg2riYhrfDaeLkYLsuv-rwAfswHmlQGeksVVcA==)
---
| Peter,
My heart is full of joy and gratitude. Over the last few weeks, I have been shown tremendous hospitality by the welcoming people of Calvary Baptist, Calvary Chapel Belfast, Calvary Chapel Bangor, Calvary Chapel Penobscot, Calvary Chapel Turner, Crosspoint, Charleston Church and The Rock Church.
I just wanted to take a minute to say thank you to everyone who welcomed me to join your services and worship with you. Over the last few weeks, the campaign trail has gotten quite muddy. Attending these services every week has renewed my spirit and my will to continue the fight to win this race because there is so much that we need to fix in this country.
I cannot thank you enough for the warm welcomes, the stories and absolutely wonderful time spent in good company with my fellow Mainers.
A special thank you to Rob Cross for helping to set all of these visits up. You are a good man and great friend.
A special thank you to Ken Graves for his wisdom, welcome and words of advice. Thank you for all that you do and thank you for the great lunch today!
Election day is Tuesday. I firmly believe that to the brave and faithful, nothing is impossible.
Thank you,
Mike

Fellow patriot,

\*\*A watchdog group has EXPOSED\*\* _Shady Sherrod Brown_ \*\*for his rampant campaign finance violations.\*\* I wish I could say I’m shocked to see another Democrat politician cutting corners to gain the upper hand, but unfortunately, this is par for the course for these guys.

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=10389649.4418.1.f5c084e957cdfeb1ce13a3694a389a07 )<-

Shady Sherrod, the 50-year career politician I’m running against, has been caught red-handed soliciting excessive campaign donations for his primary election \*\*LONG\*\* after it ended! He’s been colluding with the corrupt Ohio Democrat Party, funneling money to his desperate campaign.

Sherrod Brown is the epitome of the \*\*SWAMP\*\*. He’s held public office for _literally_ half a century, has never had a real job, and is desperately clinging to power.

\*\*As the America First candidate in this race, I will serve Ohio and our nation with honor and integrity in the Senate.\*\* I’m not a sleazy career politician like Sherrod – I’m a self-made businessman who knows what it takes to get things done. I’m running to \*\*_SERVE YOU_\*\* , not enrich myself.

\*\*_ But enough talk. _\*\*\*\* If you want to stand up to Sherrod’s corruption, take back the Senate, and get our country back on track, you need to act.

\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=10389649.4424.1.20263562ddef468623df46983a86be26 ) Without your help, we’re in danger of losing this extremely competitive and high-stakes race.

Bernie Moreno

GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

->

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=10389649.4427.1.27cee309c06104a1a71668f836d4efd9 ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

Peter,

I’m about to ask you to [**_rush $5 before our public reporting deadline on June 17th._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86585362/478349707/41188070?&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.09_B1_Deadline-2_u1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjdkYzliMC04ZjI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eGNtWHQMepu3rn5hjucNvxov0lJnsxu8bxjwf9z0no=) But first, there are three things you should know:
1. **_What we raise in the next two weeks will set the tone for the rest of the race._** Everyone from the press to our opponents will be poring over our fundraising numbers to see if we have what it takes to face Republican Kelly Ayotte head-on.
2. **_This race has been declared a toss-up._** This means New Hampshire is the best chance Democrats have at flipping a gubernatorial seat, and according to every independent poll, I’m the candidate in the best position to defeat Kelly Ayotte.
3. **_June has been a tough month for online fundraising._** That means we’re not on track to meet our fundraising goal. In order to stay on track with our campaign strategy, we can’t afford to miss a single benchmark.

[**_Peter, can I count on you to rush $5 or more right now before the deadline? $5 might not seem like a lot, but it all adds up in a race as important as this one. Join the team that’ll flip this seat and win a tough race:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86585363/478349708/41188070?&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.09_B1_Deadline-2_u1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjdkYzliMC04ZjI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eGNtWHQMepu3rn5hjucNvxov0lJnsxu8bxjwf9z0no=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**CHIP IN $5 >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86585364/478349709/41188070?amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.09_B1_Deadline-2_u1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjdkYzliMC04ZjI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eGNtWHQMepu3rn5hjucNvxov0lJnsxu8bxjwf9z0no=)

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 💪 Ready for a property tax relief?
body:
Join "Lobbyists For Citizens" and help turn those tax troubles into triumphs! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ad89c4f5a5&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ef7fa85ecb&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
CONCERNED ABOUT HIGH
PROPERTY TAXES?
YOUR ASSESSMENT
GONE WILD?
HERE'S A WAY TO FIGHT!**

---
|
We want to introduce you to a group that's fighting Ohio's unfair & onerous taxing system, specifically property taxes. [**Lobbyists for Citizens** ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=39dba5ed41&e=5c740fa3e2)is working hard to educate voters, pressure legislators, and activate Ohio citizens to help fight excessive Ohio taxes at all levels of government. They are looking for more volunteers to help them in their battle against entrenched interests, career politicians, and a biased legacy corporate Ohio media.

[**Lobbyists for Citizens**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9bea6c5539&e=5c740fa3e2) is an apolitical, grassroots citizens’ group, registered with the State of Ohio as a 501 (C) (4) Domestic Non-Profit Corporation.

Please go to the **Lobbyists for Citizens** website & register to join their email list by clicking [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6bf482de15&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below. Share this message with friends & family. As well, to gain an appreciation for their thinking around Ohio's vexing property tax system, read this article titled: "[**What is the Role of Government? Are Property Taxes Immoral?**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fe0a4900cc&e=5c740fa3e2)"

THANK YOU!
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ea6ed2bdc3&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**ALERT: UPCOMING EVENTS
WE'VE BEEN ASKED
TO PROMOTE!**

---
|
_Here are 3 events we've been asked by their organizers to promote. Please take a look and consider attending!_

**MARIETTA AREA, MONDAY JUNE 10TH (TOMORROW!)
ORGANIZATIONAL MEETING
TRUMP PARADE, RALLY, AND PATRIOTISM EVENT!**

Tomorrow evening (Monday) June 10th at 7:00 PM at Freedom Gate Church, Marietta, there will be an organizational meeting for a July 6th "**Stand With President Trump Rally, Parade, and Show Your Pride** " event. The organizers tell us they need many people to volunteer for this event. Any questions, please call 740-516-6068. More contact information can be found on the image below, by clicking [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3c3123bd6f&e=5c740fa3e2), or by clicking on the image below.

THANK YOU!
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=efb3116153&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|

**COLUMBUS, OHIO STATEHOUSE, TUESDAY JUNE 11TH
CONVENTION OF STATES ACTION (COS) OHIO ADVOCACY DAY**

>From Ed Mulholland:

"Stand up and be Counted!

Tuesday, June 11th, Ohioans are gathering at the Statehouse to advocate for HJR3, the resolution calling for an Article V Convention of States. Join on the 11th to meet your legislators and let them know you support HJR3. The time has come for the states to call a convention and get our federal government back under control.

The readers of this email are not the type to sit around and complain. You are reading this because you care about America and you are working to fix our broken system. A [**Convention of States**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f4671b1b62&e=5c740fa3e2) is one way we can make lasting change; reeling in our out-of-control federal government, applying some fiscal discipline, and imposing term limits to remove the self-appointed royalty in congress and the [Deep State] swamp.

We will gather at 9 AM on the ground level of the Statehouse. Just head to the "Map Room". We’ll hear from our Sponsors, Representatives McClain and Willis. We will also hear from Dr. Micheal Farris. Dr. Farris will be in town to support our efforts. He is a nationally known constitutional attorney who helped to overturn Roe v. Wade.

Learn more at: [**conventionofstates.com**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8a707cf10f&e=5c740fa3e2)

For details about COS Advocacy Day at the Ohio Statehouse email: [**ed.mulholland@cosaction.com**](mailto:ed.mulholland@cosaction.com)"

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b8f7da1081&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
|
**DEFEND & PROTECT OUR CHILDREN'S FUTURE!**
**AMERICA’S FUTURE - GET IN THE FIGHT!
OHIO SUMMIT & TRAINING
JUNE 14 & 15, PORTAGE COUNTY CHAPEL, RAVENNA**

Watch, listen, and learn from "America’s Future - Project Defend & Protect Our Children" trainers & advisors about the importance of getting involved and attending their GET IN THE FIGHT campaigns to combat child exploitation & trafficking in America. Register for the GET IN THE FIGHT Ohio State Summit and Training on June 14 & 15 at Portage Community Chapel in Ravenna: [**https://www.americasfuture.net/get-in-the-fight-ohio/**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0de20c1c22&e=5c740fa3e2)

To view a video about this effort & event click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=63eec7fce2&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below.

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d716285164&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!
WEEK 3 • LESSON 3**

---
|
In May we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9768ba50c6&e=5c740fa3e2)" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=16d4e85531&e=5c740fa3e2).

Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted [**Lesson 2**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=04d42ceca4&e=5c740fa3e2). This week, we're highlighting [**Lesson 3**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ce5f4ef69e&e=5c740fa3e2): **China’s United Front Work Spreads the Communist Ideology Around the Globe[.](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=698db3620b&e=5c740fa3e2)**

[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=561439e99b&e=5c740fa3e2) will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a13f44e011&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access **Lesson 3** of “**China’s Silent War on America** ” called **"China’s United Front Work Spreads the Communist Ideology Around the Globe".**

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 4, will be the first of 5 lessons providing examples of China’s United Front's work in America and show how each of these initiatives undermines America’s national security._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e1a2a2ffc9&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|

[May 26, 2024 - ⏰ Crucial Info Awaits You This Week](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=11e744ffc2&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 19, 2024 - 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d717bbb40b&e=5c740fa3e2 "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!")

[April 28, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=46b4e42750&e=5c740fa3e2)[👥 ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e46b25ac4e&e=5c740fa3e2 "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!")[Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6b4c409cf7&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b60425c93d&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 14, 2024 - This Week's Must-Know Trio!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6fffeca5be&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 7, 2024 - Secure American Freedoms This Week!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b844b6753d&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ce06589d9c&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Here's the situation:** Pramila is working overtime in Congress to fight back against the cruel and corrupt GOP.

Biden's executive order

| [ ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=047f479386284ca3a32c8588cd7ba608&_e=yGAnf5JE6h7YFOi7d44wlyzVrOKesqcfkxr5V9ywYiBRwTuWmN7FebQb3hvJt88w1tGuLh5UeTyp2AOgizCxXcBkpP3METFyH5YDfqJF9m_LgrrcsrXEsGpWsvUR0BAQLyhbYx3HBCbfAHoEp_kvtf8-9FcNCUlOTFlbdYPZ1UbBVudcgSTT1Hkk8BhMrPv_SUfiVleBpdbyvz-11v-XgvgpOi6fs2U32gyo484mDjWmgCukEdf88dXfGtI6fL_EKlVZVeIaedS35DvnpKLQHFxx9C_P6S2lRq3erlhay74j319VY62V9wG8QAb9hqmyJRiE-UzXykpWdWhSUrFk81hEUuZcrgIPhEPIheEi0eE7LzIvr3X1yCvAMZ-79xDWJ-HbfMP07f1PIr2lzw3oPueoS9JEm8SyCQSSpxVS080%3D)

**It's all a smoke screen.

**Biden's new executive order is his latest attempt to trick the American people into thinking that he actually cares about securing our borders and defending our country.**

I know it. You know it. We all know it.**

Since Joe Biden took office three and a half years ago, he has continually claimed that he does not have the authority to use executive action to close the border.

He and the rest of the radical left Democrats have completely abandoned their duty to protect and defend the United States and uphold their oath to the Constitution.

Unprecedented amounts of illegal aliens are flooding into America from all over the world with no resistance. Drugs, weapons, crime, and undetected terrorists are infiltrating our communities and are putting all American families at risk of grave danger.

**We are a nation of laws, and we need leaders in this country who will uphold the law, close our borders, and clean up the disaster that has been left for us.

**A weak executive order in an election year isn't going to work. It's too little, too late, Joe!**

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m running against a wannabe cowboy

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ][IMG]

Peter, the general election is here.

It’s official: We’re facing off against Mitch McConnell’s handpicked
candidate Tim Sheehy in one of 2024’s most important Senate races.

This is the most critical moment of our campaign so far. How we respond
now will determine whether we’re able to defend this seat or allow some
wealthy outsider to buy it out from under us.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]I need your help now more than ever. Split $25 or more right now
between my campaign and Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland to become an
exclusive General Election Founding Donor.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1013&amount=25&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]DONATE

Tim Sheehy has been lying to Montanans, and I’m sick of it.

He’s been trying to trick Montanans into believing that he grew up rural,
when he actually grew up in a multi-million dollar lakehouse. He’s just
another wealthy outsider buying up Montana and making things more
expensive for the rest of us.

Mitch McConnell wants to run a wannabe cowboy against a third-generation
dirt farmer? Bring it on.

Right now, polls are tightening and dark money groups are set to spend
record breaking amounts to unseat me. If you don’t step up with a donation
to help us fight back, we could lose this election.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]We’ve reached a turning point in this race and I need you with me
today. Split a donation between my campaign and Angela Alsobrooks right
now to become a General Election Founding Donor and help us fight back
against the attacks.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]Chip in $50

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26299?t=1008&amount=35&akid=1802%2E52803%2EbcKXnF ]Other Amount

Serving as Montana’s senior senator is the honor of my lifetime and I’ll
never take for granted the trust Montanans have placed in me to fight for
them in Washington. I’ve been named one of the most effective senators
because I know Montanans are counting on me to deliver results, so I roll
up my sleeves and get to work.

I’m proud to run a campaign that is powered by a grassroots team made up
of hardworking people like you. I know we wouldn’t have gotten this far if
we weren’t in this together.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Happy Pride! 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, can I share something with you?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service. But I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86587075/478355292/705562684?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240609_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkNjUyMGUyLTkzMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=erE0RrfBld5dh2X1xTfZHU8jFQ6KocAUA4Z1xes0FvI=)
After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both:

**I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did.**

When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that.

That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, can I share something with you? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service. But I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. = After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both: I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did. When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = We have made incredible progress over the years in the fight for equality — but FirstName/folks, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ+ youth.In 2024 alone, 515 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across the country. It’s going to take all of us to counter these right wing attacks so everyone grows up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion — not hatred and division — are American values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = Thank you for your ongoing support. Let’s recommit ourselves to work towards the day when all LGBTQ+ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. body:

|

Kari Lake here.

I've got to be honest. This is a hard pill to swallow.

A Kangaroo court led by a corrupt judge convicted President Trump of 34 felonies, even though the prosecutor couldn't even describe what crime he committed.

The simple truth is, we no longer have the rule of law in this country. We now live in a banana republic, thanks to Joe Biden and his cronies like Ruben Gallego.

Dr. Ruiz never planned on running for Congress — and when he declared his candidacy, he was told that a Democrat could never win in this district.
What they didn’t realize was that Dr. Ruiz is more than just the **(D)** behind his name. He’s a physician, an activist, and above all, a lifelong member of our community — and he knows firsthand the challenges people in CA-25 face every single day.
With extremist Republicans determined to win back this seat in 2024, we need every single member of Team Ruiz to step up and ensure that a true advocate for our community can continue fighting for us in Congress.
[We’re counting on our top supporters to help us get a head start on our end-of-quarter fundraising and send Dr. Ruiz across the finish line once again this November. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. clean_body: I wanted to reach out to our top supporters to let you know what we’re dealing with right now. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi there, it’s Caroline, Finance Director here at Team Ruiz. I wanted to reach out to our top supporters to let you know what we’re dealing with right now: Election Day is less than five months away , and the most important fundraising deadline of this campaign is three weeks away. When our numbers go public at the end of June, we need to show Dr. Ruiz’s extremist opponent that this grassroots movement is standing strong and ready to hold this seat come November. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Dr. Ruiz never planned on running for Congress — and when he declared his candidacy, he was told that a Democrat could never win in this district. What they didn’t realize was that Dr. Ruiz is more than just the (D) behind his name. He’s a physician, an activist, and above all, a lifelong member of our community — and he knows firsthand the challenges people in CA-25 face every single day. With extremist Republicans determined to win back this seat in 2024, we need every single member of Team Ruiz to step up and ensure that a true advocate for our community can continue fighting for us in Congress. = | = Thank you, Caroline Finance Direct, Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. Dear Peter,
You’re invited!
Meet Congressman **Chip Roy** , Delegate **Nick Freitas** , and our Republican candidate to take back Virginia’s 7th in 2024: **Cameron Hamilton!**
—
---
| **Monday - June 10th** , at **Death Ridge Brewery** (5255 Higher Ground Trl, Jeffersonton, VA) **at 6:30pm** :
We’ll have the opportunity to meet some of the strongest fighters standing up for our freedoms, food and drink available for purchase, and a program beginning at 7pm!
---
| We hope to see you there!
Team Hamilton

body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| |
---|---
**The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDt4Do6vyPJ50F6Afq3NtvRH7Wx3irVYUZz1L1YqXR924zuYmJhg-rJU8VoYVje9yal90G9t55nO4W8BE0xht7dbnbtd1Pdmv-BEZTYDMHtLC2WnHNz_VyczCfiXurGtGVTvMj7vy9HqvpAROYkt3J6EzmV4GdQjhK9u5q1dfKsspGXf9v5HeIpODw7iiVhPIbTzFQPb4qK9z2dxxnkcmu7ux_SpEBPUKrFKG159Md4Wvis4MtMNsZy41EUO2Ma1pTYfujJcVTS35XAcdrKKXUjBXjrZU7uVc9ZTx9-nGW5Yl5KyW4W7r7bG19hntX_lCDsb8tBQGzzeZPF7vACDH1Eef6x66raGOTnHettD1vH-s-9XsPmNnYdiYgWq_f0GMZ7pN5efH2WD4L0Y76hSSd-eM7yLhgcyDRMg1UJoIdaLMWBIxpiWAMEIoS6fe9S5oFyCyp01aoqy6eRa5ivxoDCrXf6QZ_DTfwURxKlWlBN_LcRO82nwvPKWD2qCTfjUO7gA-QRMOm5JTFl0sr_n8CGTm9P-SCI6noMkDwO-njsiN-5QUN2pbu_-Rjx50LJ4U2a9LPiqFccMxWJkFQvPW21b2-KdbRm87vQp6hw30US5C76LFNV2z3NVmXHmrT2tkBv0GAtCsMTfOeJgP-gcyQlWkA4ph-zD_cw3ZwGfb1FOA/472/Tn9-8Kx_R7OIFQLuB0z9Nw/h0/h001.sS1uwyjQEAyUVm5tjBnej3h-PJV2Yq7DptcHxybOesc) Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | ---|--- The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! We can’t afford to have anyone sit on the sidelines if we want to expand Democratic power. name: Mazie Hirono, Angus King
subject: Passing this along...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, my friend Angus King just announced he’s running for reelection and asked me if I could share the following message with you. He’s an important ally of mine in the U.S. Senate, so I hope you’ll take a minute to read his message and **[split a contribution between our campaigns today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86588893/478361506/650951518?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU0ZGJmNC05YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nImvPBgeIgxRtR25uPz1BPhwQJORcyb1EgDDa7rNziw=)** Mahalo, Mazie \---------- Forwarded message --------- I just turned in a huge stack of petition signatures, which means I am officially running for reelection to the U.S. Senate! I'm running for two main reasons:
1. _We’re losing the middle in the Senate._
2. _There’s a lot left to do._

**In a Congress and nation that is deeply partisan, my position as an Independent has helped bridge the divide.** And we’ve gotten some important things done in the last few years — the _CARES Act_ to send direct economic assistance to American families and businesses hurting during the COVID pandemic, the _Great American Outdoors Act_ to protect our public lands, the _PACT Act_ to expand benefits for our veterans, the $1.2 trillion _Bipartisan Infrastructure bill_ , and the _CHIPS and Science Act_ which has already resulted in an explosion of investment in bringing semiconductor manufacturing back home. All of these accomplishments were the result of bipartisan negotiation, debate, and compromise. And it’s that spirit of working together I'm afraid we’re losing. Our work isn't done. **From the unsustainable cost of prescription drugs to the unacceptable attacks on reproductive rights, our nation is grappling with serious and complex issues.** **[I’m going to keep doing what I always have: encourage compassion and civility and try to bring people and politicians together across party lines to get things done. Here’s the deal, though: this won’t be possible without your support. Peter, would you consider becoming a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign by chipping in $10 or $25 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86588894/478361507/650951518?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU0ZGJmNC05YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nImvPBgeIgxRtR25uPz1BPhwQJORcyb1EgDDa7rNziw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Angus King will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86588895/478361508/650951518?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU0ZGJmNC05YzI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nImvPBgeIgxRtR25uPz1BPhwQJORcyb1EgDDa7rNziw=)

clean_body: | Peter, my friend Angus King just announced he’s running for reelection and asked me if I could share the following message with you. He’s an important ally of mine in the U.S. Senate, so I hope you’ll take a minute to read his message and = Mahalo, Mazie \---------- Forwarded message --------- I just turned in a huge stack of petition signatures, which means I am officially running for reelection to the U.S. Senate! I'm running for two main reasons: 1. We’re losing the middle in the Senate. 2. There’s a lot left to do. In a Congress and nation that is deeply partisan, my position as an Independent has helped bridge the divide. And we’ve gotten some important things done in the last few years — the CARES Act to send direct economic assistance to American families and businesses hurting during the COVID pandemic, the Great American Outdoors Act to protect our public lands, the PACT Act to expand benefits for our veterans, the $1.2 trillion Bipartisan Infrastructure bill , and the CHIPS and Science Act which has already resulted in an explosion of investment in bringing semiconductor manufacturing back home. All of these accomplishments were the result of bipartisan negotiation, debate, and compromise. And it’s that spirit of working together I'm afraid we’re losing. Our work isn't done. From the unsustainable cost of prescription drugs to the unacceptable attacks on reproductive rights, our nation is grappling with serious and complex issues. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Angus King will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Angus King U.S. Senator, Maine Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: The fights worth having are rarely easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That’s what Gabby always says, and it’s the truth
#

Hi there, we don’t want to take up too much of your time on a weekend, but we need to ask:
[**Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today, of $3 or any amount that makes sense for you?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=1&akid=8270%2E3935704%2Ei-hSoE)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=2&akid=8270%2E3935704%2Ei-hSoE)**
When it comes to our movement to end gun violence, we believe in hope over fear.
The hope of a future where our children are safe at school.
The hope of a future where we can go about freely without the threat of gunfire in our public spaces.
The hope of a future where nobody in America—no matter where they live, what they look like, or who they love—has to live with the fear of being a victim of gun violence.
As Gabby always says, the fights worth having are rarely easy. And we all know that the progress we’ve made so far in the gun safety movement has been hard won. We have experienced heartbreak as we’ve mourned tens of thousands of innocent lives lost from gun violence. But we’ve also celebrated the triumphs with the passage of new lifesaving legislation at both the federal level and in states nationwide.
**We’ve gotten to where we are today because of our determination and our willingness to never give up hope—even on the days where change seems impossible. Now, we must keep moving forward.**
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support goes directly towards our work to save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=3&akid=8270%2E3935704%2Ei-hSoE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june24.51eOFU&amount=3&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=4&akid=8270%2E3935704%2Ei-hSoE)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june24.51eOFU&refcode=em240609-1-30&t=5&akid=8270%2E3935704%2Ei-hSoE)**
---
****
Thank you for your support,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8270%2E3935704%2Ei-hSoE) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: FWD: OVERTURN THE VERDICT AGAINST MY FATHER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
| Friend,
---
Now more than ever, I need your help to defend our _free_ Republic.
---
As you know, my father was just **WRONGFULLY CONVICTED** by New York Democrats despite having committed _NO_ _CRIME!_
---
While Crooked Joe is turning his leading opponent and the 2024 presidential frontrunner into a political prisoner, my father has already announced he will **__APPEAL__** this unjust verdict.
---
As he continues fighting to defend himself — and voters like YOU — from this truly _unprecedented_ Marxist tyranny, the response from the _PEOPLE_ must be equally _unprecedented._
---
That is why I’ve teamed up with our House GOP Chair, Elise Stefanik, to circulate this [**NATIONAL PETITION**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=10428147.4429.1.62f26676eac79aab089ae835715e02be) calling for the unjust verdict to be **OVERTURNED.**
---
We’ve set an ambitious goal of **_100,000,000 signatures_** to PROVE just how many patriots agree this was a rigged trial in a kangaroo court that’s ripe to be overturned on appeal!
---
Our country is truly in uncharted territory, Friend...
---
**A sitting president and his accomplices have acted like a Third-World Dictatorship to try and JAIL my father as an innocent man – all to interfere in the 2024 election and _cancel_ _out_ _your_ _vote!_ **
---
_At this defining moment in American history, we need your help in defending our Republic from this Marxist plot._

[**As my father appeals his wrongful conviction at the hands of New York Democrats, please sign the NATIONAL PETITION calling for the unjust verdict against him to be OVERTURNED.**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=10428147.4430.1.f539a5b1bd8f851dab59a396a3038b69)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Celebrating Pride Month! 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] # [#]With the arrival of Pride Month, I’m eager to celebrate and honor the contributions and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community.

My commitment is to ensure that every individual, regardless of their identity or who they love, is treated with dignity and respect. I’m proud to be a part of a state like New Jersey that embraces diversity and inclusion.

Unfortunately, there are those who wish to push back against all the progress the LGBTQ+ has made.

We are currently facing a surge of proposed discriminatory legislation that threatens the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals, specifically in our public education system. Will you join me in advocating for equality for everyone, no matter how they identify or who they love? [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-pride-2406]

SIGN ON [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-pride-2406]

Pride Month is more than a celebration; it is a call to action. Let us stand together in the fight for equality, acceptance, and individuality. Every single American deserves to live their truth without fear or prejudice.

Yours,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. clean_body: [#] # [#]With the arrival of Pride Month, I’m eager to celebrate and honor the contributions and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community. My commitment is to ensure that every individual, regardless of their identity or who they love, is treated with dignity and respect. I’m proud to be a part of a state like New Jersey that embraces diversity and inclusion. Unfortunately, there are those who wish to push back against all the progress the LGBTQ+ has made. We are currently facing a surge of proposed discriminatory legislation that threatens the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals, specifically in our public education system. Will you join me in advocating for equality for everyone, no matter how they identify or who they love? [] SIGN ON [] Pride Month is more than a celebration; it is a call to action. Let us stand together in the fight for equality, acceptance, and individuality. Every single American deserves to live their truth without fear or prejudice. Yours, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich.

Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. Since Gianforte became governor, Raph has blocked more than a dozen different unconstitutional laws that invaded Montanans’ constitutional rights.

**Ryan and Raph are running as champions for ALL Montanans and to Get Our Montana Back!**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s Ryan. Did you hear about Gianforte’s latest gaff? Folks in Browning certainly did — the moment they opened up their tax bill. Turns out, Greg’s Department of Revenue made a MAJOR screw-up when they overcharged hundreds of families on their (already raised) property tax bills. They called it an “error.” I call it what it is: another failure from Greg Gianforte to do his job and serve the people of Montana. And it begs the question: where else has Greg’s tax department screwed up? | | | Let’s set the record straight: the same man who ran on being the tech-genius who would run government like his business just showed us, once again, how unfit he really is to be making the calls. If his Department of Revenue screwed up royally here, what else has Greg screwed up that they haven’t told us about? Montana deserves to know where their taxpayer dollars are going, Peter. | — Ryan | | | ---|---|--- = For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich. Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. Since Gianforte became governor, Raph has blocked more than a dozen different unconstitutional laws that invaded Montanans’ constitutional rights. subject: Friend, can I have a moment of your time?

body:
A vote for Rick Scott is a vote for a Senate with him at the driver's wheel.
| | |
---
Friend, do you have a quick moment to spare?
With so much at stake in Florida's race, I need all hands on deck to stay competitive from now until November.
That's why I've set a flash goal to collect 50,000 grassroots endorsements from Democrats across the country by midnight — **and friend, I'm counting on seeing your name on the list.[If you're with me in the fight to flip Florida and keep the Senate blue, will you please sign by 11:59 p.m.?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86589597/478364054/-433290475?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1334-su-nd&refcode=jtk1334-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE1ZmYxZDktYTEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JfIEJYoPMRV7flDePMFWcJ1Y2x88T2XITiTUQWfp-cg=&emci=ce1665c7-5424-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=6a5ff1d9-a126-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Endorse My Campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86589599/478364056/-433290475?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1334-su-nd&refcode=jtk1334-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE1ZmYxZDktYTEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JfIEJYoPMRV7flDePMFWcJ1Y2x88T2XITiTUQWfp-cg=&emci=ce1665c7-5424-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=6a5ff1d9-a126-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)
---
Let's face it: Extremists like my opponent aren't in politics to represent the interests of working families or fight for Florida's future.
Republicans like Rick Scott are in this to _rule_ us — and they bet on voters to back them just for having an (R) by their name. **That's why I'm determined to make sure Florida knows that a vote for Rick Scott is a vote for:**
* **Higher taxes** for everyday Americans

* The **END** of Social Security, Medicare, and other vital benefits

* A nationwide **BAN** on abortions

* The enactment of Trump’s **cruel, extremist agenda**

* **A GOP-controlled Senate with Rick Scott at the driver's wheel**

And friend, that's only the tip of the iceberg.
**In fact, he just voted _against_ the bipartisan bill to protect access to contraception — even though eight in ten polled voters, including SEVEN in ten GOP voters, support it.**
**_That's_ why I'm in this race. **And if we succeed at the ballot box, I will not rest until reproductive rights, including access to birth control, are reinstated across the land.
**But I can't make that happen, or stop a future where Rick Scott runs the Senate, without your urgent support tonight.**[**Please, friend — will you sign now to be one of the 50,000 grassroots voters I'm counting on to endorse me by midnight? I really can't flip Florida blue without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86589601/478364058/-433290475?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1334-su-nd&refcode=jtk1334-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE1ZmYxZDktYTEyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JfIEJYoPMRV7flDePMFWcJ1Y2x88T2XITiTUQWfp-cg=&emci=ce1665c7-5424-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=6a5ff1d9-a126-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)
Thank you so much for your support,

Debbie

clean_body: A vote for Rick Scott is a vote for a Senate with him at the driver's wheel. | | | Friend, do you have a quick moment to spare? With so much at stake in Florida's race, I need all hands on deck to stay competitive from now until November. That's why I've set a flash goal to collect 50,000 grassroots endorsements from Democrats across the country by midnight — and friend, I'm counting on seeing your name on the list. | | Let's face it: Extremists like my opponent aren't in politics to represent the interests of working families or fight for Florida's future. Republicans like Rick Scott are in this to rule us — and they bet on voters to back them just for having an (R) by their name. That's why I'm determined to make sure Florida knows that a vote for Rick Scott is a vote for: Higher taxes for everyday Americans The END of Social Security, Medicare, and other vital benefits A nationwide BAN on abortions The enactment of Trump’s cruel, extremist agenda A GOP-controlled Senate with Rick Scott at the driver's wheel And friend, that's only the tip of the iceberg. In fact, he just voted against the bipartisan bill to protect access to contraception — even though eight in ten polled voters, including SEVEN in ten GOP voters, support it. That's why I'm in this race. And if we succeed at the ballot box, I will not rest until reproductive rights, including access to birth control, are reinstated across the land. But I can't make that happen, or stop a future where Rick Scott runs the Senate, without your urgent support tonight. Thank you so much for your support, Debbie | | | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Team McBride
subject: Not asking you for money
body:
Thanks for the help!
#
Happy Sunday!
We’ve been hard at work building momentum and raising the resources we need to get Sarah elected.
You’ve probably been seeing our emails asking for contributions, but today, we’ve got three ways you can help out without making a donation:
* **Read our emails** 📧 – You’re already doing it now! Each email that you open, read, and engage with helps us avoid going into spam folders, which is key to keeping our supporters updated on our campaign.

* **Sign up to volunteer** ✋ – It’s all hands on deck on this boat! Sign up to volunteer at our phone banks, canvassing efforts, and more opportunities to help us reach the persuadable voters who will decide this race for Delaware’s sole seat in Congress.

**[Sign up to volunteer »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/923?t=1&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)**
* **Follow Sarah on social media** 📲 – Sarah’s been busy campaigning up and down Delaware, and she’s got the miles on her Chevy to prove it! You can follow Sarah on the campaign trail by following her on social media. And make sure to share Sarah’s posts with your friends, so they can learn about Sarah and join our movement, too:

**[Follow Sarah on Twitter »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/898?t=2&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)**
**[Follow Sarah on Facebook »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/899?t=3&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)**
**[Follow Sarah on Instagram »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/900?t=4&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)**
**[Follow Sarah on TikTok »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/901?t=5&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)**
Thank you for all that you do!
Team McBride
**P.S. Here’s a bonus: Reply back to this email and let us know why you support Sarah, and we may feature your response in an upcoming email or ad!**

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240609-1&t=6&refcode2=590_21716_lT_9gH&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=7&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=8&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=590%2E21716%2ElT_9gH)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Vikram for NH
subject: Vikram Hits the Campaign Trail!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vikram4NH | P
body:
And Reminder: Join Vikram This Tuesday
| | | |
---
Vikram for NH Grassroots Update
---
---
Vikram has been hitting the campaign trail, bringing his message of change to all corners of NH's 2nd congressional district. The response has been overwhelmingly positive, and every day our campaign grows stronger as more people join the campaign. We are building a strong grassroots organization that will deliver victory in the fall!
---
|
---
Reminder: Join Vikram as He Files for Congress!
---
Please join Vikram as he officially files to run for Congress:
Tuesday, June 11 at 9:30am
NH State House 107 N. Main Street Concord, NH
Reception to follow Tandy's Pub and Grille 1 Eagle Square Concord, NH We will be meet in front of the NH State House and then walk with Vikram to the Secretary of State's Office in Room 204 when he files his paperwork.
Come show your support!
To RSVP, just reply to this email or use the RSVP button below
---
| [Click to RSVP!](mailto:rsvp@vikram4nh.com)
---
|
---
| |
---
Vikram Speaks at the NHFRW's Legislative Day
Vikram joined the NH Federation of Republican Women on their Legislative Day to talk about why he was running for Congress. He spoke about how he would use his business background to bring real solutions to Washington, DC.
---
| |
---
Vikram Tours Keene Businesses
Vikram and former Cheshire County GOP Chair Kate Day toured main street businesses in downtown Keene, learning about the challenges they are facing. Vikram discussed his plans to fight inflation, which has been crushing NH families and businesses.
---
| |
---
| Please Donate to Our Campaign!
Can you chip in $10 or $20? It takes resources to run an effective campaign and every little bit helps us get our message out to voters. Please donate today!
---
| | [Click to Donate!](https://g96wusebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ml7xjkzQGZeqzJww5NK5LzdrtvhTCja6kG_tvt_0t_KN8U6EcXQIlpSlaqPPCSJAMG9CNQM5qSrBncKrJyDS22c_7nVp5Up1z9KU1jtxqNy3HitJZwdHDhCQm5_Rr5ucCycmQEB4MFHDiZblNsK-S__UxDrW4d5VB70vElIqRCMu2tmG49rywySqpS4192lTCdNDOGJ1R6c=&c=Jyr4jCe_HIMC9XK-BHcXA6cqXZ7AEEJkRBGeXUykXa22EZZfDrmM9A==&ch=gORfIxuehKXWOdiW5jI9UQsWpEtM1UpF4MVGerlMz4ryxwVXa2wY_g==)
---
|
---
| |
---
Vikram Speaks to Salem GOP
Vikram spoke at the Salem GOP's monthly meeting, sharing his plan to fight inflation and end the out-of-control spending that caused it. He also spoke about the need to secure the border and stop the flow of people and drugs that has become a national security disaster. It is clear that a fired up and united GOP is ready to deliver victory in the fall!
---
| |
---
Vikram Tours Salem Fire Station
Vikram recently toured one of Salem's fire stations with Salem Town Council Chair Joe Sweeney. Vikram learned about department operations and the use of emergency equipment. Vikram is proud to stand with our first responders and will make sure they have the support they need to do their jobs.
---
| |
---
| Join Our Campaign!
---
| Need a lawn sign? Want to host a house party? Want to help in some other way? Please click the button below to join our campaign!
---
| [Click to Join Our Team!](https://g96wusebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ml7xjkzQGZeqzJww5NK5LzdrtvhTCja6kG_tvt_0t_KN8U6EcXQIlnEyA-jCdELxQH2n2K80V6DFTY7VXejIHSl5IlDlzxna3WJ5HKhUJ4okzvc16aUCro6nF4-IeN5IuQk5RDCCom41LQ77ASCVpAhijHdH6epsAoePKADpNmU=&c=Jyr4jCe_HIMC9XK-BHcXA6cqXZ7AEEJkRBGeXUykXa22EZZfDrmM9A==&ch=gORfIxuehKXWOdiW5jI9UQsWpEtM1UpF4MVGerlMz4ryxwVXa2wY_g==)
---
| |
---
| |
---
Vikram Attends Summerfest, Visits the Range
Vikram joined hundreds of people from around NH at Summerfest, checking out the latest firearms and shooting gear. He also had a chance to visit the range and shoot with world-class instructors. Vikram is a long-time gun owner and will be a staunch defender of our Second Amendment Rights when he is elected to Congress.
---
| |
---
Vikram Speaks to Hillsborough County GOP
Vikram spoke at the recent Hillsborough County GOP meeting, discussing how the lifelong bureaucrats and career politicians are completely out-of-touch with the concerns of ordinary people. Vikram will bring his real-world experience to DC and solve the problems facing all Americans.
---
| |
---
| [Visit Our Website!](https://g96wusebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ml7xjkzQGZeqzJww5NK5LzdrtvhTCja6kG_tvt_0t_KN8U6EcXQIlmfSKq8NLwuEDlpKC3xzSU4a-H3vi7GyUEFid8ib03ybbgkPgEcc6Y8BR4aW-RD6PkDM_fAPP68iUoodOY24h0Y1_hFibA2AEQ==&c=Jyr4jCe_HIMC9XK-BHcXA6cqXZ7AEEJkRBGeXUykXa22EZZfDrmM9A==&ch=gORfIxuehKXWOdiW5jI9UQsWpEtM1UpF4MVGerlMz4ryxwVXa2wY_g==)
---
| [](https://g96wusebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ml7xjkzQGZeqzJww5NK5LzdrtvhTCja6kG_tvt_0t_KN8U6EcXQIlqvKkcpp79S5cFDz7qY1Yo1p8roT7FE4Qts2Y3TMcBfJ_qrfrGRPW_CnMWkyJb1-_iYSZZI7AY5DWvnLX3yiRSnUBVwWej2S7LbGOaC15Wug89jiLzjfU2c=&c=Jyr4jCe_HIMC9XK-BHcXA6cqXZ7AEEJkRBGeXUykXa22EZZfDrmM9A==&ch=gORfIxuehKXWOdiW5jI9UQsWpEtM1UpF4MVGerlMz4ryxwVXa2wY_g==) [](https://g96wusebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ml7xjkzQGZeqzJww5NK5LzdrtvhTCja6kG_tvt_0t_KN8U6EcXQIlmfSKq8NLwuEoqN8CwL6FxSSShk_ldFzgObQHzVwyzhVotilN_UtESCdXAIHNZuqvGkvP2MSKtMdF7JXCvDNd2MT1y7mRk0cY9_3i0f6BVmk4K55ReRnwUY=&c=Jyr4jCe_HIMC9XK-BHcXA6cqXZ7AEEJkRBGeXUykXa22EZZfDrmM9A==&ch=gORfIxuehKXWOdiW5jI9UQsWpEtM1UpF4MVGerlMz4ryxwVXa2wY_g==) [](https://g96wusebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ml7xjkzQGZeqzJww5NK5LzdrtvhTCja6kG_tvt_0t_KN8U6EcXQIlmfSKq8NLwuEwmPdUDnctljHkvx1FyoVisRfiGZE4LgyKjyIprKzbDoFoh6AeY9Adu0qDZ_pxS6X7jUV8Z2hexdyGbYtfIv-8P2IAREHyOaB&c=Jyr4jCe_HIMC9XK-BHcXA6cqXZ7AEEJkRBGeXUykXa22EZZfDrmM9A==&ch=gORfIxuehKXWOdiW5jI9UQsWpEtM1UpF4MVGerlMz4ryxwVXa2wY_g==)

name: Data Team
subject: re: the GOP’s scheme to sabotage Social Security!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)
---
Look,

Last week, we sent you an urgent poll about Social Security after a new House Republican plan called for over $1.5 trillion in cuts to Social Security, including an increase in the retirement age to 69 and cutting disability benefits.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Without [4] more responses from your area, our data won’t be statistically significant.

**[_So we’re giving you a second chance to complete the poll. Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)** | **[COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)**
---
We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

\- Fight for Reform Data Team
* * *
From: Oh no... [FFR]
Subject: DECREASE in Social Security!?
To: Name on file
**ACTION REQUIRED**
**We are seriously trying not to panic, team** – If the GOP cuts Social Security benefits, the most vulnerable will face an uncertain future!

That’s why we’ve sent out an **urgent Social Security poll for your area****:** we need to know what you think to better prepare for the 2024 election!
**[_Do you agree we need to protect Social Security from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)** | **[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)**
---
**[NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)**
**[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240609_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=21522%2E4449941%2Ei8hjsH)**
**_WE NEED 200 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 6-05-24, 11:59 PM ET_ **
We can’t let MAGA Republicans demolish our earned benefits.

We really need you to speak up, team.

FFR
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
