Friend, this is a dire moment for our reelection fight, so I wanted you to hear it directly from me:
**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell handpicked my billionaire-backed, anti-abortion GOP opponent, Sam Brown – and dark money groups like the Koch network began spending MILLIONS to defeat me.
**THEN:** _The Cook Political Report_ downgraded my race from “Lean Democratic” to a “Toss Up.”
**Now, TODAY,** Donald Trump immediately ATTACKED me as he took the stage at his rally in Nevada, calling me a "terrible Senator."
**The ONLY way that I can fight back against Trump and the GOP is with your grassroots support. So with Senate control hinging on this race here in Nevada, I’m counting on your help to reach our $50,000 rapid-response goal before midnight – and we’re still way short.**

name: Harry
subject: an ode to an original Democracy Defender
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dunn's Democracy Defenders PAC
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86590897/478368163/604658357?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.09_B1_Tattoo-RH_U2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhMjM1NzEtYTcyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YjgEwNbnQP3xT7wV53CI3ScebCR-UIG66Nl4fa0wB7A=#)
---
Hey team – it’s Harry Dunn.

Have I ever shown you this tattoo? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86590898/478368164/-1139120566?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.09_B1_Tattoo-RH_U2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhMjM1NzEtYTcyNi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YjgEwNbnQP3xT7wV53CI3ScebCR-UIG66Nl4fa0wB7A=) I got this tattoo in honor of my hero and a true democracy defender, the late Congressman John Lewis.

**The Black heart, that represents the struggle of Black people.** It's a struggle every Black American faces throughout their life. And being a Black man, running for Congress, that's the ultimate sign I've persevered through the struggles.

**The blood tears are for all the bloodshed Black Americans cast** from peaceful demonstrations like the March on Washington or Bus Boycotts. Hundreds of Black heroes, like John Lewis, took beatings that day – and some even laid down their lives so that people like me could have a voice in our democracy.

**And the red lightning symbolizes the chaos that ensues when you get into good trouble.** Because like John Lewis said, "get in good trouble, necessary trouble, and help redeem the soul of America."

[**_It's because of my heroes that I have the opportunity to lead Democracy Defenders PAC and be one of the loudest voices fighting for our democracy. I'm following down the path they carved for Black Americans. clean_body: | =# Hey team – it’s Harry Dunn. Have I ever shown you this tattoo? = I got this tattoo in honor of my hero and a true democracy defender, the late Congressman John Lewis. The Black heart, that represents the struggle of Black people. It's a struggle every Black American faces throughout their life. And being a Black man, running for Congress, that's the ultimate sign I've persevered through the struggles. The blood tears are for all the bloodshed Black Americans cast from peaceful demonstrations like the March on Washington or Bus Boycotts. Hundreds of Black heroes, like John Lewis, took beatings that day – and some even laid down their lives so that people like me could have a voice in our democracy. And the red lightning symbolizes the chaos that ensues when you get into good trouble. Because like John Lewis said, "get in good trouble, necessary trouble, and help redeem the soul of America." = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = All my best, Harry = Dunn's Democracy Defenders 401 2nd Avenue South Suite 303 Seattle, WA 98104 United States | Paid for by Dunn's Democracy Defenders PAC

name: Hold Biden accountable via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Biden going MAGA on immigration?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — plain and
simple, President Biden’s new executive order restricting the rights of
asylum-seekers is an affront to human rights, the rule of law, and the
immigration policies he stood for during his election. As Rashida put it,
“President Biden promised to end cruel Trump-era immigration policies, not
resume them.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18007?t=1011&akid=6145%2E5885482%2EQ4poWX ][IMG]

This is bad, unjust immigration policy that threatens lives and
dehumanizes migrants. It gives the impression that Biden is intentionally
making right-wing policy in hopes of winning some extra votes in November.
It’s disgusting and misguided. This is no way to govern and no way to win
re-election.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18008?source=email-20240609&t=1012&akid=6145%2E5885482%2EQ4poWX ]Add your name: Biden, don’t go MAGA on immigration. Our movement needs
to stop Biden from destroying the right to seek asylum and putting lives
at risk.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18008?source=email-20240609&t=1013&akid=6145%2E5885482%2EQ4poWX ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s bad policy AND bad politics. Polling, especially in battleground
states, shows that moving to the right is not a winning strategy.

Just days before announcing this executive order, the President tweeted,
“America is home to people whose ancestors have been here for thousands of
years, folks who immigrated generations ago, and those who have just
arrived. This Immigrant Heritage Month, we celebrate the courage of our
nation’s immigrants, whose dreams are the foundation of America.” But now
he’s shutting down the border to people seeking refuge from violence and
other difficult conditions. This is Biden’s hypocrisy at its worst.

We know Biden needs the progressive coalition behind him in November. So
we must come together now and loudly say this is unacceptable policy!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18008?source=email-20240609&t=1014&akid=6145%2E5885482%2EQ4poWX ]Add your name: Demand that Biden reverse this unjust, immoral,
dangerous immigration executive order!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240609.hDTAOJ&t=1008&akid=6145%2E5885482%2EQ4poWX ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20240609.URRCwR&t=1009&akid=6145%2E5885482%2EQ4poWX ]GIVE MONTHLY

Hey Peter! I thought you might want to see some photos from all of the amazing work our team has been doing in the field. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86591165/478369041/2145040083?refcode=240607_kr_juneupdate_img1&ms=240607_kr_juneupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MDBlZi1hOTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIJSugmzsPNuZqIDYCo4FbZP3VUA6SEy7ZbUhYXsF4E=)_Yassamin knocking doors and putting up yard signs in Maryvale, with volunteers and family_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86591166/478369042/2145040083?refcode=240607_kr_juneupdate_img2&ms=240607_kr_juneupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MDBlZi1hOTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIJSugmzsPNuZqIDYCo4FbZP3VUA6SEy7ZbUhYXsF4E=) _Meeting voters in Laveen_ [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86591167/478369043/2145040083?refcode=240607_kr_juneupdate_img3&ms=240607_kr_juneupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MDBlZi1hOTI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIJSugmzsPNuZqIDYCo4FbZP3VUA6SEy7ZbUhYXsF4E=)_Hosting an awesome canvass kickoff and sign slam with the Ironworkers Local 75_ **Early voting starts in just 26 days, and the last day to register to vote in our primary election is July 1st. ** That means the next several weeks will be critical. body:
As the first gay man of color elected to Congress

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86591252/478369422/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzJjMTgzNi1hYjI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epwbHux2pzfoqAzAM6umhh2IXJKdHB4IrzzvcFW4KBQ=)
---
Peter, since becoming the first gay man of color elected to Congress, I have seen so much progress in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights.

Sadly, I’ve also seen the Republican Party take every step to decimate our progress.

That’s why I was horrified to see this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86591253/478369423/649527246?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20240609_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzJjMTgzNi1hYjI2LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epwbHux2pzfoqAzAM6umhh2IXJKdHB4IrzzvcFW4KBQ=) **Republicans are decimating our few protections as LGBTQ+ individuals.**

So, I’m taking the lead in Congress to fight for our rights. That means passing more legislation at the federal level (like the Equality Act), organizing support across the country, and fighting back against conservative Supreme Court rulings.

But I can’t do this without your support.

[**Can I count on you to chip in $3 to fund my work and ensure I can keep fighting for LGBTQ people and other marginalized communities for years to come? clean_body: As the first gay man of color elected to Congress | = Peter, since becoming the first gay man of color elected to Congress, I have seen so much progress in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. Sadly, I’ve also seen the Republican Party take every step to decimate our progress. That’s why I was horrified to see this: = Republicans are decimating our few protections as LGBTQ+ individuals. So, I’m taking the lead in Congress to fight for our rights. That means passing more legislation at the federal level (like the Equality Act), organizing support across the country, and fighting back against conservative Supreme Court rulings. But I can’t do this without your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = My community is under attack. Team, now that ballots have been mailed out, I want to briefly discuss the stakes of this election on June 25th and let you know why it’s critical that we make the right decision as to who will represent the Democratic Party, most likely against Lauren Boeber this fall.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0d1fad0692d04f8fb6ef73d981e40bbe&_e=owj3xdE-YFJFGGmxYmk3gR1-Nv3i0QeQVD3e2-avLdCzrO2Bvg6PxPxbxh_9hIXSZlKEUAGmHNBVCbwxedUUSRuf1aO93ZfPuke4cYIRu9ZNMvpRHpRn3cBUpbJn9deYhsbfJwuwuGDOkRZ_BtQpza_mkj633mJkobX0WBVMGAG7W4VaB8LjhmIgKa_yapNYGj92mfZ8uVIjEL1I6SN6oPFTnfWNiTfBSdWjjW6NK9Yt_K2chI1eOqqNA-HxNRwlIahq4U2bX9rwL4YpJEyxo2R3f2McK4b2UrAsGqgixiVKuOl1PyvjM7ZGMR6vKlKchAgQNTAuLXz_35tN6y91ILiGel0nvMgkxDXWcHC_LI73c3KCFoxKsaRcJ-iUun9IACs3Zak3-nR7xRMzv98uEQ%3D%3D) Team, Now that ballots have been mailed out, I want to briefly discuss the stakes of this election on June 25th and let you know why it’s critical that we make the right decision as to who will represent the Democratic Party, most likely against Lauren Boebert this fall. We know our district has been forgotten by political elites for a long time now. And we know how desperately we need some changes. We need better educational and job opportunities for our children, we need more affordable health care, we need to maintain and protect our ecosystems, and so much more. **The fact of the matter is, if Lauren Boebert wins and returns to Washington with a Republican majority, none of those issues that matter most to us will ever see the light of day.** We’ve seen from her time in her old district that Boebert only does things that will get her more appearances on Newsmax. Service does not interest her. That’s why it’s crucial that we send the Democrat most capable of beating her into the general election. I believe I am the one in this race who can take on and beat Boebert. But now that ballots have gone out, I need your help to fund our Get Out The Vote operation. **[So will you chip in $10, $20, or even $50 to my campaign to help us fund this thing through the 25th?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0d1fad0692d04f8fb6ef73d981e40bbe&_e=owj3xdE-YFJFGGmxYmk3gR1-Nv3i0QeQVD3e2-avLdCzrO2Bvg6PxPxbxh_9hIXSZlKEUAGmHNBVCbwxedUUSRuf1aO93ZfPuke4cYIRu9ZNMvpRHpRn3cBUpbJn9deYhsbfJwuwuGDOkRZ_BtQpza_mkj633mJkobX0WBVMGAG7W4VaB8LjhmIgKa_yapNYGj92mfZ8uVIjEL1I6SN6oPFTnfWNiTfBSdWjjW6NK9Yt_K2chI1eOqqNA-HxNRwlxQ_kjaHShXmyqqIGdV90G6BjhIAzW7WrYJWqbhfLeaI6gSFMMHU0Awwmsxnw-rGctcnDxXVFdB6-Nw3vujKLBaYQwSqtFH0TiOs0dXtkdihEJFALtBWMcOfjixDbo_ninSIUnTVJ097tClZqJnxsEw%3D%3D)**[****](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0d1fad0692d04f8fb6ef73d981e40bbe&_e=owj3xdE-YFJFGGmxYmk3gR1-Nv3i0QeQVD3e2-avLdBcczH7f2lnS-QuRIpB4sDODcst26btToR44CHdZ_3Je8D513HVsl9Q_Y5VWMNKk7IAKrSSzrzky-nUokP18OQjW1FLI2HE0m09NTqvL3RMdD8xAHYBgaqMlDRlXTRLrP1uYUQXUSFwqavEu9OSrxC1weBsFJoaUZpwMJymR_euOSvmI99tVaJSV2eXJa9ZZqSWvbgVs1xOeR4bNBoBHLOuzKgj1Gx5lZcmA3P-aHKwi_l9yzPuvJj6uYza5GVTszalNs96PT5q5Nm3SI4HxQWQZPP0KMSErWB2tdeoYuNYEZd50EDeguuCf-YM8E5JFhbEoVmIbo5TA94nShGyfyklR5NT7YCvVGe5q7S0ofZUIAUn3zRpa1wG-rNK8WK0jfk%3D)_If We know our district has been forgotten by political elites for a long time now. And we know how desperately we need some changes. We need better educational and job opportunities for our children, we need more affordable health care, we need to maintain and protect our ecosystems, and so much more. The fact of the matter is, if Lauren Boebert wins and returns to Washington with a Republican majority, none of those issues that matter most to us will ever see the light of day. The ONLY thing President Trump is guilty of is fighting to make America great.

_And if that’s a crime, they should lock me up too._

Friend, even though President Trump and I defended our country in different ways, we both fought to keep America safe and strong.

While he was in the White House supporting our troops and securing our border, I was fighting on the front lines in war zones going face-to-face with our enemies.

We both unapologetically love America - and that’s why I can’t WAIT to work hand-in-hand with him when I get to the U.S. Senate.

**But there’s just one catch: now that I have President Trump’s endorsement, the radical Left is doing absolutely EVERYTHING they can to destroy me.**

_I wouldn’t be surprised if they tried to throw me behind bars too!_

**[It’s crunch time for EVERY pro-Trump Republican, Friend. name: Letter to President Trump
subject: Sign this beautiful letter of love and support to stand with Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're sending President Trump a beautiful letter to make sure he feels our love and support. Will you co-sign it?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

God bless President Trump!

_**During this dark time for our great nation, we must surround President Trump with the LOVE and JOY of our MAGA movement. **_

So we wrote this big, beautiful letter to express our affection and gratitude for all he has done for us and America.

But we still need **1 Million more MAGA patriots** to add their names to this letter before we can deliver it.

[**Will you show President Trump your love right now and sign your name to this beautiful letter?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d7c874c5a494d6e8d095a557e569cd5&_e=SX2LOYg2Mv2YxqGu7EMGD6MR4TJfG-01-QneOa23jk7BxR-FKmB37XvHIkweJLXKo61Z3DN2rLx4ORES0EURHwAh3PgwW_CuMR5snoL431lbOLHAO9_wlYCtclr0HPeLOKWRLVsla1uXfPwm7LJXnHFyaBHSoG_d0-SDsnnFMCY5654HI2tEK8WdVpKSmFDJWEZCvzHXopthGRpPNuTeF_ZWGAzo_Mq3xKx5T0fW12xOesTkvY843rXRL27evSDIFFqzNGzgfUNdcw7HyYcjOeFSU6luwgLXKnWXJar7nzVBxav8I1Kn8TPdZlN-ul-3drtMa9YH-n50dYWpN9xSd0d1R9tzzIAYkTUfsRX4iNQmwafEjH8bwaq80Pal0-zJ18OypKDNkAbM-l5I1YXxhuYdHKWjmwqHZb9F-4dIxbY%3D "Will you show President Trump your love right now and sign your name to this beautiful letter? ")

_We will win this war for our great nation and we will win it with LOVE!_

---
| | | [READ AND SIGN THE LETTER ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d7c874c5a494d6e8d095a557e569cd5&_e=SX2LOYg2Mv2YxqGu7EMGD6MR4TJfG-01-QneOa23jk7BxR-FKmB37XvHIkweJLXKo61Z3DN2rLx4ORES0EURHwAh3PgwW_CuMR5snoL431lbOLHAO9_wlYCtclr0HPeLOKWRLVsla1uXfPwm7LJXnHFyaBHSoG_d0-SDsnnFMCY5654HI2tEK8WdVpKSmFDJWEZCvzHXopthGRpPNuTeF_ZWGAzo_Mq3xKx5T0fW12xOesTkvY843rXRL27evSDIBUevRTzpzAeOQw8k2x61zOiLl37p3DmPJmQNMUCd3XuN7ebGZuWoAQf13Ao-ja-G_c9dwayUNsYU1E9TS3C60L3VojyGYIxnS4z2dhox_mXrZL0fX5ZLF64Nmok5NpIW7J6nx24xfTSg18-v1gTn_5f3IR_ZqyDBkXU3TJXsQmo%3D "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| |
Dear President Trump,

God bless you!

During this dark time for America, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love and support.

So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU!

Thank you for protecting us from the Radical Left hordes that want to destroy our country and our movement.

Thank you for never surrendering to these evil forces that want to destroy America.

And thank you for sacrificing yourself for us.

We know that they are after all of us, but you are selflessly standing in their way.

Thats why:

WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU.

WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU.

AND WE WILL NEVER ABANDON YOU.

The Radical Left may have won this battle, but we will win the war.

Because the real verdict will come on November 5th!

During this dark time in America, I hope you feel the love of the millions of patriotic Americans who have your back.

And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to doing everything we can to defeat Joe Biden in November.

Justice will be served. We will make sure of it.

God bless you President Trump, and God help America.

Sincerely,

{YOUR SIGNATURE}

clean_body: We're sending President Trump a beautiful letter to make sure he feels our love and support. Will you co-sign it? | | | | Friend, God bless President Trump! During this dark time for our great nation, we must surround President Trump with the LOVE and JOY of our MAGA movement. So we wrote this big, beautiful letter to express our affection and gratitude for all he has done for us and America. But we still need 1 Million more MAGA patriots to add their names to this letter before we can deliver it. "Will you show President Trump your love right now and sign your name to this beautiful letter? " We will win this war for our great nation and we will win it with LOVE! | | | "Generic Button" | | | | Dear President Trump, God bless you! During this dark time for America, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love and support. So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU! Thank you for protecting us from the Radical Left hordes that want to destroy our country and our movement. Thank you for never surrendering to these evil forces that want to destroy America. And thank you for sacrificing yourself for us. We know that they are after all of us, but you are selflessly standing in their way. Thats why: WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU. WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU. AND WE WILL NEVER ABANDON YOU. The Radical Left may have won this battle, but we will win the war. Because the real verdict will come on November 5th! During this dark time in America, I hope you feel the love of the millions of patriotic Americans who have your back. And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to doing everything we can to defeat Joe Biden in November. Justice will be served. We will make sure of it. God bless you President Trump, and God help America. Sincerely, {YOUR SIGNATURE} | | | "Generic Button" STAND WITH TRUMP | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Peter,
As you may know, the primary runoffs concluded on May 28th, and TFVC is thrilled that **7 out of 10** vaccine choice champions secured victories in Texas House races! Winners from the Texas House runoffs include:

* HD 30 AJ Louderback
* HD 33 Katrina Pierson
* HD 44 Alan Schoolcraft
* HD 58 Helen Kerwin
* HD 61 Kersa Richardson
* HD 64 Andy Hopper
* HD 91 David Lowe

The runoff results show how many Texans support banning ALL vaccine mandates, protecting medical privacy, and defending informed consent! These representatives and other vaccine choice champions in the Texas House will play a vital role in protecting Texans from vaccine mandates that the pharmaceutical lobby is so keen on enacting.
To add to this excitement, the Republican Party of Texas (RPT) released the delegates' [top eight priorities](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDk4OTA4MDQwOTM4Mzk2NTc0JmM9bjB6NCZlPTAmYj0xMzI5MzU4Nzk5JmQ9bzd6Mms1cQ==.FW-nuMfl8tuwBmWn3JGbnfIDuCXVbw5W6XvnMftEsuc) on Friday, and the language from our efforts at RPT convention prevailed. Medical liberty will be a top priority for the legislature to address in January. TFVC is looking forward to big things in the coming months! Between the general election in November and preparing our legislation for the next session, we will have our hands full for the rest of 2024. Pledge your support of TFVC today with a [monthly contribution of ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDk4OTA4MDQwOTM4Mzk2NTc0JmM9bjB6NCZlPTAmYj0xMzI5MzU4ODAwJmQ9dDR0OGo1Zw==.1YH5BYo2LJw_3yZbv5ml5dS_fzE8uFZ2kNUCodmIb28)[$95, $45, or just $24](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDk4OTA4MDQwOTM4Mzk2NTc0JmM9bjB6NCZlPTAmYj0xMzI5MzU4ODAxJmQ9ZzVpN28yZA==.X7nQrKQcOF5HvD5Gn17IUbZNWvidWVBpZUGnLeXAmr8), and join us in the fight for medical liberty! Every dollar you give goes directly to TFVC’s mission to promote vaccine choice, medical privacy, and informed consent. Commit to a monthly contribution today and tell vaccine mandate tyrants to “Come and Make Me!”
| **Plus, if you commit to a monthly donation of $24, we'll send you a "Come and Make Me" TFVC coffee mug as a thank you!**

subject: They’re Undermining YOUR Vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Bobby Kennedy needs your immediate help to put him on the national debate stage.

|
---
| | | [Bobby Kennedy needs your immediate help to put him on the national debate stage.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_law_6_9_24_non_donor_1&n=1)

Dear Peter,
**Bobby Kennedy needs your immediate help to put him on the national stage for the first presidential debate hosted by CNN.**
Give me a minute to explain. Then please take the critical actions outlined below to do your part to help out.
CNN, ABC, and the other Big Media Barons think they can undermine democracy by blocking RFK Jr. from the presidential debates. They are playing with your vote.
The fact is federal law requires **“objective criteria to determine which candidates may participate in a debate.” ...**
_OBJECTIVE_ criteria!
Well, there’s absolutely NOTHING objective about the criteria CNN is using to try and keep RFK Jr. off the June 27 debate stage.
1. RFK Jr. meets the requirements to be on 19 state ballots, **_which is enough signatures for 278 electoral votes_.** Trump and Biden won’t be on ANY state ballots on June 27 and won’t be until after they are officially nominated at their summer national conventions.
2. RFK Jr. already clears CNN’s voter opinion survey percentage entry point in three out of the required four voter surveys by Quinnipiac University, the Marquette Law School, and CNN’s own poll of voters.

CNN’s requirements clearly violate federal law.
71% of Americans think the presidential debates should include independent candidates like RFK Jr. according to the recent Harvard CAPS/Harris national poll. Every day more and more Americans are turned off by the Trump/Biden rematch devoid of any issues.
[YOUR ACTION TODAY WILL MAKE THE DIFFERENCE TO PUT RFK JR. ONTO THE DEBATE STAGE ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_law_6_9_24_non_donor_1&n=3)
**_We must raise $1.2 Million in the next two weeks_** to get RFK Jr.’s name – and message – out to voters to get the percentage of voter support CNN is requiring.
[If you take a moment right now to chip in your special gift](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_law_6_9_24_non_donor_1&n=4), **you can help meet our urgent goal of raising $1.2 million before June 19 to boost RFK Jr.’s poll numbers before the debate.**
[My Best Gift To Get RFK Jr. On the Debate Stage](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_law_6_9_24_non_donor_1&n=5)
Your quick action right now will make the difference.
Thank you for jumping in right away – AND for your continued support!
Team Kennedy

Give me a minute to explain. Then please take the critical actions outlined below to do your part to help out. Well, there’s absolutely NOTHING objective about the criteria CNN is using to try and keep RFK Jr. off the June 27 debate stage. 1. RFK Jr. meets the requirements to be on 19 state ballots, which is enough signatures for 278 electoral votes. Trump and Biden won’t be on ANY state ballots on June 27 and won’t be until after they are officially nominated at their summer national conventions. 2. RFK Jr. already clears CNN’s voter opinion survey percentage entry point in three out of the required four voter surveys by Quinnipiac University, the Marquette Law School, and CNN’s own poll of voters. We must raise $1.2 Million in the next two weeks to get RFK Jr.’s name – and message – out to voters to get the percentage of voter support CNN is requiring. , you can help meet our urgent goal of raising $1.2 million before June 19 to boost RFK Jr.’s poll numbers before the debate. name: Jill Stein 2024
subject: "Israel has a right to try and target those civilians"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Biden admin’s slip of the tongue is especially dark after this weekend’s massacre.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=1)
---
Peter

Eight months and at least 36,700 deaths later the Biden Administration still doesn’t seem to understand that international law applies to them and Israel too.

Matthew Miller, the spokesperson for the State Department on Thursday said **_“Israel has a right to try and target those civilians”_** while discussing how the Israeli attack on a UN School that killed 40 people,_including 14 children_ , doesn't cross Biden's “red line”.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=2)
---
The State Department later tried to clarify Miller’s statement to mean “Hamas fighters” rather than _“those civilians.”

_ But that ghastly slip of the tongue doesn’t look far from the truth after Israeli forces infiltrated and raided the Nuseirat refugee camp to slaughter nearly 300 Palestinians – all to rescue four hostages.

There are unconfirmed reports that Israeli forces used the US-constructed pier to infiltrate the camp among aid shipments, as well as claims that the raid resulted in the deaths of several hostages.

The Biden administration denies that the aid pier was used in the raid, but they do openly admit to supporting the operation with US intelligence.

Whether or not we ever learn the truth about the extent of US military involvement in this particular raid, there are a few things we do know for certain:

Israel is murdering dozens, sometimes hundreds of Palestinians every single day, aided by direct, material support from the United States government.

The fight for Palestinian liberation is also a fight for our nation’s soul. It’s a fight we cannot and will not lose.

Your ongoing grassroots support for this campaign is critical. The fact is there no other candidate for president who will be on the ballot across the nation this November willing to end this genocide and work towards a permanent ceasefire and a free Palestine.

[**We need your support to guarantee Jill will be on the ballot in every state so that every American can vote for peace.**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=3)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=4 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=4)
---
Your contribution _of any amount_ today will help put a pro-worker, anti-genocide, climate action agenda front and center in this election on the ballot in November.

Thank you for being part of the movement for people, planet, and peace over profit.

With Gratitude,

Team Jill Stein
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=5 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=targeting_civilians&n=5)

| | Hey Peter — it’s great to be back in the office! Over the last few weeks, the Morse team has been on our East Side Tour of California’s Third connecting with voters in Inyo, Alpine, Mono, and Sierra Counties! **Take a look at some of the highlights:** [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ABs_SQo6xmF8-CqL6heoWQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_) [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ABs_SQo6xmF8-CqL6heoWQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_) [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ABs_SQo6xmF8-CqL6heoWQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_) [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ABs_SQo6xmF8-CqL6heoWQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_) [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ABs_SQo6xmF8-CqL6heoWQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_) _This_ is where we’re building our campaign, Peter — in backyard patios, hikes along Mono Lake, community events, and on the ground with voters like you. **We’re leaving nobody and no county behind in this race, Peter. And this summer, we’ll continue the next few legs of our district tour so we can get our campaign in front of**** _every_****voter in CA-03.** [**If you’re able, please help us continue growing our movement to elect Jessica Morse by pitching in a couple bucks for gas, drinks and snacks, and more signs for folks to hold (they’re in high demand!) as we continue traveling across the district between now and November 5! »**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/WA_RtHpAR7QMcAGSvYOFYA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_) | | [$15 = 1 CASE OF WATER](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/1r2NR_nyWO3NubKbLlV6eA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoSK_)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86592045/478372204/-125044419?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240609_1_3&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkMjU5NjVjLWIwMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9f3oZt1xeUDXKZcbAQy2hTurPefg834O2Cc2-EgNm0A=)

**And spoiler alert:** He's ready to do it again.

**We can’t let him. This November is our chance to finally hold him accountable by kicking him out of the Senate for good.**

**Polls currently show him and Colin Allred TIED in Texas, but this is shaping up to be the most expensive race in the country.** [So please, will you chip in $25, 15, $5, or whatever to Colin’s campaign and to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz and bring real, pro-democracy leadership to Texas?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86592050/478372206/-125044419?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240609_1_3&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkMjU5NjVjLWIwMjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9f3oZt1xeUDXKZcbAQy2hTurPefg834O2Cc2-EgNm0A=)

Ted Cruz has proven time and again to be the single most divisive politician in Washington. From leading the charge on the 2012 government shutdown to ushering in an era of extreme hyper-partisanship and pitting Americans against each other with dangerous, extremist rhetoric. _**Ted isn't just Texans' problem – he's ALL AMERICANS’ problem.**_

Ted Cruz's refusal to commit to accepting election results is exactly the kind of rhetoric that led to January 6, and another six years of him in the Senate is a danger our democracy simply can’t afford.

As a former voting rights lawyer, Colin knows firsthand how critical it is that we all remain committed to protecting our democracy and ensuring that something like January 6 never happens again. Derek -- Here's where we're at: **FIRST** : We shared news of Donald Trump and the RNC raising $141 million in the month of May -- a staggering amount of money. **THEN** : We hoped that Democrats everywhere would recognize the urgency of this moment and help us close that fundraising gap as much as we could. We did well, but came up short of where we had hoped. **NOW** : We're really in an all-hands-on-deck situation. This is an FEC deadline month and when it's over we're legally required to report what we raise. Everyone will see and compare. clean_body: Here’s where we’re at: | | Derek -- Here's where we're at: FIRST : We shared news of Donald Trump and the RNC raising $141 million in the month of May -- a staggering amount of money. THEN : We hoped that Democrats everywhere would recognize the urgency of this moment and help us close that fundraising gap as much as we could. We did well, but came up short of where we had hoped. NOW : We're really in an all-hands-on-deck situation. This is an FEC deadline month and when it's over we're legally required to report what we raise. Everyone will see and compare. Every single donation matters. It can matter in the presidential race, control of the House and Senate, or even legislative races in your state. It matters to help us reach the financial goals we need in order to elect Democrats everywhere. And it especially matters with Trump's fundraising numbers in May. We mean it when we say the donation itself is more important than the amount you give. It will all add up when we're in this together. Or you can click an amount that feels right to you below. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thank you. name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Are we doomed to repeat history?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
We can't re-elect Joe Biden.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=1ee36d6b4c2149e390ec958a056ac2b2&_e=r2sERhP6amDriGxCBOMl3CYdQTe8Yk-AGblGM-r-fAIIP5J6FQFZPsO96kU1-VcWXAu-Uvz15iuQ8p-Ou7STP38_e8VR2-mp66ki477BaVzNU_nYJqY2OtEqJmcQvof7J45TOlUz0sr2s9lD2-BDHkEsTow7K6qKnkt4mHn8Xoqfwgspc7QqrOnJpAgNPZA2aaxfbDptP3p1paUeTnZIdxyAtN1yWIQnYVCraoWsbbGGMN0VKF3Ia-Rhb-f92Y-Imu2vPVJUFDmZm6Dr3I-vbPtH_IzhoU1z_J7-ef72Eyc%3D)
---
Friend,

There's no doubt about it -- we're living in uncertain times. It's hard to imagine that after four years of the disastrous Biden agenda, there's still a chance the Democrats will keep the White House and Senate Majority in Congress.

After everything this country's been through, we could get stuck with four more years of Joe Biden.

It's now or never to join our grassroots movement and make a difference.

America can't afford four more years of President Biden's open borders and Bidenomics.

I want to be as clear as possible--your donations make a real difference. Every dollar counts.

****I 'm not asking you to carry the weight of the election on your shoulders. I'm humbly asking you to lend us a hand by donating $5, $10, or $25. ****

clean_body: We can't re-elect Joe Biden. | Friend, There's no doubt about it -- we're living in uncertain times. It's hard to imagine that after four years of the disastrous Biden agenda, there's still a chance the Democrats will keep the White House and Senate Majority in Congress. After everything this country's been through, we could get stuck with four more years of Joe Biden. It's now or never to join our grassroots movement and make a difference. America can't afford four more years of President Biden's open borders and Bidenomics. I want to be as clear as possible--your donations make a real difference. Every dollar counts. **I 'm not asking you to carry the weight of the election on your shoulders. I'm humbly asking you to lend us a hand by donating $5, $10, or $25. **PLEASE -- DONATE ANYTHING BELOW! | Best, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright (C) 2024 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

name: Sen. John Kennedy
subject: They’re as nervous as a long-tailed monkey in a room full of rocking chairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
See what keeps the Washington Swamp awake at night| | | Friend, The RINOs are coming out of the woodwork to attack my good friend and conservative candidate for U.S. Senate, Mike Rogers.

And I’m not just talking about any ol’ Republican In Name Only ... they’re sending the cream of the crop after him.

Keyboard warrior Adam Kinzinger spends more time hurling insults at Mike on Twitter than he does wiping his tears.

And those same RINOS will try anything to defeat him. Let me make it clear: their efforts to bring down Mike are as useless as a submarine with screen doors because he’s a fighter and won’t back down.
[**Thankfully, Mike’s a tough guy. He’s an Army veteran and former law enforcement officer, but he needs dyed-in-the-wool patriots like us to have his back.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=25afbce5b3a84ca2b37aeaf73116fafa&_e=5hQMVo-ChbszhIfSnGVZKybWeAtSnzutVi6UDR1FgprzCxOtScOH_wI2Q9nDDu7FjAXR071Dux7Z1e5vi9sxw1_f6Jw4uFd5RssDWAbumlMCeXvKBLFW6eLA5nOPj6PBS12_18o6VZ5V0KtQxxonGWCZ6nkxz4GnK5lMPTtSo04SJiD4t7jjBnbdgIYRpqMiOObHuGUbUclREHJvp5T-GjG1k7-y5E28IbgaVFhE2-YoDfanYAQdMTn6SWAwKH1KGL-V6uicCX6838FLP4mgrKbisYKZxTNpLZ5Vh-q-jAYjT68dWg8q3dibmMPmGLBdTtDunCz2t90ol1Ix5a95A3E7QM5CSr15Na65kmsVlvzmBTMLup93bwljOHz5L4BZeTUZLK-kIVEj2IR5jmpxJe0y-GblmY2G7wFwC89bRkSpF6RFpbr4ct9AX2g_zTB6m9qOiWFBBjmr-PcEHpo_9tAneFfEG2Cn55jgvuYS53w%3D)

I’m not the only one supporting Mike Rogers — President Trump gave him his complete and total endorsement.

And since then, the attacks coming from both sides of the aisle have been endless. Because the combination of Mike Rogers in the Senate and President Trump back in the White House has the Washington Establishment more nervous than a long-tailed monkey in a room full of rocking chairs. I’m not going to keep dragging on about how important it is that we elect Mike Rogers, so I’ll leave you with this: **_[I’d rather drink weed clean_body: See what keeps the Washington Swamp awake at night| | | Friend, The RINOs are coming out of the woodwork to attack my good friend and conservative candidate for U.S. Senate, Mike Rogers. And I’m not just talking about any ol’ Republican In Name Only ... they’re sending the cream of the crop after him. Keyboard warrior Adam Kinzinger spends more time hurling insults at Mike on Twitter than he does wiping his tears. And those same RINOS will try anything to defeat him. Let me make it clear: their efforts to bring down Mike are as useless as a submarine with screen doors because he’s a fighter and won’t back down. I’m not the only one supporting Mike Rogers — President Trump gave him his complete and total endorsement. And since then, the attacks coming from both sides of the aisle have been endless. Because the combination of Mike Rogers in the Senate and President Trump back in the White House has the Washington Establishment more nervous than a long-tailed monkey in a room full of rocking chairs. I’m not going to keep dragging on about how important it is that we elect Mike Rogers, so I’ll leave you with this: Thanks for your time,**** Sen. Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons—but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**
**[Can you split a donation between my campaign and Adam Frisch's? We need to raise another $10,000 to reach our upcoming fundraising goal. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Adam Frisch will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win. Thank you, Jon ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3209%2E552475%2Ekzk0Mx)
Peter, after today’s campaign meeting, I had to reach out to our strongest supporters again.
As I’ve told you before, this is the toughest re-election fight of my career.
**This is the problem:** Our opponent has millions upon millions of his personal fortune, and the backing of Wall Street billionaires, all primed to buy ads on Pennsylvania’s airwaves for the next five months.
**But here’s the solution:** Our team has come through time and time again, so I’m asking if you’ll chip in your first donation of any amount today.

| Peter,

[I’m humbly asking for your support by splitting a donation between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help us keep this seat blue and retake the Senate Majority.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86593051/478375870/-1477526488?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240609_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyY2E0YzNmLWI2MjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I48kNt8SezxGwQhKjEbSOSrMdsFdI2kl4s2S64b6EHE=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86593052/478375871/-1477526488?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240609_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyY2E0YzNmLWI2MjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I48kNt8SezxGwQhKjEbSOSrMdsFdI2kl4s2S64b6EHE=) | [DONATE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86593053/478375872/-1477526488?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240609_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyY2E0YzNmLWI2MjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I48kNt8SezxGwQhKjEbSOSrMdsFdI2kl4s2S64b6EHE=)

The decision to run against Senator Menendez was one of the most consequential decisions of my life. The reason I stepped up is because I’m tired of constantly watching our politics fail our nation. We are just cycling from crisis to crisis, and too many politicians aren’t focused on what the American people need help with.

**Right now, a staggering 84 percent of people in New Jersey believe NJ politicians are corrupt.** The people of New Jersey deserve a choice for what kind of public servant they have in the Senate.

Instead of throwing up my hands and giving up, I am stepping up to show that there is a better way. We deserve leaders who can serve with integrity. Leaders who are workhorses, not show horses. After Menendez’s scandal, we need a fresh new start — a chance to lift up a new generation of leadership that can bring a new voice and deep public service experience to the U.S. Senate.

It’s been clear for some time that our campaign’s momentum is incredible. **We went from being the underdog to becoming the Democratic Nominee.**

There’s a long way to go between now and November though – **and Bob Menendez officially running as an Independent, making this a three-way race.** We need to make sure that we sustain and keep growing our momentum to unify our party and build a broad coalition of support for keeping this seat blue in November.

The only way we’ll win is through grassroots power and investments today in things like voter outreach, and that’s why I’m asking you to help us hit our $100,000 Blue Jersey goal by the end of the week.

[I’m humbled to be the Democratic Nominee in New Jersey, and now I’m asking: Can you split a donation between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help us keep this seat blue and stop a MAGA takeover of the Senate? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86593054/478375873/-1477526488?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240609_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyY2E0YzNmLWI2MjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I48kNt8SezxGwQhKjEbSOSrMdsFdI2kl4s2S64b6EHE=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Jamaal Bowman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2211%2E4032634%2E7s3qJM)
---
Right now, my friend and colleague Congressman Jamaal Bowman is fighting for re-election in one of the country’s most tightly-contested primary races. Corporate interests recruited a challenger to run against him in NY-16, and they have spent millions trying to drown out his message and defeat him. Understand this: These corporate interests want Jamaal Bowman out of Congress so they can prop up someone else who will only look out for them — not the interests of working people. For his past two terms, he has been advocating for public schools, teachers, and students. Securing critical funding for his district. Fighting to make housing more affordable. And campaigning for policies like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. **We would be losing a true fighter for working people if Jamaal weren’t in Congress.** [**With Election Day a little over two weeks away, right now is when he needs our support the most. Can you split a donation of $28 or any amount between Jamaal Bowman and our re-election campaign? Your support helps ensure Jamaal can compete, win his primary, and continue fighting for working families alongside us.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2242?amount=28&t=8&akid=2211%2E4032634%2E7s3qJM)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision to run for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I got a few free minutes here this Sunday. No calls, no meetings. It isn’t much, but...
#

Peter, I got a few free minutes here this Sunday. No calls, no meetings. I know that doesn’t sound like much, but with a newborn at home, chaos in Congress, and a campaign to run... trust me, it’s a gift.
And I know we send a lot of emails already, but I wanted to take a few of those minutes to tell you about why I decided to run for Senate in the first place. You are critical to our success, and I feel like I owe that much to you.
The truth is, when I jumped in this race I had no idea how things were going to go. I didn’t know if this was going to be a two-way race, a three-way race, a thirty-way race. We had no clue what things would look like at this point.
But things have changed. This race is locked in now, and Kari Lake is my opponent — someone way more interested in burning our democracy down than building it up. Someone who doesn’t care about unity, or reaching across the aisle. She is in this for herself, and for Trump.
And if she wins, it will be an absolute nightmare for Arizona and the country. She’s dangerous. Really.
She’s also been raising a ton of money lately, and that’s extremely concerning. There’s a real chance that she takes this Senate seat. The polls are incredibly close, and the pundits all say this is one of the most likely states in the country to flip.
One of the biggest FEC deadlines of the entire campaign is right around the corner, and when it hits we’re going to be legally required to release our fundraising numbers.
If we’re going to defeat Kari Lake, hold on to the Senate, and defeat Donald Trump, I’m going to need a ton of support from people like you. We need to show a lot of our strength in this FEC report.
So, please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my campaign today? The amount really isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. It’s going to add up fast when a ton of people chip in together.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240609-2-160&t=1&akid=2450%2E734936%2E8l9LLp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

Peter, It's not just speculation anymore; it's a resounding alarm! Liz Cheney, Hillary Clinton, Rachel Maddow - EVERYONE is echoing the same urgent message:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86593164/478376358/-738905521?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240609_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYjFlZjVhLWI3MjYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2i7oe2KcWif9b4xmA1LIAZ-bp3RDwnzmpqfdBQfkyAg=)
**Liz Cheney is spot on! Donald Trump has thrown the Constitution and building blocks right out the door.**

clean_body: | | | $3. If you knew contributing just $3 would guarantee Joe and Kamala are reelected in November, wouldn’t you donate immediately? If you knew that same $3 would prevent Donald Trump from becoming president again, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you ever spent? We know $3 doesn’t seem like enough money to do either of those things. But by the time you’ve gotten to this point in the email, dozens and dozens of people will have already donated their $3. Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because it all adds up, and that’s how we fund a winning campaign. If we can raise the resources we need to win, we’ll come out on top. If we fall short, we’ll lose. It’s really that simple. So please, Peter, help Joe and Kamala stay in the White House and send a message Trump doesn’t want to hear: He’ll never win in November. Not if this team rallies together. # Colin Allred Scares Ted Cruz

Watch the video to see for yourself...
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb_wintx?refcode=cagif)
---
Colin Allred is the challenger that has Ted Cruz shaking in his "boots". The former NFL linebacker, current Congressional Representative, and up-and-coming Democratic superstar is making early waves in the bid to flip Texas **BLUE**. Colin Allred's resume scares Ted Cruz, **but what will scare Cruz and MAGA-Republicans much more is if they see Democrats canvassing in the rural areas that they take for granted as their own.** In fact, this could be MAGA's Achilles heel. They are so prideful, thinking they have rural America locked down that they are not even defending it. **Flipping just a few votes county-by-county makes a HUGE difference** , and if we can do that, we'll see Cruz's 2.6% margin of victory from last time _disappear_! [**Please, join us right now by chipping in so we can create a rural ground game across the state and take it to Ted Cruz where he least expects it. Together, we can hand Ted Cruz his pink slip in 2024**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb_wintx?refcode=cagif)[**.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-24?refcode=lnk)

body:
| Hovde revealed that his campaign’s internal polling has him one point down.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2778%2E35263%2EJxhf7Q)
Peter — California megamillionaire Eric Hovde went on Fox Business earlier this week to tout his Wisconsin Senate campaign, and it went about as well as you’d expect. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun24.Hijekx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240609_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2778%2E35263%2EJxhf7Q) While trying to hide his California ties and prove to Wisconsinites that he actually lives here, Hovde mistakenly claimed that he’s “never been a resident of Wisconsin.” _We’ll let Hovde’s slip-up speak for itself..._ But all joking aside, his interview also uncovered an alarming update about our Senate race. **Hovde revealed that his campaign’s internal polling has him just one point down.** Hovde’s surge in the polls means the GOP’s ad blitz is working. On top of the nearly $8 million Eric Hovde has already spent on advertising, Tammy is currently being attacked by five different outside groups, backed by everyone from Republican billionaires to Hovde’s own brother. **[We need to fight back — fast. Hovde’s surge in the polls means the GOP’s ad blitz is working. On top of the nearly $8 million Eric Hovde has already spent on advertising, Tammy is currently being attacked by five different outside groups, backed by everyone from Republican billionaires to Hovde’s own brother.
